Dear Friend,

I am running to make Maryland safe, steady and prosperous. Let me tell you what I mean by prosperous.
I want you can go to sleep each night knowing you can pay your bills, your mortgage, and save for retirement and vacations. You know that your tomorrow is going to be better than today. And you know that your kids can have a future in Maryland.
Don’t forget—Martin O’Malley – our last Democratic governor raised your taxes 40 times in a row. When I served in the House of Delegates, I'm proud to say I voted against every tax increase– every single one. This is one of the reasons why Governor Hogan was elected. Because people were sick and tired of tax increases.
Under Governor Hogan, we CUT taxes, and made Maryland more affordable, so you can prosper. _As bad as Governor O’Malley was, the Democrats running today would be far worse. _
Look at what’s happening in DC. Reckless spending by the federal government has led to record inflation. We see it every time we go to the grocery store or put gas in the car. _As your governor, I will fight every effort by the legislature to raise taxes -- and_ ___I will use my platform and position to fight for tax_ _cuts_ _every single year that I am in office. _
But I can't do it without you!
[_**Will you join me?**_](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86AHYNFi9mHobItA-2F7hybD4qTs3dHiVBn-2FwbedkJuuJdi7fkyjk1-2BxwBQ0kqSdatGvqalX7NCr2tbD07aOhf7RRA-3D-3D1C1a_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6pV7HjFqMsaXIfhTxHdEPzITjTYA5Fpfc2L3pg8YNu7XVxsrBugRl-2B8QYLh4lo5ljpPhbS-2BwY73KQJ2Vnh9MlE805SkUhM1nKrMNlSiPk7f6Did8Xlz3uGYf-2BSADTggnuIrXQ3dOAalZd9F5rWjZc4gt8Tiu-2BsNnBB-2BllKgSaeHLB6lHDIqHePUPwYNx7vh58tuEvJNS0i9jCfvrby-2BTFwozCzxg-2BQw-2BhiYt7RXENmJfaY0FWzxKQJqa7Gno6r1mC9MJuzuayiw461DeJVoJRkxLmi3R2D98Af-2BVxBPIOAXNtD-2BRSVGeqAemVGb4VoWMr9CNKNa-2BZ3263erfnH2RdqRulqLXAhOxoEluIs4eRDMgWrEv-2BJkCX75j-2BnnPah2xYhTGddYYDiw-2FkS6QqI5dSxK8wkHpJadrkB-2Bx5DNY6TE00WcBEaKbiW27kbvyLaZWeF8UDKHJvjhlkrYnZS4-2BCiPRzQ00BNmQ7pJ6mTa6xleb1LnVP1-2FwJvNisFERN71Yb0DFuFzc9hu2LzQE-2FHYKj0LwSt4JD7FaTcNUeDGBOs2ToNqnaLjG6IcwGvboproZs-2BrXE3Bx0iPjCouBQGgH6yfE-2BkoiqJ1SOaMcqPmBMVZCG6WQl4ddhuuWo2tQBAVYMPN0a6VJM7mGjZMTX0YJTGl38URcRd6TRYSL8s1bLqKSReIgXpGTmswF-2Fk7opCdYZwW1CT9b35ItSr37iUB5yRFU6w4mRTK-2B6Wo16IouPhiU89hlvOPIB2HYVpXBl7XM-2BrsrxgPmL38OH-2FIaH1UGXAqLadhc-2ByojHrliVeCIQchKBXLnZmvMzdk4WCsZbWaWvl73cfT8htM892m97yJqWFQ-3D-3D)

And you know that your kids can have a future in Maryland. Don’t forget—Martin O’Malley – our last Democratic governor raised your taxes 40 times in a row. When I served in the House of Delegates, I'm proud to say I voted against every tax increase– every single one. This is one of the reasons why Governor Hogan was elected. Because people were sick and tired of tax increases. Under Governor Hogan, we CUT taxes, and made Maryland more affordable, so you can prosper. As bad as Governor O’Malley was, the Democrats running today would be far worse. Look at what’s happening in DC. Reckless spending by the federal government has led to record inflation. We see it every time we go to the grocery store or put gas in the car. As your governor, I will fight every effort by the legislature to raise taxes -- and I will use my platform and position to fight for tax cuts every single year that I am in office. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Makki?=
subject: Answering the Urgent Call to Help Ukraine
body:
The remarkable story of how a community came together to help when war broke out in Ukraine. | | | |
---
|
---
| **FL-13 Republican Congressional Candidate Amanda Makki Leads Efforts for Ukrainian Aid in Pinellas County**
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=4524b008a0&e=c2296cffff)
---
The remarkable story of how the Tampa Bay community came together to help when war broke out in Ukraine.
| [Chip in to help send Amanda to Congress for FL-13!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=cd362c4284&e=c2296cffff "Chip in to help send Amanda to Congress for FL-13!")
---
| | |
---
|
Hi Friend,

The decision to run for office is a decision Amanda Makki didn’t take lightly. If you've been with us along the campaign trail, then you know how serious she is about her commitment to Pinellas County and our country.

If you want to meet her, if you need her help, even if you don’t ask, Amanda Makki will be there.

When Russia invaded Ukraine, Amanda Makki picked up the phone and called the local Ukrainian church and organizations. Father Bohdan Barytskyy at the Epiphany of Our Lord Ukrainian Catholic Church in St. Petersburg, FL answered in a tired voice. His heart hurt for his country and his fellow Ukrainians, but little did he know he would be the epicenter of relief efforts in Pinellas County. Amanda introduced herself and asked him how she could help. It was a welcome call and they got to work on a plan.

Amanda reached out to many of you. You might have seen the email about the Candlelight Vigil. Amanda quickly organized this for the Tampa Bay community to stand in solidarity with the Ukrainian people. Nearly every media outlet in the Tampa Bay area helped shine the spotlight on the urgent need to help. Amanda worked with church volunteers to come up with a plan on what to collect and where to put the donations.

The thing is... it's never enough for Amanda.

She always wants to do more.

She reached out to the owner of Dairy Kurl, an ice cream shop in Clearwater, and together they created an event to collect donations. The folks at Dairy Kurl even threw in free ice cream to sweeten the deal. So many of you showed up to help. It was amazing!

Amanda didn't stop there.

She showed up at Parish Hall where volunteers were coming out of the woodwork to help organize and sort the incredible amount of donations. The volunteers, many who just walked in and asked if they could help, know Amanda by name because she was there, working with them, to get the job done from the beginning.

When the price to ship the donations to Poland was beyond what the Church had expected, or could afford, Amanda was in the meetings to help find a solution. Early this week, 25 pallets of donated items left the Church for Poland. Amanda Makki shows up. Perhaps a local conservative blogger said it best, "She's been
out-hustling all other candidates in terms of community participation and visibility," he wrote in his latest article.

It's no coincidence.

**Amanda isn't about the photo op. This is who she is and it's why we need her to represent us in Congress.

Watch the short video above for an inside look at Amanda's efforts to help the Ukrainian people. **

Amanda is the real deal and we're proud to be on her team. [Let her know you are too!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=6541b30a1d&e=c2296cffff)

Team Makki

clean_body: The remarkable story of how a community came together to help when war broke out in Ukraine. | | | | | | FL-13 Republican Congressional Candidate Amanda Makki Leads Efforts for Ukrainian Aid in Pinellas County | The remarkable story of how the Tampa Bay community came together to help when war broke out in Ukraine. | "Chip in to help send Amanda to Congress for FL-13!" | | | | Hi Friend, The decision to run for office is a decision Amanda Makki didn’t take lightly. If you've been with us along the campaign trail, then you know how serious she is about her commitment to Pinellas County and our country. If you want to meet her, if you need her help, even if you don’t ask, Amanda Makki will be there. When Russia invaded Ukraine, Amanda Makki picked up the phone and called the local Ukrainian church and organizations. Father Bohdan Barytskyy at the Epiphany of Our Lord Ukrainian Catholic Church in St. Petersburg, FL answered in a tired voice. His heart hurt for his country and his fellow Ukrainians, but little did he know he would be the epicenter of relief efforts in Pinellas County. Amanda introduced herself and asked him how she could help. It was a welcome call and they got to work on a plan. Amanda reached out to many of you. You might have seen the email about the Candlelight Vigil. Amanda quickly organized this for the Tampa Bay community to stand in solidarity with the Ukrainian people. Nearly every media outlet in the Tampa Bay area helped shine the spotlight on the urgent need to help. Amanda worked with church volunteers to come up with a plan on what to collect and where to put the donations. The thing is... it's never enough for Amanda. She always wants to do more. She reached out to the owner of Dairy Kurl, an ice cream shop in Clearwater, and together they created an event to collect donations. The folks at Dairy Kurl even threw in free ice cream to sweeten the deal. So many of you showed up to help. It was amazing! Amanda didn't stop there. She showed up at Parish Hall where volunteers were coming out of the woodwork to help organize and sort the incredible amount of donations. The volunteers, many who just walked in and asked if they could help, know Amanda by name because she was there, working with them, to get the job done from the beginning. When the price to ship the donations to Poland was beyond what the Church had expected, or could afford, Amanda was in the meetings to help find a solution. Early this week, 25 pallets of donated items left the Church for Poland. Amanda Makki shows up. Perhaps a local conservative blogger said it best, "She's been out-hustling all other candidates in terms of community participation and visibility," he wrote in his latest article. It's no coincidence. Amanda isn't about the photo op. This is who she is and it's why we need her to represent us in Congress. Watch the short video above for an inside look at Amanda's efforts to help the Ukrainian people. Amanda is the real deal and we're proud to be on her team. Team Makki | "Show Amanda You Stand With Her!" | | | | News Coverage | Bay News 9 covers the donation collection at Epiphany of Our Lord Ukrainian Catholic Church. | WFLA Channel 8's Melanie Michael covers the Candlelight Vigil. | Bay News 9's Trevor Pettiford covers the Candlelight Vigil. | Fox 13's Evan Axlebank covers the Candlelight Vigil. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.amandamakki.com | | Copyright © 2022 Amanda Makki, All rights reserved.

I know your time is valuable, especially on the weekend, so I’m going to keep this message short. Thanks in advance for taking the time to read it.

You might not know this, but the majority of our donations come from everyday folks giving whatever they can to make a difference in Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate election. The average donation to one of these messages tends to hover around $26, give or take.

This budget gap comes at a time when the attacks on Sarah and our campaign will become a lot more frequent. Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC and Republican megadonors are expected to flood Wisconsin with negative ads very soon — and they have more than $200 million to pull resources from.

If we are going to counter their attacks with ads of our own, it’ll be because a lot of people like you stepped up. That’s why I’m asking today if I can count on you.

Thanks for everything you have done so far to help us send Sarah Godlewski to the U.S. Senate. It means more than you know to our entire team.

— Jake

Jake Strassberger
Campaign Manager
Sarah for Wisconsin

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. body:

name: Glenn Beck
subject: An emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59890066:JBw5RToCN:m:1:3253819041:0BBDC060AF082ADAEBD9D391854A38E6:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59890066:JBw5RToCN:m:1:3253819041:0BBDC060AF082ADAEBD9D391854A38E6:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59890066:JBw5RToCN:m:1:3253819041:0BBDC060AF082ADAEBD9D391854A38E6:r)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59890066:JBw5RToCN:m:1:3253819041:0BBDC060AF082ADAEBD9D391854A38E6:r)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59890066:JBw5RToCN:m:1:3253819041:0BBDC060AF082ADAEBD9D391854A38E6:r)

name: Jeremy Hunt
subject: A MASSIVE blow to our soldiers
body:
Our military men and women put their lives on the line to defend our great country every day. And Joe Biden is throwing them
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsdh2n4in8mlm34s7f94kiqu4cou2josuat3oos0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongmsorcd5kscp76t5h62rb6cth6pp6apjl6sqm0pjlmuq6cs726tgj2d5mchoj0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mmq60shmcor61cr4suobapbi4no)
Fellow Conservative, Our military men and women put their lives on the line to defend our great country every day. **And Joe Biden is throwing them out like dirt just because they won’t get the vaccine.** As a former U.S. Army Captain, I know that America’s heroes deserve better than this. **[Stand with me today to say NO to the military vaccine mandate and put our soldiers FIRST](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi3lj74cuk78vpj2odroiivctbgo5i9j2oqaslsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh2bs).** [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z65uanhuui03rdvnogphhb9aidbbc8sjcmait56o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt86kpku8kg79f6tgm3cima8kbouhrlt7vln026g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl79di94sprcajrj4jtgp05v9i12f8jcq3j309r8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmmhh427f3kr2v5kg24v86jn15of288edp3dnh4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg0bm1pr6kfig9tkf6gqntij0e7tdocc79af8gpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh2bs) I cannot imagine being denied my service because I refuse to put a chemical in my body, Fellow Conservative. _And the worst part is service members who dedicated their LIVES to our country are being denied their benefits because they won’t get the jab._ **As a veteran and a proud American, I am absolutely disgusted, and I know you are too.** **[Stand with me today to STOP the disgusting military vaccine mandate and HONOR our soldiers the way they deserve.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmak5aibf4afp9gqlnm03oosj2d2ihks0k657820_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh2bs)** Thank you, [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpob127skottvnv6vufpi31tq4kbmqb0puiqhth0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3im6o72cjh2bs) Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

subject: The Beauty of Genesis
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWWHOT_HLN

Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story:
Reading Biblical Narratives," is still available online for free!
In this six-lecture
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWWHOT_HLN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing
with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course,
"The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is still
available online for free!

In this six-lecture course, you'll explore
some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex
relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about
divine and human nature.

"The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale
College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught this
text to undergraduate students here at the College for over 15
years.

This course aims to deepen your theological
understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary
beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and
introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Larry P.
Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at
Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher
education.

Then, Professor Jackson explains the four
relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and
creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the
narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac,
Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course is perfect for personal study,
viewing with your family, or for use in small groups such as
Bible studies and book clubs.

Activate your free course now »

Please use this link to explore the beauty of
the first book of the Bible with "The Genesis Story: Reading
Biblical Narratives."

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

Director of Online Learning

Hillsdale College

Watch the trailer now

What students are saying
"Hillsdale College's online offerings have
deepened my education and enriched my life."
- Fred D.
"Extraordinary in their simplicity and so
fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue
to knowledge."
- John C.

Activate your free course now »

[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0vgfbljl5bvvsft8ula5c1i7h5maiarsq7kl9io_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmc1g62tb0chgb4p1gemqm2o70edondd9le1om7c76mqr78t1lmupnasrhedo61puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mmq6fcjgcoqm5cr3cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob7c3hm0ob6cdh2bs)
# #1 Survival Item of 2022
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2bs3ove76pf1cf9vgnup4h0qf67f9503c4qf6u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3hm0ob6cdh2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0649q3q184jlg6voc6s8bet46v0tu3tpb61mkl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3hm0ob6cdh2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl6r36h2c19ipc58ico1cnuuf34hpgv8lg9bvmgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3hm0ob6cdh2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrmhh7l8m4j332nfat0n57o3ulq86qv7341uatj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3hm0ob6cdh2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zprsg7fhp89jc10mao2g0lgpioq2si23qg57urjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3hm0ob6cdh2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1vttb09k0u7pa0jdevdck4oco9ot7rno9149j10_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3hm0ob6cdh2bs)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z8gj1vputrrbqh5dga5fkhf287ou3qfdleu514to).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmh8o5pquh5hmbnuas86n816b2rrfnbbh41u90a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3hm0ob6cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:

## We Have A MAJOR Cultural Problem In America
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4582.1.0675f371967ceb18dccbf753aa2eeb7c)
---
The United States of America is currently **living upside down**.
We have a cultural issue that we must address immediately.
Over the last week a biological male was named _"Woman of the Year"_ and a biological male won the Women's NCAA Swimming championship.
The **WOKE** agenda is destroying many segments of society including women's sports. **Where are the feminists**?
It's past-time to deal with the issue.
**Transgenderism is nothing more than a severe mental illness**.
We need to stop celebrating and promoting the mental illness and begin _treating it_.
Our nation is on the verge of total collapse. We ALL must get involved and put a stop to the nonsense.
I will do my part in the US Senate by putting forth legislation that BANS biological males from competing in Women's sports.
"Woe unto them that call evil good, and good evil; that put darkness for light, and light for darkness; that put bitter for sweet, and sweet for bitter!" - Isaiah 5:20
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4583.1.7c49a9041608a14cd6d2ec2f2b33601f), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4584.1.5d5ce700c063a7f9023eed7a3808c3a3), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4585.1.5aeb8ffef87669b9807c328768136dc3), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4586.1.6022b22a3a5b6711b934d22e484bd1df), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4587.1.f3bff58e56a1fceef5700daefcda10bd)).
| | [ Click Here To Help Fight Back Against The Woke Agenda ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4588.1.a49af91acae465c3c08f2191d80c6830)

## HUGE NEWS: FREE TRIP
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4589.1.2a9f55d291eeb61d370290ff0a3b6fe1)
---
We have exciting news to share...
We have a drawing for a **FREE** round trip to attend any one of the **ReAwaken America Tour** stops.
This trip includes a **VIP Ticket** to hear and potentially meet **Eric Trump** , **General Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mike Lindell** and others. As well as **flight and hotel** to whichever city you choose.
Options:
May 13-14: Myrtle Beach, SC
July 8-9: Virgina Beach, VA
To enter into the drawing all you have to do is **make a donation of $25 or more** to the campaign from March 1 through March 31.
For every $25 donated during the month of march that will result in one new entry into the drawing for the FREE ReAwaken America trip.
You can enter into the drawing by visiting [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5286461.4590.1.939458bb5d5911b2d93925e014993cf8)
Winner will be announced on April 2, 2022

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43193358/336134143/-2057546413?refcode=20220321_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzBlMDUxMC0xMmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_MBy92RLJ-a2B4qDtPgAeTQfByEnCUcBdPeh9hM00g=) Friend, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. **That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal.** [**Can you make a contribution today -- split between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us reach our fundraising goal? I wouldn’t ask if it didn't make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43193359/336134144/2038802527?refcode=20220321_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzBlMDUxMC0xMmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_MBy92RLJ-a2B4qDtPgAeTQfByEnCUcBdPeh9hM00g=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43193360/336134145/-2057546413?refcode=20220321_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzBlMDUxMC0xMmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_MBy92RLJ-a2B4qDtPgAeTQfByEnCUcBdPeh9hM00g=)
Thank you so much for your support. I hope you know how grateful I am to have this team by my side. \-- Tim

name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: You’re Being Rope-A-Doped
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
Peter: Think we're heading for a Red Wave this November? Think again... We're getting Rope-A-Doped. We're being told by the media that Republicans are geared for a blowout victory. You see reporters like MSNBC's Chuck Todd say that Biden is "No longer seen as competent and effective." And 8 months before the election has happened, Republicans are already taking a victory lap. And if you don't wake up, you'll find out on November 9th that you did exactly what the Democrats wanted you to do... actually not do. You're not donating to conservative organizations because, **_" why bother, we're going to win anyway."_** **You 'll end up being George Foreman in the eighth round, not realizing you've been knocked out by the Champ and didn't see it coming.** I've done this too long to disregard the tactics employed by Democratic opponents, and that's why I'm sounding the alarm today. If we don't ramp up our campaigning now to undecided voters, we're going to lose in November. **[That's why I need you to donate, $25, $50, or $100 today to help us increase outreach programs to these swayable voters.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59895302:JQBAm8oNU:m:1:3317145305:5DDF6E172A78CD550B011DD86E34653B:r "That’s why I need you to donate, $25,
$50, or $100 today to help us increase outreach programs to these swayable voters.")** Just because liberals like Bill Maher or Bari Weiss have seen the light on COVID doesn't mean they're going to be campaigning for Ted Cruz, Ron DeSantis, Byron Donalds or any myriad of conservative candidates anytime soon. They will be working overtime to get the swing voters to pick the Democrat candidate. And just because Leftist media are roasting Biden and Pelosi, it doesn't mean they're going to suddenly be praising Senators Josh Hawley or Tim Scott come election day. And that's the problem. These swayable voters don't watch Fox News, Newsmax, or subscribe to the Daily Wire. They watch ABC, NBC, and CBS News. And 2-3 months before the election, they'll be bombarded with why Biden and the Democrats have done a great job and told that Republicans are evil puppy-killers. They'll even be told, and possibly believe, that Anthony Fauci is a hero. **[If we want to get rid of Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and the liberals controlling Congress, I need you to dig deep and donate today. I'm challenging you to think big. Can I count on you to donate $100, $250, or $500?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59895302:JQBAm8oNU:m:1:3317145305:5DDF6E172A78CD550B011DD86E34653B:r "If we want to get rid of Pelosi, Chuck
Schumer, and the liberals controlling Congress, I need you to dig deep and donate today. I’m challenging you to think big. Can I count on you to
donate $100, $250, or $500?")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59895302:JQBAm8oNU:m:1:3317145305:5DDF6E172A78CD550B011DD86E34653B:r "Video")At New Journey PAC we know EXACTLY how to reach these swayable voters. That's how we successfully got Rep. Byron Donalds and Winsome Sears elected! Our innovative outreach strategies, like our hilarious but truthful Christmas commercial, give us more bang for the buck that NO ONE ELSE can come close to matching... But we still need bucks to make it BANG! **[Will you donate $500, $1,000, $2,500, or even $5,000 today to help us show these swayable voters that ONLY the conservative GOP candidates are the solution to bringing our country back to prosperity?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59895302:JQBAm8oNU:m:1:3317145305:5DDF6E172A78CD550B011DD86E34653B:r "Will you donate $500, $1,000, $2,500, or even $5,000 today to
help us show these swayable voters that ONLY the conservative GOP candidates are the solution to bringing our country back to prosperity?")** If we're going to counter the onslaught of the Liberal Media coverage praising the work of Biden and the Dems in the fall, we need to increase our efforts, but we can't do it without YOUR support. If we can keep conservatives from falling for the Democrat Party's Rope-A-Dope, we'll truly be in a position to usher in a Red Wave this November. **[Join us TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59895302:JQBAm8oNU:m:1:3317145305:5DDF6E172A78CD550B011DD86E34653B:r "Join us TODAY!")** For a New Journey, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59895302:JQBAm8oNU:m:1:3317145305:5DDF6E172A78CD550B011DD86E34653B:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
---

FIRST: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032122_B1_AC_30D] Joe Biden, Jon Ossoff, and Raphael Warnock won razor-thin victories in Georgia – flipping the state blue for the first time in decades.
THEN: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032122_B1_AC_30D] Trump blamed ‘fraud’ for that thin margin – spawning the ‘big lie’ and ushering in the first wave of voter-suppression laws in Georgia, Texas, and other states.
AND NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032122_B1_AC_30D] they’ve seen the surge of opposition to these laws – so they’re doubling down and making it EVEN HARDER to vote ahead of November’s midterm elections, especially in communities of color! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032122_B1_AC_30D]
It’s clear the GOP’s anti-voter crusade isn’t going to stop anytime soon.
We MUST elect Democratic Secretaries of State dedicated to defending our right to vote in this year’s upcoming midterm elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-march22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_032122_B1_AC_30D]

body:
let me tell you a story:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43201246/336167405/-892300846?=&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2401-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTgzZGIzMi0xZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69orpXrlK2LGXV1sl7O77gSCF-z7CmHJ6deY8HuTFwA=)
---
Friend,

I want to tell you an important story today, but before I do: [**Would you consider donating to my campaign for U.S. Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43201247/336167412/-892300846?=&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2401-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTgzZGIzMi0xZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69orpXrlK2LGXV1sl7O77gSCF-z7CmHJ6deY8HuTFwA=) As a young girl, I could never have imagined that I'd become a congresswoman and one day run for U.S. Senate, but my parents believed in me and did everything they could to ensure I had a bright future. I'd be so honored to have your support, too.
**Now, let me tell you a story:** I remember in seventh grade, my class was going on a big trip to Washington, D.C. My dad, a janitor who worked seven days a week to make ends meet for our family, asked for an advance to pay for my plane ticket. I'm still amazed today he could find the money – and I'm touched that he sacrificed so much for me.
That first trip to Washington, D.C., made a major impact on me. I stood at the feet of Lincoln's statue in the Lincoln Memorial, gazing up at this giant of American history. I walked through the Library of Congress with wide eyes. I looked at the U.S. Capitol in awe, totally unaware that one day I'd have the opportunity to work in that very building.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43201248/336167421/-892300846?=&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2401-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTgzZGIzMi0xZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69orpXrlK2LGXV1sl7O77gSCF-z7CmHJ6deY8HuTFwA=)
If my parents could see me today, they would be so proud of everything I've been able to accomplish. I truly believe that only in America can a little Black girl growing up in the South in the 1960s have such an amazing story of opportunity.
But the truth is, my story is a rare one. For so many working families like mine, the American dream is simply out of reach. That's why I'm running for U.S. Senate to expand my story of opportunity to more Americans – by reducing student debt, raising the minimum wage, expanding access to childcare and cutting health care costs.
If you're with me, I need your support right now. I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in this close race. If we flip Florida blue, Democrats could expand our Senate majority and pass our agenda, so I have to ask: **[Will you donate $5 right now to help me surge ahead, win this race and provide more opportunities for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43201249/336167434/-892300846?=&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2401-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTgzZGIzMi0xZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69orpXrlK2LGXV1sl7O77gSCF-z7CmHJ6deY8HuTFwA=)**
Thanks for being part of this historic grassroots movement.

Congresswoman Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43201252/336167444/1417698435?refcode=jtk2401-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTgzZGIzMi0xZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69orpXrlK2LGXV1sl7O77gSCF-z7CmHJ6deY8HuTFwA=&emci=4dc6c69d-e1a3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9a83db32-1fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
We’re building something special here in Northeast Ohio, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you by my side as we fight to bring real change to this community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43202595/336172991/-1745696519?refcode=em_welcome_2022_b1_es_ntl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjlkODY3Ni0yMmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBnc2Rzbwh2-gMf64aY7baHaedYVUTYNXpCRjkgN5lE=) _Emilia Sykes is a State Representative and former House Minority Leader running for Congress in Northeast Ohio. If you’re ready to help her win this fight,[you can make a contribution by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43202596/336172992/-1745696519?refcode=em_welcome_2022_b1_es_ntl-nd&refcode2=a29d8676-22a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjlkODY3Ni0yMmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBnc2Rzbwh2-gMf64aY7baHaedYVUTYNXpCRjkgN5lE=) If you’d like to no longer receive emails, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/28c9c060-2aa6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/a29d8676-22a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjlkODY3Ni0yMmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZBnc2Rzbwh2-gMf64aY7baHaedYVUTYNXpCRjkgN5lE=&id=114718308). _
Peter,

**I want to take a moment to thank you for letting me introduce myself and my campaign to you!** We’re building something special here in Northeast Ohio, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you by my side as we fight to bring real change to this community.

During my time as State Representative for Akron and Ohio's State House Minority Leader, I stood up against politicians who simply didn’t care about the day-to-day lives of Ohioans. Despite serving in the minority, during my first year as leader the percentage of bipartisan bills passed was nearly double each of the previous two legislative sessions.

[**Since launching my campaign, I’m proud to have earned the support of EMILY’s List, been placed on the highly competitive DCCC Red to Blue program, as well as gained the support of numerous local leaders and organizations. But I’m going to need this grassroots team by my side every step of the way to get the job done. Peter, as a child growing up in Akron, Ohio, I saw first-hand that Northeast Ohio families work hard every day but too often aren’t given the opportunity that many others enjoy. My parents taught me the values of hard work, never to give up, and that public service means standing up for others because it’s the right thing to do, not because it serves your political career. And that means picking fights on behalf of the people against the powerful.

**I'm running for Congress because Northeast Ohio needs a fighter who isn’t afraid to stand up for them when the powerful tell me to sit down and embrace the status quo.** I'm ready to stand up for our jobs, for affordable healthcare and education, and for bipartisan cooperation to actually get things done.

[**This race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the entire country. I'm ready to get to work but I’ll need your help to win. name: Team Kulla
subject: Working hard for YOU
body:
“Civil rights are for everyone.” This is the message that has been motivating our campaign over the last month ... | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62388c0af0cdf0495a54dbb5&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6237c095bd86c022008031df%26ss_email_id%3D62388c0af0cdf0495a54dbb5%26ss_campaign_name%3DWorking%2Bhard%2Bfor%2BYOU%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-03-21T14%253A33%253A00Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=4pykT8hAnxgLaSwb3Jmd5Tjdwc0%3D)
---
|
## Working hard for YOU
---
#### “Civil rights are for everyone.”
This is the message that has been motivating our campaign over the last month as we’ve learned more and more what distinguishes Casey’s goals from the other candidates. Oregon’s Bureau of Labor and Industries (BOLI) needs to work effectively for _all_ of us, to protect our civil rights in the workplace and in public spaces. BOLI isn’t just for workers or for employers or for union members — **it’s for every Oregonian** who engages with businesses, visits public spaces, and (rightfully!) expects fair and equal access to goods and services. Whether you are younger or older, employed or retired, Democrat or Republican (or other!), BOLI needs to be ready to promptly and effectively defend your rights.That’s Casey’s goal: to build a responsive, effective agency. This means an agency that is fully-staffed, with employees who are supported and empowered to uphold BOLI’s critical mission.We also need a BOLI Commissioner who isn’t beholden to special interests groups or overly influenced by one party in the complex process of insuring rights for all. Casey is a non-partisan elected official and a small business owner. He’s been an employer, a worker in a union shop, and manager. **No other candidate has the breadth and balance of experiences.**
#### Do you share our belief in the importance of civil rights for ALL Oregonians?
_The May 17 primary is approaching quickly!_ Now is the time to share Casey’s message and candidacy with your friends and colleagues.We’re working every day to get the message out as well, through mailers, voicemails, texts, billboards, and door hangers. That work can use your financial support, and you can donate now [here](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62388c0af0cdf0495a54dbb5&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fdonate%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6237c095bd86c022008031df%26ss_email_id%3D62388c0af0cdf0495a54dbb5%26ss_campaign_name%3DWorking%2Bhard%2Bfor%2BYOU%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-03-21T14%253A33%253A00Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=hee5p2JUMN3IhipKm-47LR57MFA%3D).Thank you for all your support so far.We can do this. **Together.****Team Kulla ( & Casey)**
---

Peter,

We had a busy week in the New Hampshire House of Representatives, defending medical freedom and protecting parents from the radical socialists who want to take away their children... I am proud to stand with liberty warriors in the legislature in our fight against COVID tyranny and the corrupt political establishment who hates us. We passed a number of bills designed to restore individual liberty. Here are five bills we passed last week that strengthen medical freedom in New Hampshire: HB 1606 \- Makes the state vaccine registry an opt-in program HB 1280 \- Protects parents from losing their parental rights when refusing to comply with federal or state vaccine mandates for their children HB 1131 \- Prohibits schools in New Hampshire from adopting face mask requirements HB 1241 \- Prohibits school districts from requiring COVID vaccines for attendance HB 1022 \- Permits pharmacists to do their job and dispense the drug Ivermectin by means of a standing order [Join my campaign in standing against COVID tyranny by making an URGENT donation of $50 or more today >>>](https://email.baxterforcongress.com/e3t/Ctc/OR+113/d2p7Ng04/VX6b7r4ft-R3W426B6w8MFzYMW8pQGPD4GXlBpN6klYWp3lLBmV1-WJV7CgTDFW5_HCP18HdwnRW7Wnhq57wb55pW49j1Kb6ydnJGVYZMn14Lp50JN3GW-9N_j-4mW2WHQkJ2SSTqZW2cmcpQ7BssSlW164cb91L_fckV6blDz1g9_LcW7h0lbR7ysps4N17S00Kn47yCW96D0Kz8nV2J0V2FCLX7rzlwZW7RVGlj4-w639W1S5q211z4CLQW5v6N851bLFdgVtXX2j95_dFtW6j2dqR5G0J5tW5bXsjT5qb6vQW1qWRXv8BGRYVW4_dkF78ff6M_W3tbHds1l0mbM3kCN1)

clean_body: Peter, we had a busy week in the New Hampshire House of Representatives, defending medical freedom and protecting parents from the radical... | Peter, We had a busy week in the New Hampshire House of Representatives, defending medical freedom and protecting parents from the radical socialists who want to take away their children... I am proud to stand with liberty warriors in the legislature in our fight against COVID tyranny and the corrupt political establishment who hates us. We passed a number of bills designed to restore individual liberty. Here are five bills we passed last week that strengthen medical freedom in New Hampshire: HB 1606 \- Makes the state vaccine registry an opt-in program HB 1280 \- Protects parents from losing their parental rights when refusing to comply with federal or state vaccine mandates for their children HB 1131 \- Prohibits schools in New Hampshire from adopting face mask requirements HB 1241 \- Prohibits school districts from requiring COVID vaccines for attendance HB 1022 \- Permits pharmacists to do their job and dispense the drug Ivermectin by means of a standing order We need leaders in Washington who have the courage to stand up to the corrupt political establishment and fight for our Constitutional rights... My socialist opponent Chris Pappas is too eager to appease Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. He is willing to sell out our rights for his own personal and political gain. In the land of the free, we shouldn't even be having these debates. Americans should not be forced between complying with unconstitutional orders or losing their children to the state. I'm running for Congress to be a voice for all Americans, Peter. Click an option below to send the proven conservative in this race to Washington. Gone are the days where the government has the authority to make medical decisions for us. Our America-First movement is about restoring rights back to the individual... and that includes our right to make our own medical decisions. Let's make America First again. Tim Baxter Candidate for Congress Personal Cell Phone: (603)-997-8108 | | Baxter for Congress, PO Box 1741, Seabrook, New Hampshire 03874, United States

* * *
Team, This month marks the 57th anniversary of Bloody Sunday. 57 years ago, voting rights activists crossed the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama. As they peacefully demonstrated, Black marchers were violently attacked by white Alabama state troopers. The devastating events that took place spurred a national call to action to protect Black Americans and the voting rights of _all_ Americans regardless of the color of their skin. **57 years have passed, but our fight continues.** Voting rights are once again under attack — at the federal and local levels, in state legislatures, and in our courts. It’s a calculated attack by extremist politicians to restrict your democratic rights. **And, friend, we must take action.** [STAND UP FOR VOTING RIGHTS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43203689/336176482/1056210236?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTFkZjMzNC0yNWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FjBJOiRDVVHcwmAT1JdSycghOurFv850XafqxRJT9A=&emci=6babda10-eea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ea1df334-25a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=561582) Let us honor the American heroes who marched in Selma 57 years ago with action today. Thanks for standing with us, — Fairness Project

Oh no. We slapped our foreheads.
We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it.
The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours.
The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand.
And then... poof!
GONE!
Our inventory manager was asking...
_**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_
Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow!
And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now.
That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:
[**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And

**Melanie D.**
I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.

---|---
|
**Shirley C.**
I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.

---|---
|
**Wing C.**
I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.

---|---
|
**Richard G.**
It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.

clean_body: This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock | | | | == | | | #1 Survival Item of 2022 This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock == == == Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... "Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?" Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: == == | | Melanie D. I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it. ---|--- | Shirley C. I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much. ---|--- | Wing C. I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank. ---|--- | Richard G. It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much. ---|--- == Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. | Kathy has proven that she'll lead with a steady hand and ALWAYS put America first when it comes to our foreign affairs.
"We need to be very sober and very disciplined in our thinking and our response and the steps we intend to take next. And instead, what we're getting from the Biden administration and quite frankly from some of our legislators from the Republican Party is reckless."
Kathy Barnette is the leader that Pennsylvania needs in D.C. For too long, the Republican Party has made the wrong choice in who we send to represent us. Now we have the chance to elect a true leader and defender of our values.

name: Laura Neuman
subject: Will you join me in protecting the right to choose in Maryland?
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43205900/336180785/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmRhNDc5OC0yN2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7z6vx0TemdxzHY9vERs5-OdGodpJK-w8GwCP8d2RSg=)

| | _Content Warning: My story might be triggering for some folks, so if you want to skip directly to my website to learn about my platform and the issues I care about, click**[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43205901/336180788/1714714663?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmRhNDc5OC0yN2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7z6vx0TemdxzHY9vERs5-OdGodpJK-w8GwCP8d2RSg=&emci=72cf3cc5-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bbda4798-27a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8520911)**_ Peter, After I was raped, no one believed me. Not the police. Not even my own mother. I struggled to access basic medical care, and I’m not sure what help I would have qualified for if I had needed an abortion. It’s a dangerous slope to set qualifications for when we can and cannot control our own bodies. That’s why it’s critical that we enshrine protections into our state Constitution. That way, the right to an abortion will remain intact – no matter what. But it’s not enough for abortions to be legal – they also need to be accessible. **That’s why I support passing a constitutional amendment to further protect the right to choose in Maryland in the event that _Roe_ is overturned or Republicans attempt to repeal the current abortion protections in state law.** **[Will you join me in calling on Maryland’s Legislature to introduce a ballot initiative for a constitutional amendment to protect a person’s right to choose by adding your name to my petition today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43205903/336180790/1155000609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmRhNDc5OC0yN2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7z6vx0TemdxzHY9vERs5-OdGodpJK-w8GwCP8d2RSg=&emci=72cf3cc5-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bbda4798-27a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8520911)** | | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43205904/336180793/1155000609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmRhNDc5OC0yN2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7z6vx0TemdxzHY9vERs5-OdGodpJK-w8GwCP8d2RSg=&emci=72cf3cc5-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bbda4798-27a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8520911)
---
I believe we have a responsibility to protect the right to choose, but we can’t rely on the Supreme Court to defend _Roe v. Wade._
Emboldened by their conservative majority on the Supreme Court, Republicans are waging an all out war on reproductive rights. Now more than ever, it’s up to us to enshrine that right into our state laws.
With reproductive health care access under attack across the entire nation, I’m asking if you will take a stand by **[joining me in calling on Maryland’s Legislature to introduce a ballot initiative for a constitutional amendment to protect a person’s right to choose.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43205907/336180794/1155000609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmRhNDc5OC0yN2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y7z6vx0TemdxzHY9vERs5-OdGodpJK-w8GwCP8d2RSg=&emci=72cf3cc5-2f89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bbda4798-27a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8520911)**

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Did you see the news? Geoff has announced a running mate!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
I'm delighted to let you know that I have selected Leah (Cole) Allen of Danvers to be my running mate. Leah declared her intention to run as a Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor earlier today. We have endorsed each other's candidacies, and we will be running together as a ticket.
---
|
---
| |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MSUKkJ_CEPfZYcLde-jQglsgLG3ME5KK661-WBcDkOoK2qEkFCeZWIMjj7v2BgPFoqBd-O009O2T8jOY1JZW0nUmqAS6KH6fc6c-163Jh6EC6BLIvj47UtTpMcittfx_SOVdVYn744bffz2kNHwiW9cpMNYKqI8YCfpdGgzPB5uEimbvZQ_DyaU5SIhrEOka7KoX_oBdrmipY_Vf8gn_-S6zvDdzUINjOZYLa9MJrOGMaHQkIWdOESfALBacNpl7oOWEKL5rs49lkvBGyBjOrA==&c=dXSprMvgX-E-JVmSVQT8A-0f-fsCg-_N0pFXzo6-I61IFaG-fGI1jg==&ch=_Xt7LnVjXpPtMkF4KpSvlyu8u3XjlRWhYhM5KKC0zh3juk9SHVAlXQ==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Leah and I share a strong desire to make Massachusetts a better place to live. We're both committed to individual liberty and a state government that is more accountable to the people - and we've both got the experience to back that up.
---
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MSUKkJ_CEPfZYcLde-jQglsgLG3ME5KK661-WBcDkOoK2qEkFCeZWIMjj7v2BgPFOn4x4Mz0FFbA5IjJaS6YGiGVxNMyUvOiBs0Q4bPNOEv1QSRxk4xe2-GSvYprAhA1dgMUsqXc_ddULPRh607chg==&c=dXSprMvgX-E-JVmSVQT8A-0f-fsCg-_N0pFXzo6-I61IFaG-fGI1jg==&ch=_Xt7LnVjXpPtMkF4KpSvlyu8u3XjlRWhYhM5KKC0zh3juk9SHVAlXQ==)
---
| | [Visit Leah's Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MSUKkJ_CEPfZYcLde-jQglsgLG3ME5KK661-WBcDkOoK2qEkFCeZWIMjj7v2BgPFDqbzEyJvlkgdt97tnjPkY0uncTFaEqDkNNXrrg1XuwxILzFqCRmngTVVdCVJrttYHnFrlJ0kTOoSY9-5Vdh9-Q==&c=dXSprMvgX-E-JVmSVQT8A-0f-fsCg-_N0pFXzo6-I61IFaG-fGI1jg==&ch=_Xt7LnVjXpPtMkF4KpSvlyu8u3XjlRWhYhM5KKC0zh3juk9SHVAlXQ==)
---
| | [Leah's Facebook Page](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MSUKkJ_CEPfZYcLde-jQglsgLG3ME5KK661-WBcDkOoK2qEkFCeZWIMjj7v2BgPF-av87vx8i5StrWFXZcfe7QlAQlkhmpBZYAwMrBalKZtnyn5vlAYe9_6vxIWxLVmgOfqArw7-VL9664IHTODWh8f2OhL5cy-HUjKXXCTLSSc=&c=dXSprMvgX-E-JVmSVQT8A-0f-fsCg-_N0pFXzo6-I61IFaG-fGI1jg==&ch=_Xt7LnVjXpPtMkF4KpSvlyu8u3XjlRWhYhM5KKC0zh3juk9SHVAlXQ==)
---
|
---
| Many will remember that Leah, who previously served in the Legislature, was part of our team back in 2014 when we campaigned against automatic increases in the state gas tax tied to the rate of inflation.
We worked well together in support of conservative principles to govern our state back then, and I believe we'll work well as a team once again as Governor and Lieutenant Governor. I am proud to run with Leah as a team.
Leading up to the Mass GOP Convention on May 21, Leah and I will be connecting with voters across our state every day. We'll be having a conversation with you, and we'll be seeking to demonstrate why we are not only the best candidates to campaign against progressive, liberal policies this fall on behalf of the Republican party, but also the most capable people to lead our state forward once elected to office.
We intend to earn your vote and to serve you with pride and integrity.
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | [Click Here to Make a Donation to Geoff's Campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MSUKkJ_CEPfZYcLde-jQglsgLG3ME5KK661-WBcDkOoK2qEkFCeZWIOD0xF1o-JH2amb7lohtLr4SCSjfpq7amYYaN9emMUauFfOLKroAZmsU14F-Tc931DmRMDzpxZSSnrDB82n2rcRb0E3xxhAo2f2tqaaxCzSlieAe0mFk2N6bnxSG6p_Ww==&c=dXSprMvgX-E-JVmSVQT8A-0f-fsCg-_N0pFXzo6-I61IFaG-fGI1jg==&ch=_Xt7LnVjXpPtMkF4KpSvlyu8u3XjlRWhYhM5KKC0zh3juk9SHVAlXQ==)
---
|
---
| Thank you for your support!
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---

name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/c921eeea8f904319c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, Election Day is less than 10 weeks away! We’re officially in the homestretch, every single day counts, and the momentum we’re building wouldn’t be possible without your support. We’re also less than two weeks away from our end of quarter fundraising deadline. This is the final quarterly report before the primary, and it will be viewed as a test of momentum. [**If you haven’t contributed yet, I hope you’ll do so right now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/4732cbf1170641f6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# _**Absentee Ballots**_
---
|
---
Georgia Republicans — you can now request your absentee ballots! We’re counting on a B.I.G. turnout to make the difference in this primary election, and absentee ballots are going to be a major part of that. [**Find out how to request yours here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/1cb66619c7b2a282c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# _**Statewide Tour Kickoff!**_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/4f17226cf872ea49c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
On March 29th, we’re kicking off our statewide tour! Join us at the Jackson County Agriculture Center and help us start the tour with a bang. [**Claim your free tickets here if you haven’t already — and please share the details with your networks!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/4486cbc91098f2e5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_St. Patrick's Day_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/b5e93205f3cb0491c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Team ’22 celebrated St. Patrick’s Day with green shirts, green stickers, and our green yard signs! If you haven’t claimed your signs yet, I hope you’ll do so now by using this link. And please share this page with anyone you know who wants a sign but doesn’t have one yet.
---
---
# _**Trusted Experience**_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/dd8304104d43b087c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I’ve long said that it’s going to take trusted experience to not only defeat Raphael Warnock, but to deliver for Georgia in the U.S. Senate. I’ll put my record against anyone running in this race, and over the last several days we’ve highlighted some of these accomplishments on our social media. I hope you’ll share each of these post, linked below, with your own networks. [**Sued Joe Biden and won.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/f44b999abeaa6da0c3d6b838967d376c/37793) [**More Georgia Grown products in local school systems.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/4b16f78690f613c2c3d6b838967d376c/37793) [**#1 food safety division in the country.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/748dfafa6b3d942cc3d6b838967d376c/37793) [**Taking on the Swamp.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/a25621022a034940c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# _**515 BBQ**_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/dacd4f1b10778c97c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I want to thank everyone who planned, volunteered at, and attended our recent 515 BBQ in Tate! We had a B.I.G. crowd at this event and it wouldn’t be possible without our Team ’22 supporters!
---
---
# _**On The Trail**_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/caaf9fabc299e7f5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
While Herschel Walker hides from debates or tough questions, and keeps his campaign events secretive, we’re out on the trail every single day. We’re hearing what’s on Georgians’ hearts, answering their questions, and earning their support one vote at a time.
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/d8711781650666ddc3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/56808d6fffd8c01ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/8a45812a395218f8c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! As I mentioned at the start of this week’s email, the end of the fundraising quarter is rapidly approaching. Our fundraising number for this quarter will not only be viewed as a sign of our momentum, it’ll also have a real impact on our advertising budget for the final two months of the campaign. [**Our need is great, and if you haven’t contributed yet I hope you’ll do so right now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/d32d4ca07c67fb63c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/ce3140ccd09a1985c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/5e87fcab963ff58ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/73f7199e313da2fdc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b8c4268a36433ecf/38acf89584d1e5cac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=b8c4268a36433ecf&d=d2a4f1d152c0f3ebc3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=b8c4268a36433ecf).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---
clean_body: | | | Friend, Election Day is less than 10 weeks away! We’re officially in the homestretch, every single day counts, and the momentum we’re building wouldn’t be possible without your support. We’re also less than two weeks away from our end of quarter fundraising deadline. This is the final quarterly report before the primary, and it will be viewed as a test of momentum. Absentee Ballots | Georgia Republicans — you can now request your absentee ballots! We’re counting on a B.I.G. turnout to make the difference in this primary election, and absentee ballots are going to be a major part of that. Statewide Tour Kickoff! On March 29th, we’re kicking off our statewide tour! Join us at the Jackson County Agriculture Center and help us start the tour with a bang. St. Patrick's Day Team ’22 celebrated St. Patrick’s Day with green shirts, green stickers, and our green yard signs! If you haven’t claimed your signs yet, I hope you’ll do so now by using this link. And please share this page with anyone you know who wants a sign but doesn’t have one yet. Trusted Experience I’ve long said that it’s going to take trusted experience to not only defeat Raphael Warnock, but to deliver for Georgia in the U.S. Senate. I’ll put my record against anyone running in this race, and over the last several days we’ve highlighted some of these accomplishments on our social media. I hope you’ll share each of these post, linked below, with your own networks. 515 BBQ I want to thank everyone who planned, volunteered at, and attended our recent 515 BBQ in Tate! We had a B.I.G. crowd at this event and it wouldn’t be possible without our Team ’22 supporters! On The Trail While Herschel Walker hides from debates or tough questions, and keeps his campaign events secretive, we’re out on the trail every single day. We’re hearing what’s on Georgians’ hearts, answering their questions, and earning their support one vote at a time. One More Thing Please follow our campaign's , , and pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! As I mentioned at the start of this week’s email, the end of the fundraising quarter is rapidly approaching. Our fundraising number for this quarter will not only be viewed as a sign of our momentum, it’ll also have a real impact on our advertising budget for the final two months of the campaign. Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support! Gary Black | | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, .

name: Joy Thomas Moore
subject: Proud
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210276/336190287/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321mom_jtm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWEyZTNkZC0yYmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysSrl98nUCP4TfaQa7N4_MRoZsirrI4lNoZi6RMwt-w=)
---
Hello there, this is Wes’ mom, Joy. As you know, my son is running for Governor of Maryland, and he has worked so incredibly hard to get to this point, changing lives for the better along the way. Growing up, Wes could be a handful at times but I always knew he had a big heart. We faced challenges as a family after losing my husband so suddenly when Wes was only three, but I always pressed him on the importance of a good education, and eventually sent him to military school to set him on a positive path in life. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210277/336190288/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321mom_jtm_60da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWEyZTNkZC0yYmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysSrl98nUCP4TfaQa7N4_MRoZsirrI4lNoZi6RMwt-w=)
---
He’s gone on to make me proud over and over again, serving his country in Afghanistan as an Officer in the U.S. Army, becoming a Rhodes Scholar, starting his small business, and leading one of the country’s largest poverty-fighting organizations. Plus, he’s a loving husband and father, the two most important jobs he’s ever had.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210278/336190289/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321mom_jtm_60da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWEyZTNkZC0yYmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysSrl98nUCP4TfaQa7N4_MRoZsirrI4lNoZi6RMwt-w=)
---
It brings a smile to my face and warmth to my heart knowing that my son is driven by his desire to help others, and I can think of no better person to lead our state forward.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210279/336190290/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321mom_jtm_60da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWEyZTNkZC0yYmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysSrl98nUCP4TfaQa7N4_MRoZsirrI4lNoZi6RMwt-w=)
---
**[Wes’ team tells me he’s facing a big deadline at the end of the month, so I wanted to reach out personally and ask if you’ll support my son and his movement to create an even better Maryland by making a donation to his campaign today? Anything helps!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210280/336190291/492827243?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321mom_jtm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWEyZTNkZC0yYmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ysSrl98nUCP4TfaQa7N4_MRoZsirrI4lNoZi6RMwt-w=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
