As you know, my son is running for Governor of Maryland, and he has worked so incredibly hard to get to this point, changing lives for the better along the way. Growing up, Wes could be a handful at times but I always knew he had a big heart. We faced challenges as a family after losing my husband so suddenly when Wes was only three, but I always pressed him on the importance of a good education, and eventually sent him to military school to set him on a positive path in life. | = He’s gone on to make me proud over and over again, serving his country in Afghanistan as an Officer in the U.S. Army, becoming a Rhodes Scholar, starting his small business, and leading one of the country’s largest poverty-fighting organizations. Plus, he’s a loving husband and father, the two most important jobs he’s ever had. = It brings a smile to my face and warmth to my heart knowing that my son is driven by his desire to help others, and I can think of no better person to lead our state forward. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for anything you can do, big or small, to help elect my son the next Governor of Maryland. I know he’ll make me and every Marylander proud. Best, Joy Thomas Moore | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Let us take just a moment to explain why this race matters.
| | |
---
**This is important — a poll shows Maggie Hassan statistically tied with her GOP opponent in this must-win race. That's why Maggie Hassan is reaching out: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210320/336190395/-1829049351?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk780-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODEyYzljOC0yYmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9nFUSFydOQYvylDsog66qSftEcWcCkjyO3Xkypkc2E=)

subject: The GOP is attacking LGBTQ+ people EVERYWHERE. We can’t let it happen here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Stop the hate. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43192798/336132247/823540626?refcode=ea.cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM5NTA3NC0wZWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhSUpNjKEfFTwFEM9VCWQjqkd7FNXwKQ0UMtEmwq7eQ=&emci=4698d8b1-c8a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
| **From North Carolina’s “Bathroom Bill” — which Roy Cooper repealed — to anti-LGBTQ+ measures currently passing in southern states, Republicans have long sought to roll back LGBTQ+ rights.** **[Rush a donation to help Roy DEFEND LGBTQ+ North Carolinians by BLOCKING a GOP supermajority in Raleigh>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43192805/336132254/435245919?refcode=ea.cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM5NTA3NC0wZWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhSUpNjKEfFTwFEM9VCWQjqkd7FNXwKQ0UMtEmwq7eQ=)** **[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43192808/336132261/435245919?refcode=ea.cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM5NTA3NC0wZWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhSUpNjKEfFTwFEM9VCWQjqkd7FNXwKQ0UMtEmwq7eQ=)**
---
Peter,
Radical Republicans across the country have long been bent on silencing the voices of people who aren’t _just like them._
Down in Texas, the Republican government is attacking trans kids and their parents — they’ve determined that providing gender-affirming care for kids is “child abuse.” To be clear, gender-affirming care is essential to allowing trans children to thrive.
In Florida, the GOP’s radical “Don’t Say Gay” bill would prevent teachers and students from discussing issues at all related to LGBTQ+ rights under the guise that they’re “not age-appropriate.” That means students who are members of the LGBTQ+ community or care about people who are would not be able to be their true selves in school.
We know this kind of discriminatory legislation all too well here in North Carolina, where the Republican-led legislature’s “Bathroom Bill,” passed in 2016, prohibited trans people from using public facilities corresponding with their gender identity and prevented communities from enacting anti-discrimination measures.
_Peter, LGBTQ+ people are WELCOME in North Carolina, and we must do everything possible to protect them._
**But if NC Republicans gain a veto-proof majority in the legislature this November, we can expect that they’ll try once again to codify discrimination in our state. We MUST prevent that possibility.**
[**Roy Cooper is working hard to support Democrats up and down the ballot to ensure that Republicans don’t achieve a supermajority in Raleigh. Rush a donation of any size to help >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43192811/336132264/435245919?refcode=ea.cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.cd395074-0ea9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM5NTA3NC0wZWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhSUpNjKEfFTwFEM9VCWQjqkd7FNXwKQ0UMtEmwq7eQ=)

body:
We hope you’ll join our team by following along on social media to stay up to date with our announcements, events, and more.

| _You are receiving this email because of your past support for Virginia Democrats. Andy is running against one of Marjorie Taylor Greene’s top allies, Bob Good, in Virginia’s 5th District. As Andy has strived to make a difference after his daughter was murdered on live television, Bob Good has spread extremist conspiracy theories and misinformation. Together we can defeat Bob Good and restore honor and integrity to this district. Andy Parker

name: Amanda
subject: I'll go toe-to-toe with "the Squad" in English and Farsi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress
body:
My family didn't immigrate here to watch leftists destroy our nation. | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=de442421318042ff9f9960f682e36809&_e=pLgQ9uiVpGEZ_KKXIO-Cfr5bOEwcWiyGpwSJYxNp72472NX7VUgsqsce30kpawkdDUXARuipFrRI23WnqoEtX7lBnh8vfsfGF9zKmjVKW4bTDYiW7MbbiI-lNj0aMobBJobZhVUBREUDpjeBBFecGr4HWdsX9puyQDzE91R8qh_Dp9dVB0b1PHhCbqJEQqDJAeRXt5GfbmOqgwKyunF-blhOfXzeWVlTmSSV8Hb3czwo1S4c_nnSTZ0r-ShAKWWdtuq8LDBKSv55Cgl-fR5x7Wii95BLI6BZ9etBA0BAgutj_OuOnenqqtexnV19Ul98GNpatpLJ0srA8-sG38CYq88ztg8oWHVpI-eD6b2RENQjbMhJf7AxEA8VvHkJU_BEj595Sl3v_y4lzv6bHj4dN3NbI-7B97c1MMhEbx4rpL0%3D)
---
Peter -

My family and I fled Iran when I was an infant. We legally immigrated to the United States and fought hard to acheive the American Dream.

It pains me when I see members of _"The Squad"_ bash America, force their brand of Socialism on us, and call anyone who disagrees with them _"racists."_

As a Christian and a LEGAL immigrant, I know that American ideals are worth upholding, our economic system is worth protecting, and silencing your opposition is the first step in a slippery slope towards fascism.

[** STOP THE SQUAD** ](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=de442421318042ff9f9960f682e36809&_e=pLgQ9uiVpGEZ_KKXIO-Cfr5bOEwcWiyGpwSJYxNp72472NX7VUgsqsce30kpawkdDUXARuipFrRI23WnqoEtX7lBnh8vfsfGF9zKmjVKW4bTDYiW7MbbiI-lNj0aMobBJobZhVUBREUDpjeBBFecGr4HWdsX9puyQDzE91R8qh_Dp9dVB0b1PHhCbqJEQqDJAeRXt5GfbmOqgwKyunF-briv2lgSsbc8XB2Mg8p5YZcdeb5qK9_FXnBm4WyZSMhz43eHckxdFoJApCuhA-UcoXIzPP9wp-P85dxOwJy2GyOTb_LlYmPicWCM4kTMVsDHUlVdkEX5mE0LjbopoXYZe1vTWrIK9wjJUu4AqBcmEsVjDsqYFXiItbOEa5Ukqdf0BpdYKj45VMCvUoGr9bossiQAeVh7W8Du0VG9rZhAPYw%3D)
I will go toe-to-toe with the Squad when I'm elected. **I will combat their anti-American rhetoric with my own story about being a refugee and escaping a religious dictator’s regime. About how my mother worked two jobs while my father studied to become a surgeon, and how I worked hard and graduated from law school, then used my education to protect and defend our nation against foreign and domestic enemies.**

And I can fight back in English and Farsi. _As of today, no other Republican can say the same._

I'm an immigrant, true conservative Republican candidate for Congress here in Florida. _My Republican opponents can't say that either._

The RINO I'm running against was an _"avid"_ two-time Obama supporter. There's no saying who she'll side with when the pressure is on in the Capitol.

Right now, the future of our nation is literally at stake, and Florida can't risk sending a weak flip-flopping RINO to Washington, D.C.

[** PROTECT FLORIDA FROM RINOS** ](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=de442421318042ff9f9960f682e36809&_e=pLgQ9uiVpGEZ_KKXIO-Cfr5bOEwcWiyGpwSJYxNp72472NX7VUgsqsce30kpawkdDUXARuipFrRI23WnqoEtX7lBnh8vfsfGF9zKmjVKW4bTDYiW7MbbiI-lNj0aMobBJobZhVUBREUDpjeBBFecGr4HWdsX9puyQDzE91R8qh_Dp9dVB0b1PHhCbqJEQqDJAeRXt5GfbmOqgwKyunF-bjkaDV_nN4BQn7ITJ1nO4KijOqXG8vsad82Bzt23kri2EufOUzlJK4TRwaeC2N0B_sFC1AzJ6oiBkqeG2FZqIU0zdUCF_KGgYDCrBrms7-oFhNV0jHjtaE_V1hkbpJooKthTZ6yuQ4lHDQSZZqfi1rxi85WXpwVx14ObSnqdYUrQV2kT0uaEr9QkZ2YoxeyaQ5IDlfMfiA64adbo_EKquxA%3D)
I have fought for this American dream since the day my family immigrated. I will not stand by and let the radical-Leftist agenda destroy it.

[**If you are with me, let me know by standing up and fighting alongside me today. Please, pitch in $25, $50 or even $100 right now to help me win.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=de442421318042ff9f9960f682e36809&_e=pLgQ9uiVpGEZ_KKXIO-Cfr5bOEwcWiyGpwSJYxNp72472NX7VUgsqsce30kpawkdDUXARuipFrRI23WnqoEtX7lBnh8vfsfGF9zKmjVKW4bTDYiW7MbbiI-lNj0aMobBJobZhVUBREUDpjeBBFecGr4HWdsX9puyQDzE91R8qh_Dp9dVB0b1PHhCbqJEQqDJAeRXt5GfbmOqgwKyunF-bsUq6vM-B3oFK-b1LPAacFy04lx_RxpGRlujClvyb9u6MceQQypcrVh6xHw53rvb0HsJNXIs5rC-UTEvDiKtYW9zysvmUC-fDjSmr7YMWWjhuAHw4NmDyDQWHhGhVgLYML5iNHGVkgjixyXyFfuJto5Rezc1FyWDSleHbUjDnN4JofaQVPYmYoCsjYbFP9lC00-SBFFravaFGYG_M5LnI4U%3D)

Thank you,

name: Ashley Ward
subject: Weekly Update: Updates from the Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://ashleywardforcongress.com/ [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/]
Weekly Updates
A MESSAGE FROM ASHLEY
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Hayride.jpg] Over the last 2 decades, my husband and I have claimed over thousands of dollars per year on our taxes for out-of-pocket medical expenses. One of our children has chronic health issues. If this sounds like a crazy amount of money, remember, we have health insurance! But what does a parent do? Refuse to pay for lifesaving medical care for their child? No. You don’t. You figure out how to buy fewer groceries. You and your
spouse work extra jobs. Going out to eat becomes a rare treat for your family because even that $50 matters. And we were lucky. We could work those extra jobs. When the insurance companies refused payment, I would spend hours on the phone in dispute over whether they would pay for lifesaving medication, like her asthma inhalers.
I would like to think that our experience is the exception. But sadly, it is not. I often think of what we could have done with all that money each year, which often equated to more than $1000 per month in out-of-pocket medical expenses. Maybe we could have saved for our children’s college, so we wouldn’t now have student loan debt for them. Maybe we would have incurred less credit card debt because we could pay out of pocket for automobile repairs when they were needed. Then I think about how our situation is magnified millions of times in millions of households across the U.S.
The ripple effect of medical debt means that households that have it, take on more debt. They operate in survival mode. All the time. Then there is the frustration of reading articles about how Americans don’t have enough money in savings, insinuating that Americans who don’t have a savings account are wasteful or irresponsible. Rather than shaming American families for not having a savings account, how about we take meaningful action to eliminate one of the reasons many don’t – the lack of affordable healthcare.
It is true that climate change is my profession, but the lack of affordable healthcare has a large impact on my life. To me, it is personal. I know it is for many of you, too. We need more people with practical, real life experience in Congress so the healthcare debate isn’t a political one, but a personal one.
SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN
As early voting approaches, now is the time for the campaign to purchase outreach materials! Nearly 90% of my campaign budget goes to outreach. This means that your donation goes directly toward gaining votes. In order to reach voters in all FIVE counties of the district, we must have a robust outreach strategy.
Any donation you can give helps us reach that goal! Please consider donating today to help our campaign purchase the materials we need to reach voters!
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]
OUT AND ABOUT

It was exciting to see so many Ashley Ward for Congress signs and hear the cheers from the audience! Thank you to all who turned out to support Ashley!

Sunday, April 10th

Join us as we welcome 4th Congressional District Candidate Ashley Ward to Person County on April 10th! The location will be announced closer to the event time. Everyone, regardless of party affiliation, is encouraged to join us.
Folks will get to hear from Ashley herself - she'll share her story, vision for the 4th District, and why she's running for Congress. Folks can ask questions and connect with her directly. Then, the campaign will share how everyone can get involved!

subject: New OpEd: Our vote in Washington must match our values
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COZZENS FOR CONGRESS]( "PAID FOR BY COZZENS FOR CONGRESS")
body:
NEW HAMPSHIRE deserves a representative in Washington who lives our “603” values | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/46ca253ce8cd/new-opedour-vote-in-washington-must-match-our-values?e=d96869e887)
---
| |
---
| |
# Jeff Cozzens: Our vote in Washington must match our values
[Union Leader 3/18/22](https://jeffcozzens.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6bcab25df2dbb2f241da1b7c2&id=27390a1dda&e=d96869e887)
---
| NEW HAMPSHIRE deserves a representative in Washington who lives our “603” values, knows what it means to work for a living, and has the experience required to safeguard our freedoms, economy, and national security. Granite Staters deserve servants in Congress, not career politicians. My name is Jeff Cozzens, and I am running for the U.S. House of Representatives in New Hampshire’s 2nd District to restore Granite Staters’ voices in Congress. In the decade following the Sept.. 11 attacks I worked as a national security professional. I advised American diplomats, warriors and law enforcement agencies on terrorist threats from Al-Qaeda and other terrorist networks. I worked with some of the bravest men and women in the world, helping them safeguard our country and take the fight to those who intend us harm.

I have also built a successful family business from scratch in the North Country. Together with my brothers and best friend, we invested everything we had into our American Dream: building a world-class brewery in Littleton. Through many days and nights of working every job in our business, we grew Schilling Beer Co. into one of the best breweries of its kind in the world, and nearly a decade later, into a business supporting more than 70 families. These two very different experiences have provided me a unique perspective on the challenges facing our country, many of which can be reduced to this: there is a group of elitist career politicians in Washington, D.C., who think they know better than Granite Staters. They want to tell us how to run our businesses, raise our families, and live our lives. These same politicians have also been behind some of the most abject U.S. foreign policy failures of the last 50 years. I am a political outsider and have never campaigned for public office. However, I resigned as CEO of Schilling in October 2021 to run for Congress because I am convinced that Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Ann Kuster are going to mortgage the futures of our children and grandchildren if we allow them. At every turn, they have pushed Big Government into our classrooms, living rooms, and small businesses at the expense of our freedoms and financial wellbeing. They have failed New Hampshire’s families by chasing an outrageous tax-and-spend agenda instead of addressing historic levels of inflation and a supply chain crisis that punishes Main Street businesses and consumers alike. Further, Pelosi and Kuster’s policies have insulted millions of American immigrants who sacrificed so much in pursuit of the American Dream and entered the United States in a lawful, orderly manner. They have done so by pushing taxpayer-funded payouts and benefits to illegal aliens rather than enforcing established immigration laws and supporting the brave men and women working in law enforcement. This has sparked an historic crisis along our southern border that is unacceptable to any nation that values its sovereignty and the rule of law. Deferring to the radical left wing of the Democratic Party, the Biden administration and its Congressional backers have surrendered America’s energy independence to OPEC and authoritarian regimes around the world, compromising our national security and spiking energy costs. Granite Staters feel this pinch every time they fill up at the pump or pay a heating bill. They have also maligned American credibility by supporting a chaotic and unprincipled withdrawal from Afghanistan, prompting allies and adversaries alike to question our resolve—in full view of an expansionist Russia, and more concerning yet, China. I stand for the protection and preservation of our Constitutional freedoms. I stand for prosperity, and will fight federal red tape and taxation to keep Granite Staters’ hard-earned money where it belongs: right here with families and small businesses in New Hampshire and away from frivolous D.C. politicians. I stand for a foreign policy that puts our country first, that equips our military to meet strategic threats, and that removes the dangerous leverage currently held by oil-rich nations.

New Hampshire’s families deserve a Congressman who will fight for New Hampshire values in Congress, and who wakes up every morning ready to serve them, not special interests or corporations. I look forward to earning your trust and support.
---

name: Team Cammack
subject: Are you Tired of Tyranny?
body:
Are you sick and tired of the leftist tyranny in America?
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018hjWqBJskLoxA3WCzPOo1nDF7Jv0j7eKCk5XMfXY_3dQSQYRT06O_WvsmTC28T6ECiMgcYYwZK55ULP5bj8XinuAJskKplUj6tmVQeQbkl9IhUDR2fN63vows9ux6FWIDrcD-KS3auL98dTjq-zuFyoUASKyFk57VRhgRYTqOIorhqOCVkInoUghsTq0sZtSxz9Cxb9hnlM=&c=m8QIGnVg9LfpY_GWsSgZtB3m0Pix_6oWYVOIQ6QQlpOORrVUD9u4qA==&ch=rumXXTeoL1e9nP_nDCaOG2f3j6KOCeIYrl7Y4CmZhMWjWedV6M7gNw==)
---
| Friend,
Are you sick and tired of the leftist tyranny in America?
We sure are. Americans across the country have been burdened by the Far-Left agenda since Biden sleepwalked his way into the Oval Office. Unconstitutional mandates, wide-open borders, sky-rocketing gas prices, violent crime, and weak foreign policy have put our country in serious danger.
Working Americans are struggling to make it by. You would think Biden would take the current state of America more seriously, but he doesn't. After all, he's more preoccupied with protecting his inner circle of leftist bureaucrats than helping the American people.
---

name: Team Vanuch
subject: Crystal Vanuch First to Officially File to Run for Congress in Virginia's 7th Congressional District
body:
| | | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/b5486f0b2f8adbe5/6d939dde22135c85c3d6b838967d376c/40203)
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 21, 2022Contact: Info@CrystalVanuch.com
---
| | **Crystal Vanuch First to Officially File to Run for Congress****in Virginia's 7th Congressional District** **Stafford, VA** – Today, Crystal Vanuch was first to submit the required paperwork and petitions to qualify for the June 21st Republican primary in Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She was accompanied by her proud parents, Jim and Mary. Crystal released the following statement after she successfully submitted her paperwork to the 7th District Chairman: "First, I'd like to thank all our volunteers who spent countless hours collecting signatures on behalf of my campaign. This wouldn't have been possible without your support and dedication. I was born and raised in the 7th district, I live in the district, and I am running for Congress because we need a new leader and conservative fighter who will stand up to President Biden and Abigail Spanberger and stop the extreme liberal agenda and fight for YOU! Under President Biden's leadership, we've experienced record high inflation and gas prices, a crisis at the southern border, and an attack on our constitutional rights. Unsurprisingly, Spanberger has voted with Biden and the far left 100% of the time. We need to change course now and preserve the America we love for future generations. As a Stafford County Supervisor, I've led on big issues like stopping CRT, fully funding law enforcement, and protecting our Second Amendment rights. I am not afraid of a challenge. This November, I will hold Abigail Spanberger accountable for her failed record and blind loyalty to the far left. I am the only true conservative that can beat Spanberger, flip this seat red, and help Republicans take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi."
---

name: American Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9750%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=YuOiMXyAaarRb2CXtzJy%2bQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26057%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iEvfvBz%2fBJX2gU2OVgm9%2fQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-7N9KfYVFfEw)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-F_Bj8qSpx-Xkg)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-VMAA)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---

gy-crisis-rbp-20220318-a&utm_agency=PG Friends,

you’re feeling the effects of Biden’s energy crisis.

Gas prices have
hit an all-time high. And in some areas, people are paying $5 or $6 per
gallon to fill up their tanks.

It didn’t have to be this way,
Friends. Just a few years ago, we were on our way to energy
independence, and gas prices were staying relatively low. But Joe Biden
changed all that by canceling the Keystone XL Pipeline and implementing
radical, anti-energy policies.

Now, the American people are
literally paying the price. Dependence on foreign oil doesn’t just
affect gas prices. It also increases inflation, slows down job growth,
and damages our national security.

That’s why Nate is 100% committed
to standing up to Biden’s destructive agenda and fighting for energy
independence in Congress.

We have a lot of work to do before Election Day – and I'm relying on this grassroots team to help me shape my strategy to expand our Democratic Senate majority.

name: Chairman Jim Banks
subject: This is bad for our country
body:

| | | | |
---
| | Fellow Conservative,

**Joe Biden is in deep water**. Official ICE reports have shown a sharp drop in arrests and deportations since Biden-era legislation and rules went into effect.

_Now, migrants are arriving at the southern border in overwhelming numbers._ A month ago,_almost 165,000 illegal immigrants were encountered at the southern border,_ a **record number for February**.

With over 2 million illegal border crossings so far under the Biden-Harris administration, there is no time to waste in standing up to Joe Biden's failures. _Do you want to**put an end to the humanitarian crisis** at our southern border?

There's no time to waste! _**[Take a stand against Joe Biden 's failing border policies NOW:](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=133ed99a262cc5bd6dda4b159df24100d14a365955fccc6a75f51d33bbf0d0db05366e0ca0daec6ed387dd58500fc375ca0ec10fdf257d3d "Take a stand against Joe Biden’s failing border policies NOW:")**

name: Derek Marshall
subject: What it means to be grassroots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
This campaign is built on people power. What does that mean? It means we rely on individual contributions over corporate PAC money. **It means our path to victory includes mass organizing our district, instead of dumping millions into traditional political methods. **It means we invest in every voter we talk to and believe in the potential of every Democrat.
We embody what it means to be grassroots. This campaign is built from the ground-up. While I may be the one running, **I’m supported by a core base of hundreds of supporters and thousands of donors like you who make sure we keep going until we win this thing. **
**[But before I continue, let me ask you this directly–will you chip in any amount today to start a monthly contribution to my campaign? I can’t get to victory without you, and we’re getting close to our end of quarter deadline. This is the BEST way to support!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213281/336206460/1232707546?refcode=3-19&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTc2NjQ1YS0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjjbFUGh5K4YdDRNjzb7acyKN0oJare1qy2kr0Ovo6o=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213282/336206461/1232707546?refcode=3-19&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTc2NjQ1YS0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjjbFUGh5K4YdDRNjzb7acyKN0oJare1qy2kr0Ovo6o=)
This month, we’ve made some huge strides. **We’ve begun to build out our field game and invested more time into voter registration. We’ve expanded our campaign team. We’ve been featured in press stories,** like [LA Wire’s “Congressional Candidate Derek Marshall Embodies the Spirit of the High Desert.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213285/336206463/-559949055?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTc2NjQ1YS0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjjbFUGh5K4YdDRNjzb7acyKN0oJare1qy2kr0Ovo6o=&emci=c11f4192-35a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=0176645a-38a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=21617867) And every step of the way, I’ve made sure to emphasize the issues that I believe affect us most here in California’s 23rd district.
**To serve the people is to talk to the people, work with the people, and respond to the people. **That’s exactly what I’ve spent my whole month doing.
Our campaign is doing things differently. And if we need a reminder of what establishment, career politicians do, look no further than my opponent Jay Obernolte. clean_body: Peter, This campaign is built on people power. What does that mean? It means we rely on individual contributions over corporate PAC money. It means our path to victory includes mass organizing our district, instead of dumping millions into traditional political methods. It means we invest in every voter we talk to and believe in the potential of every Democrat. We embody what it means to be grassroots. This campaign is built from the ground-up. While I may be the one running, I’m supported by a core base of hundreds of supporters and thousands of donors like you who make sure we keep going until we win this thing. = = This month, we’ve made some huge strides. We’ve begun to build out our field game and invested more time into voter registration. We’ve expanded our campaign team. We’ve been featured in press stories, like And every step of the way, I’ve made sure to emphasize the issues that I believe affect us most here in California’s 23rd district. To serve the people is to talk to the people, work with the people, and respond to the people. That’s exactly what I’ve spent my whole month doing. Our campaign is doing things differently. name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: The healthcare system failed my mother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213472/336206957/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321momresend_dkj_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U5NDNhNC0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAikXrsElO4jW1-MuGD9yMuHbxzX_FNc8YLKdDRGQPY=)
---
Friend, My mom was always on top of us about our health. She was a home health nurse and would treat us like she did patients — always reminding us about the importance of eating healthy, taking our vitamins, and staying away from cigarettes. _So when she started losing weight, and her sister was diagnosed with lung cancer, I started to get nervous._ I made an appointment for her to get a chest scan, but she didn’t go. I think she was scared of what they’d find. My mom finally went to get the scan when my aunt passed away, three months after getting diagnosed. Sure enough, my mom had lung cancer. I immediately flew her out to live with me in California and get treatment at my hospital. I’d go into meetings with her team of doctors prepared with all the most recent data, determined to get her five extra years with us, but they waved us off and said she’d have just six months. _**For the first time, I was on the other side of the doctor’s desk. And it was awful.**_ My mom lost control of her legs and arms, and her brain scan came back abnormal. I told the neurologist I thought she had an autoimmune disease where the cancer tricks the body into attacking its own brain. _They dismissed my concerns, saying it was just dementia from high blood pressure — a condition common in black women._ But my mom didn’t have high blood pressure. I wheeled her to and from chemo each day because she couldn’t walk, and fed her when she couldn’t move her own hands. All while her team of doctors refused to do anything about it. They only did a brain biopsy and discovered the real problem — the autoimmune disease I’d asked about to begin with — after I threatened to sue. They gave her new medication and overnight she regained control of her body. Her chemo finished, and she’s been cancer-free ever since. Alive, and healthy. _But I was still so mad. Angry, that the system I’d dedicated my life to was failing patients like my mom._ We were supposed to be science-based, but so many decisions seemed to hinge on bias. When they say that black women receive worse care, I now know it’s true. I’m scared to think what would have happened to her if I hadn’t gone to medical school — and hadn’t had the training to know how to advocate for her. That’s when I first thought seriously about running for office. **Our country has serious issues that our elected officials are ignoring, just like those doctors ignored my mother.** _I will be your advocate in Congress, just like I was for my mother and continue to be for my patients._ From voting rights to stopping the spread of COVID, we deserve a representative who brings a sense of urgency to the problems facing American families. **[If you’re ready to elect a representative who will bring a sense of urgency for change to Congress, will you pitch in $10, $25, or $50 to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213473/336206958/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321momresend_dkj_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U5NDNhNC0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAikXrsElO4jW1-MuGD9yMuHbxzX_FNc8YLKdDRGQPY=)** | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213474/336206959/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321momresend_dkj_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2U5NDNhNC0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OAikXrsElO4jW1-MuGD9yMuHbxzX_FNc8YLKdDRGQPY=)
---

Dr. Kermit Jones

When they say that black women receive worse care, I now know it’s true. I’m scared to think what would have happened to her if I hadn’t gone to medical school — and hadn’t had the training to know how to advocate for her. That’s when I first thought seriously about running for office. Our country has serious issues that our elected officials are ignoring, just like those doctors ignored my mother. I will be your advocate in Congress, just like I was for my mother and continue to be for my patients. From voting rights to stopping the spread of COVID, we deserve a representative who brings a sense of urgency to the problems facing American families. = | = Thank you for your support, Dr. Kermit Jones | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California’s 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. | Peter,

Family has always been one of the most important things in my life. My children were the main inspiration for starting my career in public service on the Chapel Hill-Carrboro City Schools Board.

Through this role, I witnessed the need for ALL children to have a champion looking out for them and their future. **Throughout the years, my roles have changed but my conviction to uplift our community and ensure a brighter future for our children remains the same.**

[_**If you share this conviction, would you please consider making a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213959/336209270/2087247564?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220321-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2Y5Zjg2YS0zOWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2kLuk9iJSdamrL6u9aBvWMzsic0KYCkvVXPogYXK4TI=)

I believe firmly that equitable, quality education is one of the most invaluable resources we can give our children to set them up for success in life. However, for too many in our community, there are barriers to accessing a quality education. Our communities suffer from a lack of investment in public education and the rising costs of higher education.

If elected to Congress, it will be my top priority to improve resources for public schools and make public colleges and universities debt-free. [_**But first, I need your help getting there. So, please, could you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can to my campaign? As a former U.S. Army Captain, I know that America’s heroes deserve better than this. . I cannot imagine being denied my service because I refuse to put a chemical in my body, Peter. And the worst part is service members who dedicated their LIVES to our country are being denied their benefits because they won’t get the jab. As a veteran and a proud American, I am absolutely disgusted, and I know you are too. The AZ GOP has once again proven themselves relentless in their fight to undermine our free and fair election system.

It's going to take all of us working together to keep someone in this seat who will fight to defend our democracy, defend abortion rights, and ensure clean, reliable water for generations to come.

**That someone is Kirsten Engel.**

But if we don't build the resources to get her to Congress now, we could face severe setbacks in the near future.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Liberty and Tuttle Twins in Ukraine
body:
All I see on the news now is how Ukraine and Russia are being thrown into turmoil. No matter where you stand on the conflict in
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7smrha79q3ddo7eurr3o3irkudjik25duv0dnto_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbchk6dpnas74mhob8pdjciq6adjleco67c3mmdrbfdb2chirfd9gm5gb6o3jm3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm5ddkcurm4phkcspm8dtgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8j18achlantgoornnpfs185ene0cssti01gkt58_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Hello Friend,

All I see on the news now is how Ukraine and Russia are being thrown into turmoil.

No matter where you stand on the conflict in Ukraine, I think we can both agree that educating the next generation on economics, entrepreneurship, personal responsibility, and the principles of a free and _peaceful_ society is the best way to make sure this doesn't happen again.

My name is Connor Boyack, author of the pro-liberty educational series for kids called _The Tuttle Twins books_.

For the last few months, we've been working on the Ukrainian translations of _The Tuttle Twins_ books with our in-country partners who are spreading the books around.

And wouldn't you know it, just a couple of weeks ago, we finished translating _The Golden Rule book_ , which teaches the importance of the Non-Aggression Principle.

[_**I have an urgent request, friend. Will you help finish the Ukrainian translation of the Tuttle Twins series and distribute it with a donation of $10, $25, $50, or any generous amount? Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq37lqjb99krrfvj9uvcaol28es3rs67bs9jk75o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)

_The Golden Rule_ book features Ron Paul and is based on his book _A Foreign Policy of Freedom _-- a book that deeply influenced me when I read it 15 years ago.

How timely, then, that this book is being made available in a country the same week it's under attack from Russia.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8ukvp46rhe7r1on63pa41k3nn8lth63nid215o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1lcesa4os2b23q6tjn288f64tir9tfk2kfdab40_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)

The other day, I reached out to our Ukrainian partner to let him know I was thinking of him and his team and hoped they would be able to stay safe.

This is his reply:

_" Thank you for your support. We appreciate that today you are with us, especially when we hear the sounds of air raid sirens or watch fights with Russian helicopters.

We have a wonderful example of common cooperation with you. Maybe someday in the future, you will write another book so that children will understand the results of sharp struggle between free initiative and totalitarian violence on the example of war."_

[_**Click here to donate and support our Ukrainian partner as he passes out Tuttle Twin books >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv4sfmcvndgjhb666kjhjt1mv01gi38jbf9ra9io_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)

I was planning to visit Ukraine this summer.

Obviously, that can no longer happen.

How tragic, that the aggression of authoritarians who use the state's military might to harm and kill others. World history is filled with such violence, of course, but this carnage is of little consequence to those who see the world as one big game where people are collateral damage in the pursuit of power and control.

Friend, so far we've translated the _Tuttle Twins_ books into 9 languages and distributed over 3 MILLION copies.

It costs $10 to print and distribute each book, friend. Will you support our Ukrainian translation and distribution? **Click any link below to donate.**

[_**Donate $10 and sponsor 1 book >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn48kjeloht6pg6gu6puk22pp7vu3tc46gfus3mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $20 and sponsor 2 books >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zro1kjopl0tr6n9vlmucssdg12b1tu4kmllb9oo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 and sponsor 5 books >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlnalnr2cjh7sqmldqi4elqlqqu0mfs41an08v1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 and sponsor 10 books >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdokktp7ise4rj4vttcf75vusg8vjbob4skqgt58_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 and sponsor 50 books >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zur7gj1idv60ojmjt3k74h6u851v8qi3g7sdcfq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 and sponsor 100 books >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4frofcosa7pvdpk0n5onuvnbl19b94ok37dl760_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqb7nrr729i22kbjpfpd32rdm9gmiseb2rfc4mr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
President, Libertas Institute

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z0qk6sm609lasaus6q96k42d1fpqgduh09n2sqjg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbgbsc61lun0otdphadhoigvkuebg4gn8nd67ff8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge4o30clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Do you support Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **UPDATE: Republican super PAC says Trump is “unraveling” -- and a new poll shows his Republican support PLUMMETING!**

_But Trump is still eyeing a 2024 run, so we need to know where top Democrats stand._**

Do you support Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220321-TrumpUpdate-TrumpCollapsing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220321-TrumpUpdate-TrumpCollapsing-Pros-sl1&akid=3421%2E9716520%2EnIiot0)
Team -- Brand new polling shows that among his ultra-conservative base, Donald Trump’s support is **_collapsing._**

Trump has been relentlessly trying to rally his MAGA base around a second term, and while **this new poll shows that his support may finally be wavering among Republicans,** Trump is showing no signs of slowing down.

Another four years of the Trump presidency would be DISASTROUS for our country, which is why we need to confirm that top Democrats are firmly AGAINST the former president. **Our urgent poll closes at MIDNIGHT, so please answer now.**

**Do you support Donald Trump?**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6225?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220321-TrumpUpdate-TrumpCollapsing-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220321-TrumpUpdate-TrumpCollapsing-Pros-sl1&akid=3421%2E9716520%2EnIiot0)
Thank you for your input,

Team DSCC

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: TPPA Weekly Call to Action: March 21st
body:
| | | |
---
---
Congratulations!! YOUR efforts for the last few weeks to end the travel mask mandates is working! Rand Paul’s resolution passed in the Senate – with even some Democrats voting to end the mask mandates! The next step would be to go to the House, but they are on recess this week, so we will have to see what happens when they get back. Also, Nancy Pelosi is telling the White House to ask for $45 billion more in Covid spending instead of the $$22.5 billion they’re currently requesting! And of course, gas prices are still rising and all of our families are suffering. So, for this week’s call to action, we are repeating two past action items, because we still have an opportunity to make a difference with them. **In this week’s call-to-action**
* Stop Throwing Money at COVID!
* Reopen the Keystone Pipeline!

_Remember, when you use our AlignAct campaign, you can contact all of the Senators with just a couple of clicks – it will literally take you one to two minutes to do!_
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwODAtZjA4ZmI5ZjNmNjIyNDhiMzgyNzBlNmQ3OTEzZThmNzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtdGhyb3dpbmctbW9uZXktYXQtY292aWQ_bWlkPTQ1MDk1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/uue_n5oMQYif3839kQV27A)

Our elected officials in D.C. have already spent over $5 trillion to “respond” to COVID. Now, they’re trying to spend over $15 billion more – no, wait – Nancy Pelosi wants to spend another $45 billion! Don’t let them! While the House is in recess this week, we can still make calls and email and use social media to pressure the House to vote against the COVID spending bill, H.R. 7007. **There are two ways to take action**. The first is to [**use our AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwODAtZjA4ZmI5ZjNmNjIyNDhiMzgyNzBlNmQ3OTEzZThmNzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtdGhyb3dpbmctbW9uZXktYXQtY292aWQ_bWlkPTQ1MDk1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/6QmsVzBcfbuYdQDm1UkTlg) to call and email all of the Republicans in the House, as well as your own Representative (whether Democrat or Republican). The second way is to call the district offices for your own Rep. You can find their websites by entering your zip code [**on this page**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**.** Then, it will take you to a page where your Rep. will be listed on the left side of the page. Click on his or her name, which should be hyperlinked to the website. Once on the website, look for “contact” or “offices” (usually) to find all of their district offices. Calling the district offices is important in this case because they generate more call reports, and we want them to know that America doesn’t want any more COVID spending!!
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwODAtZjA4ZmI5ZjNmNjIyNDhiMzgyNzBlNmQ3OTEzZThmNzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3N0b3AtdGhyb3dpbmctbW9uZXktYXQtY292aWQ_bWlkPTQ1MDk1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/Z5Sr6tp651Iko0bHfPoM1g)
---
| | |
---
Just when you thought energy prices couldn’t get any worse, Democrats in the Congressional Progressive Caucus are [set to demand](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) that President Biden issue an executive order banning all oil and gas drilling on federal lands. The Democrats are using the Russian invasion of Ukraine as a fig leaf to declare a climate change emergency, which, they believe, would force a transition to green energy sources. But such a transition would increase our reliance on China. Biden’s EPA has issued new [greenhouse gas emission standards](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MDk1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/sFCkgcS0AXcOH66Zp3zWXA) that essentially mandate that 17% of new vehicles in model year 2026 be fully electric or plug-in hybrids. Yet it fails to recognize that Communist China [controls](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) most of the production of the silicon wafers used in solar panels, the rare earth metals used in wind turbines, and lithium for electric vehicles. [It would be a major political gamble](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._TpoNcQ) for Biden to issue an executive order that would raise energy prices amid inflation and record-high pump prices eight months before the midterm elections. An [ABC News/Ipsos](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) poll released last week indicates that 70% of voters disapprove of Biden on gas prices, while 28% approve.
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwODAtZjA4ZmI5ZjNmNjIyNDhiMzgyNzBlNmQ3OTEzZThmNzgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiOSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3Jlb3Blbi10aGUta2V5c3RvbmUtcGlwZWxpbmU_bWlkPTQ1MDk1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/RPjvlgO0hIiEIvNKlkcMHA)
---
**Reopen the Keystone Pipeline!** Under President Trump, America was energy independent, exporting energy to other nations, and we (and the world) were safer as a result. One of the pieces of our energy independence was the Keystone Pipeline. Within hours of being sworn in, Joe Biden cancelled the permits for the pipeline, killing the project. Now we see, in real time, the consequences of his actions, as we import energy from Russia, and in effect, are helping to fund their invasion of Ukraine. Furthermore, Biden and the radical left that owns him want to exploit current events to stop Americans from using oil and gas full stop. Remember their motto, never let a crisis go to waste. [**Use our newest AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Ekhe19Sddmw) to contact the White House and your own Representative and Senators with just a click of a button, and tell them all to **reopen the Keystone Pipeline!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
| | |
---
The White House [is also using Russia's invasion of Ukraine](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to renegotiate the Iran nuclear deal. Under Biden's deal, America would stop sanctioning Iranian terrorists and lift sanctions on the rogue state. This deal will [allow Iran to rake in billions](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-dMYH6tHuA) in additional revenue because of lifted sanctions. Additionally, this deal would create a "[sanctions evasion hub](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)" that would allow Russia to avoid international efforts to stop Russia's invasion of Ukraine. According to a senior congressional aide, “Iran wants to do significant business with Russia, which means Biden will have to gut sanctions on Putin to protect the Iranians. He'll be spending the next three years vetoing congressional legislation imposing sanctions on Putin just to preserve his deal, assuming he even can.” Biden’s weakness is allowing Putin and Iran to thrive by giving both nations desperately needed lifelines.
---
|
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._7wlZfIRqcYe1A9Jf-XA)
---
We have now wrapped up eleven tour stops in nine cities around Pennsylvania, and next week we will hold the last six meetings – three in Philadelphia and three in Harrisburg! **The statewide Pennsylvania Election Integrity Summit, happing at the Pennsylvania Leadership Conference is also coming up fast, on Thursday, March 31st in Camp Hill, PA!** The great news is that your fellow Pennsylvanians are energized and ready to build out permanent Election Integrity infrastructure to ensure that going forward, PA has transparent, honest, and trustworthy elections. I hope you will take advantage of the opportunity to attend one of these last tour meetings and the summit/PA Leadership Conference next week! We will be in Philadelphia on Tuesday, March 29th and in Harrisburg on Wednesday, March 30th for the last tour stops, and in Camp Hill on March 31st for the summit. Exact dates and times are listed below my signature. **With only two cities left in the tour and the summit happening right after the tour, and limited seating available at all of the events, RSVP as soon as you can!** [**RSVP to attend one of the tour meetings**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) ** ** [**RSVP to attend the statewide summit at the PA Leadership Conference**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._k1Q)
---
| | |
---
What could be better than fireworks on the Fourth of July at that icon of American patriotism, Mount Rushmore? Just about anything else, according to the National Park Service, [which denied South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem’s permit](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MDk1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/oyfSEXtbQwtUc8McBFnIgQ) application for the 2022 Mount Rushmore Fireworks Celebration. Among the reasons listed for denying the permit were the risk of fireworks contaminating the local water supply, the potential for wildfire and interfering with the food service vendor’s operations. But the main reason was that such an event would apparently offend Native Americans. “Fireworks are viewed by multiple Tribes as an adverse effect to the traditional cultural landscape,” according to the letter of denial. “The Memorial is committed to furthering the Nation-to-Nation relationships with tribal governments,” and the agency is directed to “include considerations of how to safeguard the interests of any Indian Tribes such decisions may affect.” The NPS also denied South Dakota's fireworks permit application last year, citing potential risks to the health of employees and visitors. Apparently, the NPS refrained from listing laundry night or potential interference with the moonlight frisbee league games as reasons for rejecting the permit.
---
|
---

And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

name: Team Crist
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Governor DeSantis has been going full speed ahead with his plan to sign into law divisive, far-right legislation. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215028/336213994/1828375930?refcode=20220321_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTc5YzVlZi0zZGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8TDHEIebLwqx4IQuw4Hnjodh_SZDdYJcG4hUZSqMSeU=)
---
Friend,

We’re coming to you with good news and bad news from the campaign trail.

We’ll start with the bad news: Governor DeSantis has been going full speed ahead with his plan to sign into law **divisive, far-right legislation** designed to rile up his base and strip Floridians of some of their most basic freedoms.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Haugaard?=
subject: Ending sex trafficking in South Dakota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haugaard for Governor
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Peter here is a problem we simply cannot ignore.

It’s often the topic of concern and conversation, but more action is needed.

Sex trafficking is a brutal and horrible practice, and it happens every day right under our noses here in South Dakota.

Evil pimps and kidnappers, modern-day slave traders, have taken advantage of gaps in our law enforcement system to grow their operation, and **I have simply had enough**. We must end it.

**I have a comprehensive plan to begin unifying the efforts of law enforcement across the state as well as Tribal law enforcement**, beginning with focused regional meetings.

We need Memorandums of Understanding to combine our policing efforts, share information, and end jurisdictional disputes. The cost is too high to do otherwise.

If you feel as passionately about this cause as I do,** please consider sharing this email with your friends and family as a call to action** and [CLICKING HERE](https://SteveHaugaard.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5c4ed239d47c47ffd9ead77d3&id=ecf3b5110e&e=c654cab7e1) to follow my campaign on social media.

We need the full weight of total public support to get the gears of justice spinning.
---
|
---
| Thank you and God bless,
---
|
\- Steve Haugaard

_Republican Candidate for Governor _

|

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Update
body:
Dear Peter,

I'm so encouraged by the incredible generosity of my supporters across this country!

**12 days ago, my campaign team set a goal of raising $78,000 by the crucial March 31 fundraising deadline. As of right now, we've raised $35,100.76 -- right at 45% of our goal.**

In less than two weeks, mostly homeschool moms (and their families) from ALL 50 states, have chipped in at least $17.76 to support my run for Congress.

I believe that we can reach our goal by March 31, but we still need 2,415 individuals to chip in at least $17.76 to get there.

[**Can you chip in $17.76 right now to help us get there?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834403:sfbIy_HN6:m:1:2503513073:C84CC4A541A453EEC16D26EB2F3F8D58:r)

Too many people have lost faith in politics and government and I can understand why: it has been a bitterly divisive time in our country. That’s why we built this campaign on the pillars of love, hope, and empathy. I’m running for Congress because I know in my bones that there is a better way forward for all of us and I know that people in WNC are ready to forge that path together.
It starts with organizing across our district – every single part of it.
Showing up and listening makes a difference. Everywhere, including the places that other people might write off as “unwinnable.” It’s at the core of my work as an organizer and minister, and I couldn’t be more inspired to meet folks where they are and see how our values connect.
It’s the only way we’re going to defeat Madison Cawthorn and move forward with a politics that represents all of us.
Because of the support of so many folks like you, we ended 2021 with more cash on hand than Madison Cawthorn. It will take all of us being all in to stay ahead, and ensure that we have the resources to win.
**With this being our last FEC deadline before the primary election, we need all hands on deck to help us connect with voters everywhere to have a real shot at defeating Cawthorn.[Can we count on you to chip in $25 or more today to help us meet our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43198973/336157726/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220321_FR_EOQ1OrganizingEverywhere_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTQwZTQxYy0xZGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vl6IhsfKAtVAE-qF3IosucYa22WLXumJIyrZ09p0Loc=)**

clean_body: | = | | Peter, I’m going to explain why organizing in every corner of the district (including the reddest parts) is important below,= | | | = Too many people have lost faith in politics and government and I can understand why: it has been a bitterly divisive time in our country. That’s why we built this campaign on the pillars of love, hope, and empathy. I’m running for Congress because I know in my bones that there is a better way forward for all of us and I know that people in WNC are ready to forge that path together. It starts with organizing across our district – every single part of it. Showing up and listening makes a difference. Everywhere, including the places that other people might write off as “unwinnable.” It’s at the core of my work as an organizer and minister, and I couldn’t be more inspired to meet folks where they are and see how our values connect. It’s the only way we’re going to defeat Madison Cawthorn and move forward with a politics that represents all of us. Because of the support of so many folks like you, we ended 2021 with more cash on hand than Madison Cawthorn. It will take all of us being all in to stay ahead, and ensure that we have the resources to win. With this being our last FEC deadline before the primary election, we need all hands on deck to help us connect with voters everywhere to have a real shot at defeating Cawthorn.= | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . name: Tim Scott
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
The only thing protecting our great nation from the Democrats’ socialist pipedream is just ONE Senate seat. I just filed for
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze1821a584eha2c57er4j61q1qm2mlb7roc1d830_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbom1d70s9h3atb5msoe6obkcorr9chimcp3ao30slgj1pjmckrr4d5k61ir7ddgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbd37mthmcdj4mdi6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jm1o76c3i61oh5u)

|
---
| | | Friend,

**The only thing protecting our great nation from the Democrats ' socialist pipedream is just ONE Senate seat.**

I just filed for re-election to take the Senate back from the Democrats and to ensure their dreams stay dreams and do not become a reality.

_I am running to preserve the American dream that has uplifted countless families - families just like mine - from poverty to prosperity._

**[Meanwhile, Chuck Schumer and the Radical Democrats are working to destroy that dream. That's why I'm asking for your immediate help.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8kiqamn441sponviu7vmu1559vbhvmu5e2doic8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geco74c3h2bs)**

---
| | | [SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf9j69prrepsbhrqs4lb45tnp06u9o9tvfjbm7bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geco74c3h2bs)
---
| | | [TAKE BACK ONE SEAT](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb001msscb1v94vm47bvh6f6lihkr1o5jdjncl80_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geco74c3h2bs)
---
Friend, the stakes have **never** been higher.

American families are suffering. Our principles are under attack. If we lose, the Radical Democrats will continue down their path of destruction until our country is unrecognizable.

_**We are only ONE seat away from flipping the Senate. I need to show I have strong support from patriots like YOU!**_

Join me before your personal link closes at midnight tonight! Let's send a message to Chuck Schumer and the Radical Democrats: Americans are FED UP with their radical policies.
**[https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztt9a4spd2u5g8bs3fma6u8k251p3mcbu7dnfppg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geco74c3h2bs)**
**Don 't forget--your personal link closes at midnight tonight! Can I count on your support?**

Thank you,

Senator Tim Scott

---
| | | [SAVE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv0nmm4q8f6jshda2gf8crpf9qap7p4s9vfcrcb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geco74c3h2bs)
---
| | | [TAKE BACK ONE SEAT](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu0u8fdir4vlbks7nkuokj2klgu98tnm5q7ld3sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geco74c3h2bs)
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr7mdrorft8028setqsv7kjhrida2qgbcbnn55oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geco74c3h2bs)
---
Friend, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think.

Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democratic agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is _**frightening**_.

If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come.

**But we can only do that with YOUR support**. There is **no one else** we can rely on at this point. You've been such a valued member of our team since Day 1 - can you take this one crucial step with us?
---
| | | [DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zro86n622vrjf5heq53uhru5ph0q83vaieesiup8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geco74c3h2bs)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Petitions, Media Interviews, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I really enjoy campaigning. Meeting citizens from all corners of the state is always energizing. | | | |
---
| | | Hello Peter:

Petitions, media interviews, public events, and more – with some official police business thrown in as well. That’s what my week was like. How was yours?

At the beginning of the week I had a good interview on **Michigan’s Big Show with Michael Patrick Shiels**. We talked about election integrity, President Trump, and more. You can listen here:

[Listen to "* Michael Brown, Captain with the Michigan State Police, Candidate (R) for Governor" on Spreaker.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=ca8960c310&e=0636b97700)
---
| |
---
I continued to travel around the state and meet business owners and local citizens. In Saint Joseph, I stopped by **Charlie's Fishin Hole** (known by some as Broadlow‘s Fishin Hole. I had to let Charlie know that I won’t have much time for fishing with the campaign going on, although I do plan on a couple early morning trips this spring while most everyone is sleeping.
---
| Support for small business, tourism, and natural resources will be priorities for my administration.
###
**Petitions**
We'll be turning in our petitions soon, and I spent some time this week talking with voters who came out to meet me at the**Phillips 66 gas station** in Baroda, MI. So many great people stopped by to sign the petition and talk about our crazy gas prices.
---
| |
---
As expected, **Governor Whitmer vetoed the bill to temporarily pause the state's gas tax.** She managed to confuse the issue when she came out on the same day saying she'd talk about temporarily suspending the sales tax on gas. **Here's an idea. Suspend both the gas tax and the sales tax on gas.** The state is flush with cash, and Michigan's citizens are hurting from the high inflation and high gas prices. Give them some immediate relief.
---
| Oh yes, _Whitmer also vetoed the bill to cut our state income taxes_.

**Peter, I'll be a very different Governor than Whitmer.** I believe _we can and should cut our taxes_. The Governor of Indiana just signed legislation to reduce that state's income tax below 3%. We can cut our state income tax to 3.25% to stimulate our economy and to remain competitive with our neighbors.
###
**Taking the Campaign to All Corners of the State**
I really enjoy campaigning. Meeting citizens throughout Michigan is always energizing, and I believe **_I'm the one candidate with the energy and drive to win this race_** by taking my campaign to all corners of the state.

I'm extremely grateful for the outpouring of support I receive.

Last week, **Missaukee County Prosecutor David Den Houten endorsed me** saying, "Michael Brown's many years in law enforcement and the knowledge and compassion that his experience brings, are exactly what Michigan needs for Governor."

[Read his full statement here.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=1405f2fd14&e=0636b97700)
###
Public Safety
Unfortunately, last week was also a violent one in our state, and it took a lot of my time as we dealt with **_drive by shootings, a murder_** , and other issues.

_It reinforced to me why I've made my public safety plan my first policy proposal_.

If you missed it, [**I released “Safe Communities, Safe Michigan” last week**](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=d6bb03c69a&e=0636b97700). It's the first of many comprehensive policy proposals.

Here are my reasons for releasing this plan first.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=d605925a2a&e=0636b97700)
---
| Please take a couple minutes and read my plan for keeping our communities and citizens safe. Just click the image below.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=7d119e0970&e=0636b97700)
---
| I have another busy week on the calendar. I hope to see you on the campaign trail.

If you haven't already endorsed me or volunteered to help, please take a moment to visit my website and get involved. We'll need everyone on board to defeat Whitmer, and I know with your help we will.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---
| [VISIT MICHAEL'S CAMPAIGN WEBSITE](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=4485d35aa8&e=0636b97700 "VISIT MICHAEL'S CAMPAIGN WEBSITE")
---
| [DONATE TODAY TO HELP MICHAEL'S CAMPAIGN](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f7665296f3&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY TO HELP MICHAEL'S CAMPAIGN")
---
|

State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: over 36 years in the Navy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215668/336216660/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3YTZiYy00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zek18vV-Ff4G40UeFTm-euyJnPU2ojylnpd9hkHd8Eg=&emci=a42b1739-40a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a737a6bc-40a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215674/336216663/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3YTZiYy00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zek18vV-Ff4G40UeFTm-euyJnPU2ojylnpd9hkHd8Eg=&emci=a42b1739-40a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a737a6bc-40a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
As a three-star admiral in the United States Navy, I had the honor of protecting our nation, our citizens, across the globe. Commanding a destroyer, participating in the majority of the operations since September 11th, to include leading U.S. forces in East Africa in the struggle against pirates, terrorists, and anarchy... I know what it means to serve our country.
But after Donald Trump was elected, I retired from the U.S. Navy. If you don’t respect your boss, it is time to move on, and I was not going to be used as a prop for the political purposes of an irrational demagogue such as Trump.
**Now I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs, and we need stalwart Democrats bold enough to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, and rein in Wall Street.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, even though I’m a hard target having been raised in rural Iowa and dedicated my life to service. So I need you in this fight if we’re going to turn Iowa blue. We must expand our Senate majority.
[**Please, may I count on you to join my campaign today with a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215686/336216675/-42398318?refcode=em20220321mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3YTZiYy00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zek18vV-Ff4G40UeFTm-euyJnPU2ojylnpd9hkHd8Eg=)
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020 – and Chuck Grassley’s approval ratings are abysmal here. The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows that 64% of likely Iowa voters think “it’s time for someone new.”
**We can win this race, and we _must_ win it. Senate control is on the line here in Iowa.**
After over 36 years in the Navy, twenty-plus moves, deployments galore, and service throughout the world, I am well prepared for the fight ahead. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m relying on grassroots donors like you if we’re going to win.
[**Please, if you’re able to, will you make a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford now and help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215691/336216686/-42398318?refcode=em20220321mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3YTZiYy00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zek18vV-Ff4G40UeFTm-euyJnPU2ojylnpd9hkHd8Eg=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215693/336216689/-42398318?refcode=em20220321mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3YTZiYy00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zek18vV-Ff4G40UeFTm-euyJnPU2ojylnpd9hkHd8Eg=)
