clean_body: Hello, As a three-star admiral in the United States Navy, I had the honor of protecting our nation, our citizens, across the globe. Commanding a destroyer, participating in the majority of the operations since September 11th, to include leading U.S. forces in East Africa in the struggle against pirates, terrorists, and anarchy... I know what it means to serve our country. But after Donald Trump was elected, I retired from the U.S. Navy. If you don’t respect your boss, it is time to move on, and I was not going to be used as a prop for the political purposes of an irrational demagogue such as Trump. Now I’m running for Senate because Republicans like Chuck Grassley are still acting like Trump’s lap dogs, and we need stalwart Democrats bold enough to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, and rein in Wall Street. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, even though I’m a hard target having been raised in rural Iowa and dedicated my life to service. So I need you in this fight if we’re going to turn Iowa blue. We must expand our Senate majority. = Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020 – and Chuck Grassley’s approval ratings are abysmal here. The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows that 64% of likely Iowa voters think “it’s time for someone new.” We can win this race, and we must win it. Senate control is on the line here in Iowa. After over 36 years in the Navy, twenty-plus moves, deployments galore, and service throughout the world, I am well prepared for the fight ahead. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m relying on grassroots donors like you if we’re going to win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I am grateful for your support. Thank you, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Rev. Robert A. Sirico
subject: Exposing the truth about China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Acton Institute
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899444:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)

Dear Peter,

My friend was recently put in jail. His crimes? He is a believer (a practicing Catholic). He advocates for free speech and religious freedom. And he fearlessly exposed the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) for its many human rights violations.

Tragically, Jimmy Lai, world-renowned entrepreneur and pro-democracy advocate, is locked in prison.

Beijing is using its immense power and overreach to try to silence him. But we refuse to let this happen.

Peter, let me give a brief introduction. I am Rev. Robert Sirico, president emeritus of the Acton Institute, a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization that produces podcasts, journals, research, and documentaries that make the moral case for religious liberty and free markets.

[_**Please click here or below to watch and support this brand-new documentary >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899444:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899444:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)

In 2014, the Acton Institute produced the hit documentary, Poverty, Inc. The film exposed the corruption and BIG business behind international poverty aid. Poverty, Inc. was an official selection at 50 film festivals, earning 15 major awards in the process.

Now we are exposing what the CCP and Xi Jinping are desperately trying to hide.

This spring, we will proudly release our brand-new documentary film--The Hong Konger. **It 's a story about the fight for freedom in Hong Kong, led by the inspiring Jimmy Lai. **

Jimmy grew up in rural communist China. His family was suffering in dire poverty, and so when he was only 12, Jimmy traveled to Hong Kong. Thanks to his newfound freedom, his entrepreneurial spirit, and years of hard work, Jimmy started the Giordano clothing company, which rapidly grew to a globally recognized brand.

Eventually, Jimmy would turn his attention to media, where he built several successful companies. Before he turned 60, he was a billionaire. And as Jimmy thrived, so did Hong Kong.

But then the Chinese Communist Party showed up ...

**The CCP aggressively suppressed the freedom and civil liberties enjoyed for so long by the citizens of Hong Kong. And so Jimmy took to the streets. He deliberately placed himself on the frontlines of the Hong Kong protests so government officials would see his face. **

His newspaper, _Apple Daily_ , became the biggest critic of the CCP, and so it had Jimmy and key members of his staff arrested--and his company shut down.

Jimmy risked everything. He gave up the life of a billionaire entrepreneur in Hong Kong to become a dissident fighting for basic human freedoms threatened by a Beijing-inspired clampdown. Now he is locked in prison and his future is uncertain.

[_**Please click here or below to watch and support this brand-new documentary >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899444:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899444:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)

The Chinese government wants him silenced, but Jimmy Lai's fight for freedom in Hong Kong is far from done.

**I am hoping to raise $50,000 to crowdsource our marketing efforts behind this incredible documentary. **

Sadly, you won't hear Jimmy Lai's story from Hollywood or the corporate media. It's why I'm asking you to help us reach our goal. More than 80% of our funding comes from the generous contributions of individual Acton supporters.

**If you 're inspired by Jimmy's story and the fight for freedom in Hong Kong, then please support this incredible documentary today. **

Use any of the links below to send your urgent support.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899445:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899446:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899447:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899448:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899449:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899450:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899451:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899444:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)

Together we can ensure that Jimmy's voice will not be silenced.

Sincerely,

Rev. Robert A. Sirico
President Emeritus
Acton Institute

P.S. By supporting _The Hong Konger_ , you will automatically be subscribed to our updates on the project and will get access to the full video upon its release.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899444:J7QIw8oJN:m:1:3317145305:78008FAB226FA121CC72A13FFBB8CCB6:r)

Paid for by the Acton Institute

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: The plot thickens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter:

We now know the Feds infiltrated the crowds on January 6.

The Deep State tried their best to get Donald Trump...

... and all of his supporters, like you and me.

**That's why it's more important than ever we elect Donald J. Trump as the next Speaker of the House!**

Can you imagine the look of horror on the faces of Nancy Pelosi, Liz Cheney, the head of the FBI, and other Deep State bureaucrats as SPEAKER Donald Trump calls them to testify before Congress?

**We must EXPOSE the massive scandal of the FBI, Deep State operatives, members of Congress, the media, and big tech billionaires all working together to destroy our America First movement.**

All are working with one goal: _GET DONALD TRUMP_.

There is no better way to make them pay than electing Donald Trump as the next Speaker of the House!

**That's why it's more important than ever to elect a solidly conservative, America First majority to Congress in 2022.** [_**CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP ME
ELECT TRUMP FOR SPEAKER**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) **Democrats are already using January 6 as a reason to stop America First conservatives like me from even running for office...**

It's time we fight back and fight back to win!

Anything less than that is a waste of our time and resources.

Liz Cheney and the rest of the RINO crowd in Congress want to move us away from Trump and America First.

**_I want to make Congress report to Trump!_**

I still stand with Trump and America First.

And I proudly say it every time I speak, everywhere I go, I will say it again and again, every day, I am...

... America First.

**I'm an unapologetic America First conservative.** [_**ELECT TRUMP FOR SPEAKER
CHIP IN RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) **But to even have a chance of electing Donald Trump speaker, we have to start by electing a solid America First majority to Congress this year.**

America First conservatives who will reject Mike Pence, reject Liz Cheney and reject the RINO sell-out establishment.

Because we can't rely on just a GOP takeover to make changes, and we certainly can't rely on the regular GOP establishment to elect Speaker Trump!

**[I hope you will join me in this all-important fight with a contribution right away of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 $1,000, or even $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r).**

I'm running for reelection to fight back and help end the Democrats and RINOs' stranglehold on Washington, DC for far too long.

**But to make it happen, we are in for a real fight.**

That's why I must have your help right away.

**[So please, make that contribution to my campaign at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r).**

**Together we can beat Mike Pence, Nancy Pelosi, the RINOs, and big-spending liberals in both parties and elect Donald Trump as our next Speaker of the House.**

| | | [ Chip in $10 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) |
---|---|---
| [ Chip in $25 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) |
| [ Chip in $50 immediately >> ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) |
| [ Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) |
| [ Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59834463:Wk8iy_HNn:m:1:2365227053:36D9ECD1C7C0C45325ED95C2E8A6B73F:r) |
Thanks for Standing Strong,

Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

I want to make Congress report to Trump! I still stand with Trump and America First. And I proudly say it every time I speak, everywhere I go, I will say it again and again, every day, I am... ... America First. I'm an unapologetic America First conservative. But to even have a chance of electing Donald Trump speaker, we have to start by electing a solid America First majority to Congress this year. America First conservatives who will reject Mike Pence, reject Liz Cheney and reject the RINO sell-out establishment. Because we can't rely on just a GOP takeover to make changes, and we certainly can't rely on the regular GOP establishment to elect Speaker Trump! . I'm running for reelection to fight back and help end the Democrats and RINOs' stranglehold on Washington, DC for far too long. But to make it happen, we are in for a real fight. That's why I must have your help right away. . Together we can beat Mike Pence, Nancy Pelosi, the RINOs, and big-spending liberals in both parties and elect Donald Trump as our next Speaker of the House. | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | Thanks for Standing Strong, Matt Gaetz Congresman (R-FL) Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz.** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. subject: Should Donald Trump be held accountable?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
The last time Donald Trump threw a tantrum and called for mass protests, it ended with the violent attack on the Capitol and the destabilization of our democracy. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43216779/336220839/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlY2YwMGMzLTQxYTktZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pOkEIVh6Qjwc0NaGxjGeVniV4QA2_3d9tW81xVn-dtA=&emci=ab400b2e-35a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=eecf00c3-41a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=16335001) Team,

The last time Donald Trump threw a tantrum and called for mass protests, **it ended with the violent attack on the Capitol and the destabilization of our democracy.**

Now, the investigation continues and the January 6 committee is getting closer every day to uncovering the truth. Still, Donald Trump continues to call on his followers to riot if he gets prosecuted. He even offered pardons to all those who were charged in the insurrection on January 6.

| | It's been about a week since I tested positive for COVID. During my recovery, I've been reflecting on the Affordable Care Act and the 31 million people who depend on it. The Affordable Care Act helps families get the medicine and care they need at a price they can afford. **For millions of Americans, and so many here in my district, COVID is now a pre-existing condition** _–_**and through the Affordable Care Act, they are protected.** Senator Ron Johnson (R-WI) said just last week that if Republicans take the majority, Obamacare will be the first thing to go. Taking health care away from millions of Americans would be unspeakably cruel, especially as we recover from a global pandemic. I ran for Congress to stand up for your health care, and to make sure people with pre-existing conditions remain protected. Now, I am part of a House majority that is only five votes. I'm determined to fight for this seat and fight for the majority because we desperately need it to make progress on health care and our pandemic recovery. We need to maintain our majority to keep in place protections for people with pre-existing conditions: including those left with ongoing complications from COVID. [**If you can, please chip in now to help us maintain our majority in Congress and defend health care for millions of Americans.** clean_body: | | | It's been about a week since I tested positive for COVID. During my recovery, I've been reflecting on the Affordable Care Act and the 31 million people who depend on it. The Affordable Care Act helps families get the medicine and care they need at a price they can afford. For millions of Americans, and so many here in my district, COVID is now a pre-existing condition –and through the Affordable Care Act, they are protected. Senator Ron Johnson (R-WI) said just last week that if Republicans take the majority, Obamacare will be the first thing to go. Taking health care away from millions of Americans would be unspeakably cruel, especially as we recover from a global pandemic. I ran for Congress to stand up for your health care, and to make sure people with pre-existing conditions remain protected. Now, I am part of a House majority that is only five votes. I'm determined to fight for this seat and fight for the majority because we desperately need it to make progress on health care and our pandemic recovery. We need to maintain our majority to keep in place protections for people with pre-existing conditions: including those left with ongoing complications from COVID. = Andy Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59900740:Jubj-8oGN:m:1:3317145305:908A1D6F112D24DE48D02B38D8753186:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59900741:Jubj-8oGN:m:1:3317145305:908A1D6F112D24DE48D02B38D8753186:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59900741:Jubj-8oGN:m:1:3317145305:908A1D6F112D24DE48D02B38D8753186:r "Please click
here to donate now")**

Team, Ketanji Brown Jackson is about to go through a frustrating, and difficult experience. I know this because politics are always difficult for black women. However, Judge Brown Jackson will get through it. I know this because black mothers always get through it. Being a mother and a professional means constantly struggling to find enough hours in the day. I have experienced making sandwiches at 2 AM, knowing I have my first call at 6. Today, as Judge Brown Jackson prepares for her first hearings and I prepare for the end of the first financial quarter, I am asking for help. name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze91u4sp4m1fqn1u6s17u2kssqivt6cgrqcla81o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr62c30mkp79c3h6lpj4chl68rm1plgetgjaspk6ip39orlc2pncoliepgb1pdnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj3cppl6krr4cr662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jm1o77c5j68oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh43ejsuui1oiiu2m38l25c0614mevdj18o1faoo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geeob6chh2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5kb1tgcrm1jo4g20i65tsss0uek7te7ia4a2veg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geeob6chh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfd8escescdcvfebd025ive8lrfehn7l2d4m6bo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geeob6chh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7lptjash7feih2ml2u6vp2aj1s0uro3op196nog_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3geeob6chh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---

name: Matt Gaetz (R-FL)
subject: It’s official. I’m running for reelection
body:
I’m your Florida Man. I’m ready to take the fight to Washington -
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001am33JoLKlGksUT6-cKASMFPQgGjtey-j_xEl2K-SrXUXTKDteU0bxaIxw2Tuqg4M66HfyTjxwb-36_zqiEzwiTKRgwqhXexA94jRdOLG0mXYvBHLxuRIubXwio5jgmx3-zf_nWsEfmgP7c1IEz2cCuHL26MUZmMulS8v2vKpmAzCBAFUzm0pvcb-zWMVLRyb&c=f9xfnqXmZFR9x-RJlqB5LAYJcYY6vV8g_1nX79iaIt3g3ng_O8J_sg==&ch=_4yd-5qW8AzvzxT1JGFdVjynM_HEIdnWhL_GVk_HkXcZ6GXSh_diNA==)
---
| I'm officially announcing my campaign for reelection in Florida's 1st Congressional District.
It's choose your fighter time. I'm your Florida Man. I'm ready to take the fight to Washington and I hope you'll fight with me.
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH GAETZ >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001am33JoLKlGksUT6-cKASMFPQgGjtey-j_xEl2K-SrXUXTKDteU0bxaIxw2Tuqg4M66HfyTjxwb-36_zqiEzwiTKRgwqhXexA94jRdOLG0mXYvBHLxuRIubXwio5jgmx3-zf_nWsEfmgP7c1IEz2cCuHL26MUZmMulS8v2vKpmAzCBAFUzm0pvcb-zWMVLRyb&c=f9xfnqXmZFR9x-RJlqB5LAYJcYY6vV8g_1nX79iaIt3g3ng_O8J_sg==&ch=_4yd-5qW8AzvzxT1JGFdVjynM_HEIdnWhL_GVk_HkXcZ6GXSh_diNA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001am33JoLKlGksUT6-cKASMFPQgGjtey-j_xEl2K-SrXUXTKDteU0bxaIxw2Tuqg4M66HfyTjxwb-36_zqiEzwiTKRgwqhXexA94jRdOLG0mXYvBHLxuRIubXwio5jgmx3-zf_nWsEfmgP7c1IEz2cCuHL26MUZmMulS8v2vKpmAzCBAFUzm0pvcb-zWMVLRyb&c=f9xfnqXmZFR9x-RJlqB5LAYJcYY6vV8g_1nX79iaIt3g3ng_O8J_sg==&ch=_4yd-5qW8AzvzxT1JGFdVjynM_HEIdnWhL_GVk_HkXcZ6GXSh_diNA==)
---
| Peter \-
First off, I'd like to thank you for being a dedicated supporter. Together, we have stood up to Biden and the Democrats, taken on the Deep State, exposed woke Generals in the military, and fought for freedom from coronavirus mandates.
I've fought to put AMERICA FIRST throughout my time in Congress, and have become the target of many powerful institutions. Most notably, CNN, whose producer was caught on camera saying they spread propaganda about me because I'm a threat to the Democrat agenda. Then there was Big Tech, the January 6th Committee, and even death threats against me and my family.
But I won't stop fighting.
That's why I'm asking for your help RIGHT NOW. We need a huge wave of support in this first week of my reelection campaign to send a message to the people who want me, and you, silenced. [This is a call to the Silent Majority and the Trump supporters out there who are tired of being overlooked by the elites in D.C. This is good news, but these numbers have persuaded our Democrat opponent to launch an early $3 million advertising blitz. Therefore, we cannot take anything for granted.

Hey - it's Heather from VPP. Yesterday, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to co-nominate President Biden's Supreme Court Nominee Ketanji Brown Jackson. But you didn't sign - and we missed our goal by just **95** signatures. _We know every good Democrat wants to balance the Supreme Court and deliver a massive victory for President Biden._ So we're reopening our petition and giving you a second chance to sign! **HURRY! The confirmation hearing is starting SOON.[ Click HERE](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/CoNominate_KBJ/?source=VPP_20220321_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=7&akid=1583%2E878179%2E_ePtKO) or use the button below to add your signature »** | [**_QUICK: ADD YOUR NAME TO CO-NOMINATE JUDGE KETANJI BROWN JACKSON TO THE SUPREME COURT »_** ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/CoNominate_KBJ/?source=VPP_20220321_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=8&akid=1583%2E878179%2E_ePtKO)

Heather,

Add your name to co-nominate Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/CoNominate_KBJ/?source=VPP_20220321_EMPET_E1_T0_NS&t=9&akid=1583%2E878179%2E_ePtKO)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m in danger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It’s worse than I thought. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6740%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=xdBDTwgrr1y%2b%2fBKgYIS6mQ&sysid=1)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69343%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZjbolmR4mhnIFuJz0e%2fLzw&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022\.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

Peter,

This could financially RUIN me...
---
**_... A New York Supreme Court justice is now letting a $2.7 _BILLION_ defamation lawsuit proceed against me, Fox News, Lou Dobbs, Maria Bartiromo, among others. _**
---
Would you be shocked to hear that the judge is a Democrat who got elected in 2020?

_With my back to the wall, I have nowhere else to turn but you_. The Left is trying to DROWN me in an avalanche of legal battles, and this $2.7 BILLION fight could finally do me in.

---
This $2.7 BILLION lawsuit alleges that I spread "disinformation" about the 2020 election.
---
Let's take a moment to talk a little bit about accusations of "disinformation."
---
**... In 2020, just weeks before the election, I was accused of spreading "disinformation" when I warned the public about the contents of Hunter Biden's laptop. **
---
**In fact, Hunter 's laptop was called "_Russian_ disinformation!" **
---
But NOW, even the liberal _New York Times_ is admitting that the emails on the laptop were _not_ Russian propaganda, but were indeed **_AUTHENTIC:_**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59900466:6HW6d8oNb:m:1:3317145305:05B170052ED9D81DF65147D838600B89:r)

**Will I get an apology for being accused of spreading Putin propaganda?**
---
_Of course not._
---
But the Deep State and their patsies in the media don't care about truth and integrity.
---
**They only care about ruining their political opponents like me.**
---
_And there 's no doubt about it: if I lose this $2.7 BILLION lawsuit, I will be _ruined_. _
---
**But I 'm not afraid. **
---
Thanks to the generosity of patriots like you, I've overcome every single thing the Deep State has thrown at me.
---
Almost exactly one year ago, 7 FBI agents banged on my door at 6:00 in the morning and raided my apartment.
---
**And despite the ongoing attacks and harassment I 've been subjected to, our opponents have not been able to find a SINGLE crime to charge me with. **
---
_Their only hope is to drag me through a never-ending series of costly lawsuits until I can no longer pay the legal bills and I 'm forced to surrender._
---
_... And a $2.7 BILLION fight could finally do it. _
---
**But they 're not going to win... Because I know that patriots like you will continue to help me fund the battle to secure my freedom. **
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue to relentlessly FIGHT for my freedom and justice.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59900466:6HW6d8oNb:m:1:3317145305:05B170052ED9D81DF65147D838600B89:r)

I’ve heard the insults Republicans are hurling my way, and they aren’t exactly clever.

Trump called me a “disaster” who is “laughed at.” JD Vance says I’m a “fraud” who “pretends to care.” Josh Mandel is telling folks I’m “soggy” with “marshmallow hands”—whatever that means.

I’m not scared of their schoolyard bully tactics. But Republicans are already spending $56 million to keep Ohio red, and they have millions that they’ll spend dragging my name through the mud from now until Election Day.

**I am really worried that we won’t raise the funds we need to get our ads up first and make sure voters hear about my track record of fighting to cut workers in on the deal.**

[**_If we want a chance in hell at winning this neck-and-neck Senate race, we need to meet our $100,000 goal. Can I count on you to split $25 or any amount between Shontel Brown and me today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43218406/336228423/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220321RyanTV_N_TR_90DO-donors_9_NG_TESTA_l2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTBhMTdkMy00OWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xPxBao3tDVNFOzzHRRJNR1xOmGWGVKcX7BgblJrXKs=)

clean_body: = Peter, According to my pollsters, we’ll lose this race unless we launch TV ads as early as possible. Here’s why: If Republicans attack me on the airwaves before I get a chance to introduce myself to Ohioans, we’re toast. They’ll launch nasty ad blitzes, spread vicious lies, and do whatever they can to trick voters into thinking I’m someone I’m not. It’s a lot harder to change someone’s mind once they’ve seen a negative first impression. So we need to raise $100,000 by midnight tomorrow to get our TV ads up BEFORE the Republicans come after me. But we’re falling dangerously behind and I’m nervous. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = I’ve heard the insults Republicans are hurling my way, and they aren’t exactly clever. Trump called me a “disaster” who is “laughed at.” JD Vance says I’m a “fraud” who “pretends to care.” Josh Mandel is telling folks I’m “soggy” with “marshmallow hands”—whatever that means. I’m not scared of their schoolyard bully tactics. But Republicans are already spending $56 million to keep Ohio red, and they have millions that they’ll spend dragging my name through the mud from now until Election Day. I am really worried that we won’t raise the funds we need to get our ads up first and make sure voters hear about my track record of fighting to cut workers in on the deal. = = Thanks, Tim As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
We can’t let a Trump Republican flip this seat and give the Senate back to Mitch McConnell.
#
Peter,
Voters in Washington state rejected Donald Trump not once, but twice, and have made clear that Trump Republicans don’t represent our state’s values and priorities. But when asked about Donald Trump endorsing her race, the Republican trying to flip this seat said: **“If the president wants to support us, that’s awesome.”**
**[We can’t let a Trump Republican flip this seat and give the Senate back to Mitch McConnell. Pitch in $5 now to stand with us in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43218463/336228692/253763479?refcode=pm_em_220321_1_b&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWYzYjU3Ny00YWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVmjm74M54znJQPqJgwW17wnB913kPr5CrHmoTdBq1Y=)**
There is nothing awesome about Donald Trump’s extreme policies and vision for our state and country: undermining the right to abortion, raising taxes on the middle class while lining the pockets of the wealthiest and large corporations, or threatening our democracy.
Patty is working hard to move our country forward and build an economy that actually works for working families. It’s so important that we keep this Senate seat blue and don’t let a Trump Republican flip Washington state–and the Senate–and drag our country backward with policies that only lift up those at the very top.
**[We’ve got to do everything we can to send Patty back to the Senate to keep fighting for our families and communities. Will you chip in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43218464/336228693/253763479?refcode=pm_em_220321_1_b&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWYzYjU3Ny00YWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wVmjm74M54znJQPqJgwW17wnB913kPr5CrHmoTdBq1Y=)**

Murray HQ

Friend,
As we’ve mentioned before, this campaign is making a huge fundraising push in March. And if we can hit our target, we will unlock over $1M in matching funds.
We’re currently behind, but if we raise another $3,995 this week we’ll be back on track to reach our goal. Can you help us? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Running for Governor AND choosing not to accept big checks from corporations and political organizations was never going to be easy. But Nancy and I are unwilling to compromise. Our Democracy should not be for sale, and we must lead by example. Will you donate today, and help us unlock these critical funds? Let's show Maryland that a campaign powered by the people can win! [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer

Baker, III [] **P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [] By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer Baker & Navarro for Maryland 9646 Marlboro Pike Upper Marlboro , MD 20772 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez=20Press=20Team?=
subject: Did you see this?
body:
Republican Delegate Kim Taylor (VA-63) announced... | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=bcf0f06866&e=ae0ea222da)
---

---
| **Delegate Kim Taylor Endorses Tina Ramirez for State Senate **
**Chesterfield, VA** \- Republican Delegate Kim Taylor (VA-63) announced that she is endorsing Tina Ramirez for the Republican nomination in Virginia’s 12th Senate District. Del. Taylor is best known for her large upset victory in 2021, which secured a Republican majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. This major endorsement is the first from a sitting member of the House of Delegates in the 12th District race, which is an open seat following redistricting.

**The following quote is attributable to Del. Kim Taylor:**

“Tina Ramirez was instrumental in helping us flip House District 63 from blue to red, which gave Republicans a majority in the House. When few believed in us, Tina went above and beyond to aid our campaign. Tina knows how to get things done. Having her in the State Senate will provide us with a true fighter and a proven Conservative to counter the obstructionists that are currently standing in the way of Governor Youngkin’s vision and the work we are doing in the House of Delegates. I am proud to endorse Tina Ramirez in the Republican Primary for State Senate in Virginia’s 12th District.”

**The following quote is attributable to Tina Ramirez:**

“I am humbled and honored by the endorsement of Delegate Kim Taylor. Kim is a strong conservative leader and has taken her business owner mentality to the House of Delegates, where she has proven to be a difference-maker. This is exactly what I am seeking to do in the State Senate, so I am proud to have earned her support. I look forward to working with her in the Virginia State Capitol to pass meaningful conservative legislation to improve the lives of and defend liberty for all Virginians.”

---

Get your yard sign, show support for Tom and Shannon’s campaign, and help cover every corner of Maryland in purple and blue!

And in a primary this crowded, friends and neighbors spreading the word about Tom’s message will be **critical** to getting us across the finish line.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russell=20Fry?=
subject: The Russell Roundup
body:
Stay up to date on the latest from Russell Fry's campaign for Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/russellfrysc/russellroundup-8859010?e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=3214e2c560&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | It’s the begining of the week, and that means another installment of **_Russell’s Roundup_** , your weekly source for the latest information on Russell Fry’s campaign to send a true conservative to Congress.
---
|
---
---
| | | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=3e545583f2&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**Pork & Politics, Clio Style**

Hubbards’s on Main in Clio last Tuesday evening was the latest stop on Russell’s **_Barbecue and Freedom Tour_** _._ More than 50 folks from across Marlboro County showed up for some good food and to chat with Russell Fry.

Next stop the tour: Join us TONIGHT (Monday, March 21) at 6:00 p.m. at Hog Heaven, 7147 Ocean Highway in Pauley’s Island at 6:00 pm. Bring your friends—and your appetite!
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=85f795d80f&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**New Poll Brings Very Good News**

Our campaign released the results of a poll taken immediately after President Donald Trump visited Florence. And guess what it found? Russell has jumped to first place in the race to oust the incumbent.

That news was so big, even The Washington Examiner wrote, “Fry’s campaign bumped in popularity among Republican voters by 30% after the former president gave his seal of approval to the campaign in February ...” Take look at the results and see for yourself.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=94444f13d3&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**Extra! Extra! Read All About It!**

Speaking of President Trump’s rally, did you see the front page of Monday’s Florence Morning News? Even the media are noticing the campaign’s momentum is shifting our way!

Now it’s up to all of us to work even harder to keep going in the coming weeks.
---
| **We Want YOU!**
Looking to get involved in Russell’s campaign? With plenty of opportunities available, there’s something for everyone. [_Click here_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=9a9055db77&e=7aa6ac5965) to volunteer, and we’ll be in touch with you soon.

**Pssst! Pass it On!**
Help spread the word of what Russell is doing here in the 7th Congressional District. Please take a moment and forward this newsletter to 10 of your neighbors, relatives, co-workers, and friends. They’ll be glad you did!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=9790e13201&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=5da71dfc6f&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=e5f284689b&e=7aa6ac5965)

|

clean_body: Stay up to date on the latest from Russell Fry's campaign for Congress | | | | | | | It’s the begining of the week, and that means another installment of Russell’s Roundup , your weekly source for the latest information on Russell Fry’s campaign to send a true conservative to Congress. | | | | Pork & Politics, Clio Style Hubbards’s on Main in Clio last Tuesday evening was the latest stop on Russell’s Barbecue and Freedom Tour . More than 50 folks from across Marlboro County showed up for some good food and to chat with Russell Fry. Next stop the tour: Join us TONIGHT (Monday, March 21) at 6:00 p.m. at Hog Heaven, 7147 Ocean Highway in Pauley’s Island at 6:00 pm. Bring your friends—and your appetite! | | | New Poll Brings Very Good News Our campaign released the results of a poll taken immediately after President Donald Trump visited Florence. And guess what it found? Russell has jumped to first place in the race to oust the incumbent. That news was so big, even The Washington Examiner wrote, “Fry’s campaign bumped in popularity among Republican voters by 30% after the former president gave his seal of approval to the campaign in February ...” Take look at the results and see for yourself. | | | Extra! Extra! Read All About It! Speaking of President Trump’s rally, did you see the front page of Monday’s Florence Morning News? Even the media are noticing the campaign’s momentum is shifting our way! Now it’s up to all of us to work even harder to keep going in the coming weeks. | We Want YOU! Looking to get involved in Russell’s campaign? With plenty of opportunities available, there’s something for everyone. to volunteer, and we’ll be in touch with you soon. Pssst! Pass it On! Help spread the word of what Russell is doing here in the 7th Congressional District. Please take a moment and forward this newsletter to 10 of your neighbors, relatives, co-workers, and friends. They’ll be glad you did! | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Fry For Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: RE: Where your dollars go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hello Peter, Yadira here — just wanted to quickly check in and make sure you saw Elana’s email from Friday.

We have just ten days left to reach our $20,000 end-of-quarter goal. After that March 31 deadline, it’s full steam ahead to the June primary, and we’ll be spending every spare moment traveling all over the district to have the real, face-to-face conversations that this campaign is built on.

But we must make sure we have the resources to reach those voters and cover our increasingly expensive outreach costs. Take a look at Elana’s note below for more details, and use this link to pitch in: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-campaigncosts?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321costs3_yc_allop_xx_pt

Thank you so much for all your support!
Dr. Yadira Caraveo

--------Forwarded message--------
From: Elana Schrager, CaraveoForCongress.com
Date: March 18, 2022
Subject: Where your dollars go

Hey Peter,

Elana, Dr. Caraveo’s Campaign Manager, here. We emailed you yesterday about our ambitious $20,000 end-of-quarter goal. But before I ask you to pitch in to help us hit it, I wanted to shed a little light on where your dollars go after you hit that “donate” button on ActBlue, and why we need your help TODAY.

Basically, it comes down to reaching as many voters as we possibly can before the June primary, in every corner of the 8th District we can possibly get to. Here’s a breakdown of what some of the most common donation amounts help us do:
$8 = helps us send 400 text messages.
$15 = is the cost of postage for 27 pieces of mail.
$50 = fills up a tank of gas so we can travel to every part of the district.
$100 = pays for 2,000 phone calls made by volunteers.

You can make a donation using this link here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-campaigncosts?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321costs3_yc_allop_xx_pt

Those everyday needs don’t even get into the bigger overhead costs like staff salaries, office space rental, and cumulative travel expenses. Which brings me to the reason I’m reaching out...

Usually , our budget includes about $800 per month in gas cards and other travel-related expenses so that we can reach voters where they are: on their front stoops, in coffee shops, at community events from Thornton all the way up to Greeley — pretty much anywhere there are people, we’re going there. These face to face conversations are the very core of our campaign, and we quite literally cannot run a successful race without them. With gas prices now at more than $4/gallon, that $800/month in travel costs is looking more like $1,400/month.

We won't cut back on outreach to voters — we can’t, because the outcome of this race is too important for Colorado families — so I’m asking if you can donate to help make up the difference. Here’s a link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-campaigncosts?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321costs3_yc_allop_xx_pt

Thanks so much for your help!

--

Elana Schrager
Campaign Manager
Email: info@caraveoforcongress.com
Donate Online: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/caraveo-campaigncosts?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220321costs3_yc_allop_xx_pt
Mailing address: Caraveo for Congress, PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614
PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
Caraveo for Congress, PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: You Don't Want To Miss This Op-ed!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fdaf0afa377b/you-dont-want-to-miss-this-op-ed?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

You may have caught a sneak peek of my latest op-ed "What It's Like Campaigning Alongside THE Herschel Walker" in the [AJC](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=4c559cfc5b&e=7bbb93570f). The truth is, I didn't get in this race to bash other Republicans, and I am not interested in using my campaign to broadcast Herschel Walker's personal baggage. BUT refusing to debate or be accessible to voters is unacceptable.

Please read my full op-ed on this issue below:
---
| | "What It's Like Campaigning Alongside THE Herschel Walker."
My name is Kelvin King. Recently, I qualified as a Republican candidate for the U.S. Senate in Georgia.

Though many people see this as the official start of our campaign, we have already invested 11 months of hard work into the race. I personally visited all of Georgia's 159 counties in 29 days, and, to date, have made 300 public appearances and counting. While at the same time, our campaign staff and volunteers established coordinators in each county, have put up hundreds of large signs, distributed thousands of yard signs and made tens of thousands of live dials.

My goal has always been to prove to Georgia voters that I am committed to being the hardest-working candidate in the race who is willing to earn their support the old-fashioned way...by looking in their eyes, listening to their concerns and shaking their hands.

In stark contrast, my opponent, who happens to be a Georgia football legend who I once admired as a young man, couldn’t be more disappointing. Herschel Walker talks about working hard and fighting for the interests of Georgians, yet he works behind the scenes to ensure a level of celebrity comfort and elusiveness, separating himself from the questions and engagement that Georgians demand. This is a campaign - not an autograph tour for those who can pay an access fee.

Imagine my surprise when we were told by Republican party leaders and activists of the “requirements” given just to have my celebrity opponent come speak with voters; he wants to be the only candidate in the room, he requests no video recording, he must have a private waiting area, he asks the county Republican party to create separate fliers for his attendance at events because he refuses to be seen on a flier with other candidates, and he’s asked for fees to be paid in order for him to attend and be accessible to voters.

I am not naive to the fact Herschel Walker is ahead in the polls. The problem is, neither is he. When he officially qualified last week, reporters swarmed to the typically evasive candidate, hungry to finally have an opportunity to ask him questions. The results were, as one might expect, puzzling. Speaking about himself in third person, he gave mostly baffling responses to basic inquiries but what did come across loud and clear was he has zero intention of debating in the primary.

We cannot expect a candidate to survive a vicious General Election when they spend the entire primary hiding behind celebrity status, President Trump’s endorsement, softball interviews, and “double bookings” that conveniently take place when forums are scheduled.

BUT the hard truth is, we cannot blame Herschel Walker for running his campaign like a celebrity if we continue to treat him like a celebrity. If Georgia voters are willing to give him an unearned victory, then we are broadcasting to the elites and superstars that they can have our country. So, the question is, “Are you willing to settle for selfies and autographs over qualifications and policy stances?” I’m not.

Therefore, I’m sounding the alarm. The candidate who wins the Republican primary and goes into the General Election against Raphael Warnock will be facing not only an incumbent, but also the number one Senate fundraiser in the country. A candidate who has the preference of the mainstream media, and who has shown that his ads and messaging has outperformed past Republican opponents. It will be a travesty if an unproven, unvetted, candidate who hasn’t shown the desire to engage or be challenged with political rigor, moves to the General Election. We all know that you “play like you practice.” We can’t afford to roll the dice with a candidate who hasn’t put in the practice to win.

Listen, folks, I see this campaign as an almost two-year-long interview process because I believe an informed voter is our best voter. We must demand that Herschel Walker, and each of my opponents, step on a debate stage in the Republican primary and prove they’re the best candidate to defeat Raphael Warnock and earn your support. At the very least this will prepare all candidates for the General Election in November. We cannot accept a candidate who is already showing us that he will only talk about working hard while expecting you to do the heavy lifting. I love the Republican Party...I love Georgia...and I love America! This U.S. Senate seat is too important to risk the country's direction and our future generations. Let’s require each candidate to give their best, so that we can vote for the best and ensure a win over Raphael Warnock and a win for America!
---
| Georgia deserves a candidate who is accessible and will answer to the people. As a graduate of the United States Air Force Academy, a proud veteran, and the owner of a successful construction company - I am ready and best qualified to defeat Warnock in November and ensure Georgia has a Senator who represents our conservative values in Washington.

With your support, we can win for Georgia and #WinforAmerica!

Very Respectfully,
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=d7e77da73d&e=7bbb93570f)
---
| | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=a5c2ac4a56&e=7bbb93570f)
---
| | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=6b2bd3d942&e=7bbb93570f)
---
| | [](mailto:kelvin@kelvinking.com)
---
|
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Kelvin King for Georgia, Inc.
2900 Delk Rd, Ste 700, PMB 268
Marietta, GA 30067

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=e90c927666&e=7bbb93570f&c=09e8dac64b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=e90c927666&e=7bbb93570f&c=09e8dac64b).

My goal has always been to prove to Georgia voters that I am committed to being the hardest-working candidate in the race who is willing to earn their support the old-fashioned way...by looking in their eyes, listening to their concerns and shaking their hands. In stark contrast, my opponent, who happens to be a Georgia football legend who I once admired as a young man, couldn’t be more disappointing. Herschel Walker talks about working hard and fighting for the interests of Georgians, yet he works behind the scenes to ensure a level of celebrity comfort and elusiveness, separating himself from the questions and engagement that Georgians demand. This is a campaign - not an autograph tour for those who can pay an access fee. Imagine my surprise when we were told by Republican party leaders and activists of the “requirements” given just to have my celebrity opponent come speak with voters; he wants to be the only candidate in the room, he requests no video recording, he must have a private waiting area, he asks the county Republican party to create separate fliers for his attendance at events because he refuses to be seen on a flier with other candidates, and he’s asked for fees to be paid in order for him to attend and be accessible to voters. I am not naive to the fact Herschel Walker is ahead in the polls. The problem is, neither is he. When he officially qualified last week, reporters swarmed to the typically evasive candidate, hungry to finally have an opportunity to ask him questions. The results were, as one might expect, puzzling. Speaking about himself in third person, he gave mostly baffling responses to basic inquiries but what did come across loud and clear was he has zero intention of debating in the primary. We cannot expect a candidate to survive a vicious General Election when they spend the entire primary hiding behind celebrity status, President Trump’s endorsement, softball interviews, and “double bookings” that conveniently take place when forums are scheduled. BUT the hard truth is, we cannot blame Herschel Walker for running his campaign like a celebrity if we continue to treat him like a celebrity. If Georgia voters are willing to give him an unearned victory, then we are broadcasting to the elites and superstars that they can have our country. So, the question is, “Are you willing to settle for selfies and autographs over qualifications and policy stances?” I’m not. Therefore, I’m sounding the alarm. The candidate who wins the Republican primary and goes into the General Election against Raphael Warnock will be facing not only an incumbent, but also the number one Senate fundraiser in the country. A candidate who has the preference of the mainstream media, and who has shown that his ads and messaging has outperformed past Republican opponents. It will be a travesty if an unproven, unvetted, candidate who hasn’t shown the desire to engage or be challenged with political rigor, moves to the General Election. We all know that you “play like you practice.” We can’t afford to roll the dice with a candidate who hasn’t put in the practice to win. Listen, folks, I see this campaign as an almost two-year-long interview process because I believe an informed voter is our best voter. We must demand that Herschel Walker, and each of my opponents, step on a debate stage in the Republican primary and prove they’re the best candidate to defeat Raphael Warnock and earn your support. At the very least this will prepare all candidates for the General Election in November. We cannot accept a candidate who is already showing us that he will only talk about working hard while expecting you to do the heavy lifting. I love the Republican Party...I love Georgia...and I love America! This U.S. Senate seat is too important to risk the country's direction and our future generations. Let’s require each candidate to give their best, so that we can vote for the best and ensure a win over Raphael Warnock and a win for America! | Georgia deserves a candidate who is accessible and will answer to the people. As a graduate of the United States Air Force Academy, a proud veteran, and the owner of a successful construction company - I am ready and best qualified to defeat Warnock in November and ensure Georgia has a Senator who represents our conservative values in Washington. With your support, we can win for Georgia and #WinforAmerica! Very Respectfully, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:kelvin@kelvinking.com | | Our mailing address is: Kelvin King for Georgia, Inc. 2900 Delk Rd, Ste 700, PMB 268 Marietta, GA 30067 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Statement of Amanda Orlando, Diehl for Massachusetts, regarding allegations of a delegate “scandal”
body:
| | | |
---
| Statement of Amanda Orlando, Diehl for Massachusetts, regarding allegations of a delegate "scandal"
BOSTON, Mass. - Amanda Orlando, Campaign Chair for the Geoff Diehl for Governor Campaign, issued the following statement today regarding allegations of a delegate "cheating scandal" alleged by the Doughty for Governor and Campanale for Lieutenant Governor Campaigns:--
"This past weekend, I attended a meeting of the Massachusetts Republican State Committee Credentials Committee on behalf of the Diehl for Governor campaign.
I find it sad that the Doughty and Campanale campaigns, one of which admitted to lying to the Credentials Committee, and the other who attempted to pass off an apparent registered Democrat as a delegate to the Republican convention, are arrogant enough to be accusing the Diehl campaign, which has been nothing but truthful and transparent, of wrongdoing.
The purpose of the Credentials Committee is to ensure the integrity of the party's nominating convention and the local caucusing process that elected delegates to serve. The Diehl for Governor campaign wholeheartedly supports and respects the Massachusetts Republican Party, the convention rules, and the delegates who have volunteered to serve at the convention. Case in point: Geoff Diehl is the only candidate for Governor who has thus far supported the convention by paying the $25,000 fee required to attend to be eligible for the primary ballot.
The MassGOP Credentials Committee found evidence, and presented it to both campaigns for Governor, that a certain multi-community caucus in western Massachusetts was organized without proper notice and was not run according to party rules.
Republican caucuses are the purview of local party committees, not statewide campaigns and are reliant upon specified rules being followed in order to insure voting integrity at the state party's annual convention. We support the Credentials Committee and its findings that notifications were not properly given prior to a handful of caucuses and I agreed, at the MassGOP Credentials Committee meeting, that those delegates had to be ruled ineligible.
These delegates were attempting to participate in good faith and we appreciate their efforts, which I also stated during the Credentials committee meeting.
It is the hope and intent of the Diehl for Governor campaign that all interested Republicans will have an opportunity to attend the nominating convention on May 21 as a way to unite our party and give a boost to our party's nominees for statewide office. Accusations of a "scandal" made today by the Doughty for Governor and Campanale for Lieutenant Governor campaigns are factually incorrect and inappropriate. The Diehl for Governor campaign calls upon those other candidates to retract their statements as they relate to Geoff Diehl and his campaign. Particularly since the representative of the Campanale campaign, Rep. Peter Durant, who attended the MassGOP Credentials Committee meeting on her behalf, admitted to lying to the group during the meeting about an inquiry related to Ms. Campanale's enrollment status.
Our campaign submitted evidence, undisputed by Mr. Durant, that Ms. Campanale changed her voting registration from Unenrolled to Republican on February 7, 2022 at the Spencer, MA town hall (the deadline to be a registered Republican for delegate eligibility is 12/31/2021.) The Credentials Committee will investigate the same and issue a finding, which our campaign will respect. I also introduced to the Credentials Committee evidence that Leslie Doughty, Chris Doughty's wife, who had registered to be a delegate, had previously been a registered Democrat, and asked the Credentials Committee to review her eligibility to serve as a delegate at the Republican convention."
###

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Protecting our public lands for the next generation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210663/336192677/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_na_20220321outdoors_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=)
---
Team, Before running for Congress, much of my career has been spent protecting our public lands, waters, wildlife, and outdoor traditions. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210664/336192678/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_na_20220321outdoors_gv_90da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=)
---
That’s why I founded the Nuestra Tierra Conservation Project, a national organization based in Las Cruces that aims to ensure that marginalized communities have access to the outdoors and that our history, values, and people are authentically reflected in public lands management.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210665/336192679/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_na_20220321outdoors_gv_90da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=)
---
For two years, I took [youth from southern New Mexico](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210666/336192680/-559753674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=&emci=ad909676-2fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=b6909676-2fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4482565) out into New Mexico’s beautiful lands and taught them activities [like how to fish, camp, raft, and hike](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210667/336192681/-803653937?v=XVUf9xvFz7k&ab_channel=KRWGnews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=&emci=ad909676-2fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=b6909676-2fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4482565). I’m grateful to have grown up with these traditions passed down to me, and it’s been an honor and pleasure to pass them on to the next generation.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210668/336192682/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_na_20220321outdoors_gv_90da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=)
---
A person’s income or background should never get in the way of their ability to enjoy New Mexico’s great outdoors, and that’s why I helped create a policy solution to get more New Mexico youth outdoors, by co-authoring the [New Mexico Outdoor Equity Fund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210669/336192683/-1900632973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=&emci=ad909676-2fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=b6909676-2fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4482565) with NM Rep. Angelica Rubio. The fund provides support for urban, rural, and Tribal communities to create outdoor programs for underserved youth, and since its creation, California and Colorado have created their own outdoor equity programs. A [national program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210670/336192684/1493401960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=&emci=ad909676-2fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=b6909676-2fa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4482565) is in the works.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210671/336192685/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_na_20220321outdoors_gv_90da_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=)
---
**Conserving our land, water, wildlife and natural resources for future generations is part of our New Mexican heritage.** I’ve been lucky to spend a life outdoors thanks to our public lands and the stewardship of past and present generations.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43210672/336192686/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_na_20220321outdoors_gv_90da_xx_img5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjkwOTY3Ni0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGw00H7zlrLaLhu6uSKZy-qsNTKDTFK_2J3ph_xzV-w=)
---
As a member of Congress, I’m committed to protecting our public lands so future generations can continue to enjoy and appreciate them too.
Thanks for reading, and I hope you spend some time outdoors this Spring.
Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico.

| Friend, It has been another successful weekend. We killed it! We are breaking records and our opponents' spirits. If we keep this up, we'll have no one left to talk to by the time the primary comes around. Let's keep up the momentum and the pressure and we'll be unstoppable.
---
|
---
| The Great American Comeback Rally: We are continuing to push our Great American Comeback Rally. | | Dear Peter, Have you seen our first TV ad yet? The campaign is getting real now, and I’m proud that your support means we’re up on TV and getting our message out. **Tobias is the leader Oregon needs to take us in a new direction and say the things other Democrats won’t.** **[Watch our first TV ad here, and consider a $15 contribution to our media fund to keep our message on the air.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43211234/336196270/428387590?refcode=em032122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGI4N2VmOS0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=onZc4MUQJv2ezbbgSzhQttbIZF1I2ostK6BC1Kzsv6A=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43211238/336196272/428387590?refcode=em032122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGI4N2VmOS0yZmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=onZc4MUQJv2ezbbgSzhQttbIZF1I2ostK6BC1Kzsv6A=) Oregon’s next Governor will have to confront rising gun violence and a homelessness crisis, and renew our commitment to public schools that have fallen behind. Tobias is no stranger to making tough decisions and breaking the mold to get things done. And he can rally us together to realize the enormous potential we have when we focus on the long run. **That’s the Tobias Oregonians need to see.** **[We want as many Oregonians as possible to see this. Jessica LaVigne

Tobias is the leader Oregon needs to take us in a new direction and say the things other Democrats won’t. = = Oregon’s next Governor will have to confront rising gun violence and a homelessness crisis, and renew our commitment to public schools that have fallen behind. That’s the Tobias Oregonians need to see. = Onward, Jessica LaVigne * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m in grave danger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvqhrdci551crl8q2kft9kggqc688rcjo7bluuvo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4pllmjgjaslh6opn4chmelge2o34sir64ojh63g7bcbic6qj7dlks9pr4p766urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8rmcdj76kqefclicooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgmeo70sjh64or24no)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqoind2r0b97v98etm1ffl1hhj2g65c4mcls6pr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge9oj2cdh2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9rrvo4nm7hi6905fr65vht4rce5m8qc9tk5g4v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge9oj2cdh2bs)

Do you support abolishing the Electoral College? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_032122_B2_AC_30D]

Every Republican president since 1988 has been elected without winning the popular vote, all thanks to the Electoral College. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_032122_B2_AC_30D]
It’s the reason Trump took office, and it let him nearly stage a coup in 2021.
It suppresses the vote just as much as the GOP’s latest restrictive laws.
In short, it has to go if we want to save our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_032122_B2_AC_30D]
We’re looking for 34 respondents in Ohio to complete our poll before midnight. Take the next 10 seconds to let us know if you support abolishing the Electoral College.
