name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4u37trsbuf42i86b68s1im0k6andotlkpm187t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge9oj2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8djicgoj8dhhmoomfd9ncdr35dr6cmpr9o36m2r6dcbk6oq62crnmgojeo3ge1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8rmcdj76kqefclicoon1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z87d1hjpane9a5poam0cm1joqu9nh6lpbi9bg4g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge9oj2cth2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4krv5sdb99l3vueij8gtqibvkj06f0vpn0uqnsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge9oj2cth2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z58i0a9s255087pih4g43fck1akh20lfhl5jfp60_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge9oj2cth2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqc3904jd5p7q18q1klhttklmj6trei97d5vi89o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge9oj2cth2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkedf04flrmreh0694dtkl61mfcqgkm3ejqpr78o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ge9oj2cth2bs)

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvjd70o93sph1hkh6a3e0k9uau4i7dbkfla7d8fo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp36ojkcaqmedbgeoorfc3nmhq7asb1e2oe2o9j6urm6cll63hjfcpl63i7dctgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj3cp5l65jrep3662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jm1p72c3gm8oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z602lg696qatj94cmpjumf8lajo2bl86etfg8k6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie4o71chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zho7dm7pan3qcml7pe64cr89o9q74d6loii7tlpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie4o71chh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z05qcfno2cthk0rt4earg1ubohqie31q0np0fqqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie4o71chh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr2k5dgmnj9e3n6fq52nn7oo27nprfv0f4ebbpkg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie4o71chh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1qf3a1a8t9r16epmcg548igk44iucfup6652mho_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie4o71chh2bs)

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: re: Conor Lamb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can’t let anyone buy their way into the Senate.
#
🚨 Derek, we just got bad news. **🚨**
**A dark money super PAC backing our opponent Conor Lamb’s campaign just released a nine-page memo directly attacking John.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45685?refcode=em20220321-5071&t=1&akid=5071%2E434096%2ENVikvf)
**The memo is bad news and chock-full of false Republican talking points.**
In their own polls, the Lamb campaign is 30 points behind John. Now, his super PAC is relying on lies and Fox News talking points to smear us.
**[Will you be a proud supporter of John Fetterman today and help our campaign defend itself? We need a surge of support from everyday people today to show that we will NOT allow anyone to buy this election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45685?refcode=em20220321-5071&t=2&akid=5071%2E434096%2ENVikvf)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45685?refcode=em20220321-5071&amounts=5&t=3&akid=5071%2E434096%2ENVikvf)**
Their super PAC’s plan is to drown out the power of our team, and buy their way in PA. It’s completely screwed up.
But with less than two months until the Democratic primary election, we can’t hesitate to fight back with everything we’ve got. **We can’t let anyone buy their way into the Senate, and we can’t let our momentum fall short.**
**[We’re counting on every single person who believes in the power of our campaign to take a stand against these new attacks from Lamb’s super PAC. Please donate $5 or anything you can to our campaign today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45685?refcode=em20220321-5071&t=4&akid=5071%2E434096%2ENVikvf)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45685?refcode=em20220321-5071&amounts=5&t=23&akid=5071%2E434096%2ENVikvf)**
We’re a campaign supported by people. John, Gisele, and our whole team think that’s the right way to do it, Derek. And it’s showing in the polls — we’re consistently the _only_ Democrat beating our GOP opponents.
It’s not an exaggeration to say our campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. We’re running this race the right way, and we know we can win with your continued support.
More soon,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220321-5071-footer&t=24&refcode2=5071_434096_NVikvf&akid=5071%2E434096%2ENVikvf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=5071%2E434096%2ENVikvf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5071%2E434096%2ENVikvf)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Mondaire
subject: Join Mondaire’s fight for a livable future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
We must address the climate crisis with the urgency this moment demands.
#

Folks,
Our planet is in peril. As global temperatures rise at an alarming rate, our federal government has a moral obligation to meet this moment and act now.
To get the ball rolling, Mondaire recently joined nearly 90 colleagues in urging President Biden to restart negotiations on the $555 billion in transformational climate provisions contained in the _Build Back Better Act_.
President Biden’s leadership is imperative to finalizing this once-in-a-generation legislation that will reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 2030 and ensure a livable future for generations to come. Mondaire is eager to partner with fellow Democrats and get this critical legislation across the finish line, but it’s going to take a group effort.
**[Friend, we cannot give up on climate action. To do so would be to give up on our future. So please, add your name to stand with Mondaire and his Democratic colleagues as they call on President Biden to address the climate crisis with the urgency it deserves:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43212345/336201853/-504407838?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220321_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU1MTMyOS0zNGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j91O4tvVXNMA2G1FCfTtzve7YWM3lm3oWcKLZGuheMc=&emci=5fdae343-1ba9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9fe51329-34a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896)**

In recent months, the Biden Administration has made great strides to halve US greenhouse gas emissions by tightening fuel mileage and enacting funding for a nationwide charging network—but we still have more work to do.
The climate provisions in the _Build Back Better Act_ will further our commitment to lead on climate justice, fund sustainable infrastructure projects, and expand good-paying job opportunities for folks across our country.
**[Our fight for a livable future for young people and future generations is of the utmost importance. Please stand with Mondaire today in calling on President Biden to resume negotiations and prioritize climate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43212347/336201855/-504407838?refcode=AU_MLJ_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220321_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU1MTMyOS0zNGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j91O4tvVXNMA2G1FCfTtzve7YWM3lm3oWcKLZGuheMc=&emci=5fdae343-1ba9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9fe51329-34a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24719896)**

clean_body: We must address the climate crisis with the urgency this moment demands. Folks, Our planet is in peril. As global temperatures rise at an alarming rate, our federal government has a moral obligation to meet this moment and act now. To get the ball rolling, Mondaire recently joined nearly 90 colleagues in urging President Biden to restart negotiations on the $555 billion in transformational climate provisions contained in the Build Back Better Act. President Biden’s leadership is imperative to finalizing this once-in-a-generation legislation that will reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 2030 and ensure a livable future for generations to come. Mondaire is eager to partner with fellow Democrats and get this critical legislation across the finish line, but it’s going to take a group effort. In recent months, the Biden Administration has made great strides to halve US greenhouse gas emissions by tightening fuel mileage and enacting funding for a nationwide charging network—but we still have more work to do. The climate provisions in the Build Back Better Act will further our commitment to lead on climate justice, fund sustainable infrastructure projects, and expand good-paying job opportunities for folks across our country. Friend, we must act now and address the climate crisis with the urgency this moment demands. Thank you for joining Mondaire in this fight. — Team Mondaire **= | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Capitol St. SW Suite 407 Washington, DC 20003 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Mondaire with a contribution, =.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Our country is in crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Woke education in our schools. Taxes, inflation, and the cost of basic necessities all through the roof. A fentanyl drug crisis in our neighborhoods. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/459d0c7c8a58/our-country-is-in-crisis?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=8a02ed8148&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

Our country is speeding in the wrong direction.

Woke education in our schools. Taxes, inflation, and the cost of basic necessities all through the roof. Embarrassment on the international stage. A radical defund the police agenda. Open borders allowing criminal illegals and a fentanyl drug crisis in our neighborhoods.

I've seen it first-hand on the Prince William County Board of Supervisors.

The radical agenda of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi has filtered down to our local government. Over the last several years I've found myself battling the national Democrat agenda at the local level. Instead of focusing on your best interests, even your local Democrat representatives are focusing their attention on protecting illegal immigrants and implementing a woke education agenda in our schools.

**We need to correct the course of our country, and we need to do it now.**

That's why I decided to run for Congress so that we can put an end to this national agenda, correct the course of our country, and restore commonsense at every level of government.

This November, we have an opportunity to take back a Republican majority in the House of Representatives and stop Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi - but I can't do it without your help.

My opponent will spend millions of dollars to try to save her seat and keep the radical Democrat majority. I need your help to defeat her.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help me reclaim a Republican majority and put an end to the radical left-wing agenda that's destroying our country?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=be588a7de6&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7ac9701055&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=8a9b718786&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $50](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3c728709d0&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6b55f53bc9&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=28a43ca0cf&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
Your contribution to my campaign is critical to taking back the House of Representatives.

Let's put an end to the disastrous leadership that's destroying our country. I appreciate your support, and I look forward to working together to restore commonsense to our country.

Thank you,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Do you still care about election integrity?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
You have to read this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2f3cb9a012&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Do you still care about election integrity?

**I only ask because my campaign has been doing statistics on my fundraising support,[and we are short our monthly target for your area by $786.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=518cef8994&e=44b8c466b0)**

**_[Yes. Just $786.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8ff9dcce46&e=44b8c466b0)_**

We need to reach this goal to by the end of the FIRST QUARTER of 2022. This is the most important deadline yet. We need to show broad support for election integrity, not just deep support.

**And this is why[we desperately need just $786 more dollars](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e8b6ae67cc&e=44b8c466b0) of local support from your area. If we can get this by the end of the month, then we will just BARELY reach our fundraising goal by the end of the month.**
[***Donation Rush of $25***](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=00f0fae3ec&e=44b8c466b0)

**[*Donate $786 Now*](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=95f22c304e&e=44b8c466b0)**
Let me tell you why the first quarter goal matters so much.

**Our campaign has broken records!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7049f01f1b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Do you want to hear something crazy?

**If you add up ALL of the donors from 2018 for the Arizona Secretary of State Race across ALL candidates, my donors for this cycle alone are SIX TIMES THAT NUMBER!**

Talk about support for Election Integrity. That is INCREDIBLE.

**Which is why it makes me so sad and disheartened that[we are short JUST $786 from your area](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e84c8b4549&e=44b8c466b0). If we could hit our goal now, it would send a huge message nationwide that Election Integrity Patriots won’t back down!**
**[*Does your area support Election Integrity?*](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e2f651443f&e=44b8c466b0)**
This is our most important deadline yet, and we have a huge opportunity to show Leftists in America that they have something to be scared of this November. We will never back down. We know who won in 2020.

[_Donate today to help us reach our urgent end of quarter goal._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ee3c0539d3&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Help us reach our local target tonight! Donate up to $786 or more!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9af0f50420&e=44b8c466b0)_

Thank you for your support!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3fd485e4eb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=19adead96d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=19adead96d).

body:
Green's I need your help! I am now working towards spreading the word about my campaign. To make a dent, to impact the world, the fight to r
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/87N_jNYs4/c?w=OqUUnGwcavZLuLi5w1KwRS6ZlVr2v-YtovPuePOF_bA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzg3Tl9qTllzND9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjZlMzRiODhkLTQzMjktNDMwNy1iNDNmLTViODVkNTNjZTI1YSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Green Party should be the first party!
---
| | |
---
| | Green's I need your help! I am now working towards spreading the word about my campaign. To make a dent, to impact the world, the fight to regain our democracy from the control of the two party system is not through money. Now that we have a Green Party candidate on the Ballot in California for United States Senate the work is to spread the word. Months ago I created a Youtube channel and videos. I got my campaign information (early on) posted on Ballotpedia and Wikipedia. I did interviews. And campaign accounts have been active for months on FaceBook, Twitter and Instagram. The campaign officially began this week, and for nearly 10 months I have slowly and very early ramped up a campaign that could gain traction across California. A campaign focused on the spreading the Green Party Platform. Please get to know my campaign. The full platform is on [www.henk4senate.com](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/87N_jNYs4/c?w=a_UYorodlMYcWR69nXhKrnNormXsDy4Xu5ZwWyL_vec.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVuazRzZW5hdGUuY29tIiwiciI6IjI2M2MwNGM4LTE5NTgtNDc0NC0zNDgxLTBjMzhhOWFiMTgyNSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjZlMzRiODhkLTQzMjktNDMwNy1iNDNmLTViODVkNTNjZTI1YSJ9). I post daily on social media. And will be relying on a free campaign that includes writing Op-Eds, creating videos and participating in political interviews. I have a masters degree in social work. I grew up poor. In the city of Long Beach. I now work as a substitute teacher. I represent no one person or entity. I am in solidarity with the poor and working class. I believe environmentally we will see an increasingly destructive and uninhabitable planet. I have been registered and voting Green for 30 years, I believe the party's time has come to shine. Thank you for taking time to read this message.Sincerely, James "Henk" Conn

name: Jim Jordan
subject: This is the last chance to save New York
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZELDIN-ESPOSITO 2022
body:
I’m writing this message today in support of my great friend and colleague in the House, the unanimous Conservative Party choi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbt9knunnvlbd3nkj6mh63hcl0bc1ja10b0bb7eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sdgsiqmaolkm4q30ojkmkpr6sbmm1ib0thjc4o75c9me6qned316ep76sb6mlgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aollmhg7ep3664pb6p37m2qmash5u)
|
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0pgnm1c632dbb3usen6jkdcjtdvro8l6rf7ugq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or6c3h2bs)
---
| Friend,

I’m writing this message today in support of my great friend and colleague in the House, _the unanimous Conservative Party choice_ and officially-endorsed Republican candidate in the race for New York Governor: **Congressman Lee Zeldin.**

Enough can’t be said about this patriot’s record... Lee served our country in Operation Iraqi Freedom in the Army, and has been working hard to serve New York families ever since he was elected to the State Senate in 2010 and the U.S. House in the historic 2014 election.

But now he’s facing his biggest test yet - **Lee** **wants to Save New York from one-party Democrat rule, ending the far-left policies that have been laying waste to a once-great state.**

If that’s a mission you want to help him with, [**_will you join me in backing Lee Zeldin’s campaign to take back his state from radical Democrats like Governor Kathy Hochul and District Attorney Alvin Bragg?_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl8oo0pcn778i7959ntj927pt3k7b88du0ibto08_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or6c3h2bs)
---
| [HELP LEE ZELDIN’S CAMPAIGN FOR GOVERNOR: CHIP IN TODAY!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgcds3fpgcdd59nsi5jacd8qhpg2t4eb8q6hj7k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or6c3h2bs "HELP LEE ZELDIN’S CAMPAIGN FOR GOVERNOR: CHIP IN TODAY!")
---
| [**_Your support - whether it be large or small_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztbhqmm00ugora20i8f8m1n5leh4rbagg50ud7io_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or6c3h2bs) \- can help deliver another historic victory in a place where we need Republicans to start winning again.

Lee knows that this win is something that New York desperately needs right now, with out of control crime, rising costs, assaults on freedom and government mandates pushing the state to the brink and causing citizens to flee.

**_So rush in your support to help him change that - this patriot needs our help now more than ever if he’s going to stop the Democrat Machine and Save New York before it’s gone for good!_**
---
| | [RUSH IN TO HELP LEE SAVE NY!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ept50v2vvsb2blm8nu55msim6q359sed0dmkdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or6c3h2bs "RUSH IN TO HELP LEE SAVE NY!")
---
| Thank you for joining me in backing Lee Zeldin as the next Governor of New York!

For Liberty,
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlqoooo5a4e403bdc7tjk32edac1rulafdmg1j7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or6c3h2bs)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: asking you for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ][IMG]

Folks, it’s absolutely critical that we elect Tim Ryan to the
Senate—here are five big reasons why making a $5 donation right now is so
important:

1. Tim’s facing off against 5 GOP millionaires who can self-fund their
campaigns.

2. Republicans have already spent more than $80 million in this race—and
it’s sure to ramp up in the coming weeks and months.

3. Tim’s out-of-touch GOP opponents don’t give a damn about hardworking
Ohioans.

4. Electing Tim is Democrats’ best shot at expanding our Democratic Senate
majority.

5. If Tim wins he’ll join me in the Senate and together we’ll give Ohio
the most pro-worker delegation in the country.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9556?t=1009&amount=5&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Tim’s GOP opponents are millionaires backed by billionaires that think
they can buy this open seat—can I count on you to chip in just $5 to Tim’s
campaign to prove them wrong?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9555?t=1007&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Chip in $5

I know a thing or two about tough races—and I’ve proven that Democrats can
win in Ohio.

When I first got elected to office, I would spend my weekends visiting
union halls and factories, because if you want to fight for workers, you
need to show up and talk to them directly. That’s also how I’ve been able
to fend off my own GOP challengers in every one of my Senate campaigns.

Whether it’s in Congress or on the campaign trail—Tim has proven time and
time again that he’ll go to bat for hardworking Ohioans.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9556?t=1010&amount=5&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Tim has what it takes to win and flip this seat blue, but I’m counting
on you to help him. Will you chip in $5 or more to elect him to the
Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9556?t=1011&amount=5&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Donate $5 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9556?t=1012&amount=25&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9556?t=1013&amount=50&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9556?t=1014&amount=100&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9556?t=1015&amount=250&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9556?t=1016&amount=30&akid=2896%2E3611125%2E7bYtMG ]Other Amount

The last thing Ohio needs is an out-of-touch millionaire in the Senate.

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown
Senator, Ohio

body:
Peter, we got our hands on this report from GOP leaders.

Hey Peter – ***Internal GOP news alert*** We got our hands on a copy of the Republican State Leadership Committee’s plan for the 2022 midterm elections. We'll give you a preview here, but the main gist is that Republicans are trying to expand their grip on state legislatures across the country. [__**We can't let the GOP continue to control the majority of states in our country. Chip in here to fight back.**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43213150/336205352/311099802?refcode2=cba6ee52-38a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=220321_URD_rslc_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiYTZlZTUyLTM4YTktZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RYoBcfXaCaYKFvePbsOXxJDNVQI7DWcc3eCgIWDk6Ps=) The GOP report shows that Republicans are looking to flip Colorado and Minnesota, and they are also targeting Illinois, Maine, Nevada, New Mexico, Oregon, and Washington. **Right now, rural states are incredibly vulnerable to either continuing under or falling to GOP control.** Democrats have some serious catching up to do – Republicans recently released a poll showing them up in key states: +1 in Colorado and +4 in Minnesota. **Peter, Democrats are barely hanging on to their majorities in the states we need to stop from flipping red.** We have to show rural Americans in these key states that they hold all the power – and it's time for us to mobilize. name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcpbf1vr47nfj647ifdqgk845o2qfgll8399e7i0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ukq70tj5mhi72srlcdhj7dble2q77d34euqjadbic5ir0t9jmmrj7cj36dj64dpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchncor69d9icup78phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1ctge9ob3c5h649fg)
| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9qmvddf0gitahk606l8h6dujiog25g2u20p368o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or1c9h2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo6o731k2ujbgif9jd3lc7tvgvsm50gv27aomb4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or1c9h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfvv9mjjveli1vsle68rdd5d0vihidk2sdia14e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or1c9h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbg2m01ugdlmaoie4k97rfmmutqciioertadqs18_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or1c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgtheof91q319bor1k4o769m3q2h5eu6610vrvh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7c3ie2or1c9h2bs)

name: Team Tina
subject: [POLL] Equal pay for equal work

Hi Peter,

Tina is absolutely committed to fighting for equal pay. Because it's pretty simple - **_equal work should mean equal pay._**

For **everyone.**

In 2017 when she was Speaker of the House, Tina successfully passed the **Oregon Equal Pay Act.** This new law expanded upon existing federal and state law to improve equal pay protections and reduce persistent pay gaps between genders, races, and other groups.

This is the kind of legislation that Tina will fight for as our Governor. She will fight for legislation that supports working women and all our families.

And, as Governor, she will fight for these things nationally. Across the country right now, people are debating whether everyone should have equal pay for equal work. So we want to know:
**Do you stand with Tina in the fight to ensure equal pay across the country?** [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213378/336206599/-768153097?ms=em22_220321_eqpaydaypoll&refcode=em22_220321_eqpaydaypoll&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc1NjQ1YS0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uCFSKWUl7t3FeWzFqKjZKYFNOstVaU4g4CuaGF4Y4wc=&emci=6da1053d-24a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f675645a-38a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15353729) [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213379/336206600/-768153097?ms=em22_220321_eqpaydaypoll&refcode=em22_220321_eqpaydaypoll&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc1NjQ1YS0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uCFSKWUl7t3FeWzFqKjZKYFNOstVaU4g4CuaGF4Y4wc=&emci=6da1053d-24a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f675645a-38a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15353729) [UNSURE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213380/336206601/-768153097?ms=em22_220321_eqpaydaypoll&refcode=em22_220321_eqpaydaypoll&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc1NjQ1YS0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uCFSKWUl7t3FeWzFqKjZKYFNOstVaU4g4CuaGF4Y4wc=&emci=6da1053d-24a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f675645a-38a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15353729)
Things like "equal pay for equal work" are not just good for women and communities of color. These kinds of improvements are good for everyone and good for our nation. When people aren't paid what they deserve, our families and communities ultimately pay the price.
**Where do you stand on this issue?** [TAKE THE POLL NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43213381/336206604/-768153097?ms=em22_220321_eqpaydaypoll&refcode=em22_220321_eqpaydaypoll&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjc1NjQ1YS0zOGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uCFSKWUl7t3FeWzFqKjZKYFNOstVaU4g4CuaGF4Y4wc=&emci=6da1053d-24a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f675645a-38a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15353729)

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene just called our NATO allies “Nazis”
body:
Derek,
My name is Marcus Flowerss and I'm running for Congress to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia. Last week, she actually recited a Putin talking point, referring to the North American Treaty Organization as a bunch of #NATONazis:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF]
Are you kidding me??
Listen, I know Marjorie Taylor Greene knows just about NOTHING when it comes to foreign policy - but you’d think she’d at least know not to call our NATO allies a bunch of Nazis.
But, as usual, Marjorie Taylor Greene finds new ways to embarrass all of us.
I’ll say it unequivocally: I believe in Ukraine’s democracy and I believe NATO can be a power for good. I know this from first-hand experience as I proudly served our country overseas on multiple continents.
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a make-believe “patriot” with zero understanding of how things work. Enough is enough. Can you split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood today to help put an end to her political career? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly]DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mf?refcode=20220321_CGVA_MF]
I’m sick and tired of the radical right embarrassing America on the global stage. It’s time to flip this seat into Democratic hands and get rid of these lunatics in Congress once and for all.
Thanks for helping me build a better America,
Marcus Flowers
(Army veteran. Patriot. Democrat. Marcus Flowers is the Democrat running to defeat Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia's 14th District. This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/31927015-94a0-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/56558f1e-5aa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjU1OGYxZS01YWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUbDa57947l751r6ZU2TlP8fE-dW9oJc5mwnA1zQg5I=&id=108609855 .

But, as usual, Marjorie Taylor Greene finds new ways to embarrass all of us. I’ll say it unequivocally: I believe in Ukraine’s democracy and I believe NATO can be a power for good. I know this from first-hand experience as I proudly served our country overseas on multiple continents. Marjorie Taylor Greene is a make-believe “patriot” with zero understanding of how things work. Enough is enough. Can you split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood today to help put an end to her political career? [] [ $25 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Donate ANY [] I’m sick and tired of the radical right embarrassing America on the global stage. It’s time to flip this seat into Democratic hands and get rid of these lunatics in Congress once and for all. Thanks for helping me build a better America, Marcus Flowers (Army veteran. Patriot. Democrat. Marcus Flowers is the Democrat running to defeat Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia's 14th District. This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.) clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | But the GOP is doing EVERYTHING in their power to pass voter suppression bills and STOP Democrats from winning in the midterms. If we’re going to save our Majorities in November, we need to protect the right to vote and pass Automatic Voter Registration!! Ever since Trump’s humiliating defeat in 2020, Republicans have been working around the clock to suppress the right to vote. They know that when Americans vote, [!!!!!] Thanks for signing, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . I’m glad to have you by my side.

| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, As we start the new year, I’m _**proud**_ to have you by my side. Now, I’m **URGING** you to accept my offer and join my exclusive Chairman’s Club. [I’ve asked so many times -- and my offer still stands. But if you want to ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION and join the Chairman’s Club, now is the time to do it.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ZoTZNeVkUW8bigk_kgmqoYBiMLyGzm_3y3cASnhF-R1gQqEkYG5DLjHkybhbVYyOn5_dTnCIj1QCPnxWMoeolRsorI1C-HMxT7415cmaocunbj91WISzdsZimijbBVo28KDFlOzeB3fAbVuVi4Dpd3QzvJMYjLLS6o_5YQhAqgv7dbvfkr-6p0FgF3IfWZFf2mKsqPoyY50ZOlE5kN0fg-KCmwy5nXbfrYJv_qejlOhtOX7cfIIvZ2Xfnr5xEb_jS3UmEzp8f3Zdq7mN6ZTT0TDFlmoNQuDCRLkLdLxPb6q652LyLcWfcw0cjvZ4pOxdNXycEJ0sLATqa9IX-cwRpg&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=274061149675677221&n=1) I’m opening the Chairman’s Club to new members in 2022, and it’s so very important to me for you to be on the official supporters list. name: Primary Sinema Project
subject: Ousting Sinema isn't our only goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
We’re also trying to maintain — and expand — our Democratic majority in the Senate. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_TyymKqccPzSjHzJbdhn-b0MwHc40iE0IVIfjj-i3tyDjRQ-uPPEKsEcWWtATko-O4NX58yQ9f2GBXERyzIHoJLmjJqvul4J6ioyJVo79Sva7MlgNw_N700_D3L3kmAKQ0RQb8SA5K0F6sVbAmXp_kbTT9-hXdBP2f2F5JYve0hHVE_IDSwTNLtOk1TsT_ETif-zv0xFdFvStv1ijx7wIa/3kj/dep0Pp6mSxGEXawUdAS6Rw/h0/BZHj-UJYBzNel0c9lrCFDIvmi9qO4lhj0MEj-Uzek-Q)
Peter, Our goal at the Primary Sinema Project isn't just to oust Kyrsten Sinema from the U.S. Senate. **It's to maintain — and expand — our Democratic majority in the Senate, too.** So, over the next few months, we're going to be sharing opportunities for you to help support other campaigns in Congress. First up is one of the most endangered Democrats on the ballot this year: **Sinema's Arizona colleague, Senator Mark Kelly.** By continuing to block President Biden's agenda and rob Democrats of big successes they can run on, Sinema makes it crystal clear that she doesn't care about Sen. Kelly's re-election. But we do. **[That's why we're asking you to split a contribution between Mark Kelly's re-election campaign and Primary Sinema Project today. Will you chip in?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSfDUks0L2VppEjDkq_NeIglt8uVYJDlgI0XJ6LJMnCBY_lkq-PqaI2FzC3jF77SuRLR2E8A6KPah6HSyeiwludGXQS51XIQuRdAfua92IVk5K0K3BtjWpHwluRThs_OcGVO7diuUm6_0GXV07TRomSBBxK47rBbX_PHdBzwoYbQkFWQ8G5TbQiXGWN0wrKEXl27kBhns0qPvhS2O9ioLJlXwXxtxUWoOGktuQM7V4y1_BSo3YUhoYKc9G4u90QKIem4lQva_yZal2cdbakZHq4bkBEupK5sRheG-mtz1-5KvCVltbMMoUBrGRwx1GRAnS/3kj/dep0Pp6mSxGEXawUdAS6Rw/h1/UlF0I-opWZRp0LPA0k4K-Lty-BS1Y_w28NPEC-6UlT4)** **[Contribute $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSfDUks0L2VppEjDkq_NeIglt8uVYJDlgI0XJ6LJMnCBYZcyZEX4i9L_iq7b5txh0V6XmFMpIcbUqeX7tmJzaQKwtPO-SfzHYsbqxSr6NMqQg0X2C8dWb49KlLRz1o_fR6WONI_1LxNsaxIkIvRX6vEeV5QxQ4ssSTfpC9Umv2QQWBMFQCqeXkRPyBUQ7wQqEc5gsCSsUtmxJNxz4Na2itvcGLN-Z7mfH3et_ntukvyefYN-kl3-VVuQShBzOjtNfTyqLOLBpadHqJ-eOHNwU0NaZZc6Y__JPs0x_gqI6IghAPA21k9wbQi00fY5Fq4HqE/3kj/dep0Pp6mSxGEXawUdAS6Rw/h2/0-ih118aw66ELQJE9hgA1pG0nKmCaGE6ztYGmJC204E)** We're focusing on maintaining and expanding the Senate majority in the midterms — because what good is a Senate without Kyrsten Sinema if everyone else in it won't support things like reforming the filibuster, protecting abortion access, and drug pricing reform? Plus, if we can flip a few seats in addition to re-electing every Democratic senator, _we could actually render Kyrsten Sinema's obstructionism completely irrelevant this cycle._ Right now, the Senate is split 50-50. So we need to re-elect every single Democratic senator on the ballot this year if we're going to make any progress on key issues like climate change, voting rights, or abortion. Unfortunately, Sinema is making it harder by the day for Democrats to win. But if we come out strong for Mark Kelly, we'll help him build his campaign, spread the word, and show the people of Arizona why he actually deserves to be re-elected. **[Your contribution will be automatically split between Mark Kelly's re-election campaign and Primary Sinema Project, so please contribute what you can today. Mark Kelly and the entire Democratic senate majority might depend on it!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSfDUks0L2VppEjDkq_NeIglt8uVYJDlgI0XJ6LJMnCBYC2jphRP1MRbo9kugPMZcvDFYMwaz7OC1ztUtGsifBQ3WO93X84iSotgDjJu1QKybMBXP13qfzXZKh0FrJ3BMUqXA9ioMwgm6_DoG4Ve9Ey_dP53vzg2sEgDH3miHgoDAgzoZNnQnE9NSUYbv5xwPiAXqlEVMyArLzQjflM0Fz-YK7fLPxDkoLgvQsQaAZg5dmxQ_-JDx0aAqlJnB_JrAhE1qPSB_8Gk-BPsg9Z4ANf9N7wowpZwlGxq6Uf3pyIm-sQ-QtH0cmZ93utOnW5Zbf/3kj/dep0Pp6mSxGEXawUdAS6Rw/h3/_VRE33oVZtA9_B3H8SAR-0mzL1BnFcVgpjukTARYdVk)** Nearly every issue we care about is on the line — and they all hinge on Democrats keeping our majority. Join us and let's do our part to make that happen by supporting Mark Kelly today. More soon, Primary Sinema Project

clean_body: We’re also trying to maintain — and expand — our Democratic majority in the Senate. | | | Peter, Our goal at the Primary Sinema Project isn't just to oust Kyrsten Sinema from the U.S. Senate. It's to maintain — and expand — our Democratic majority in the Senate, too. So, over the next few months, we're going to be sharing opportunities for you to help support other campaigns in Congress. First up is one of the most endangered Democrats on the ballot this year: Sinema's Arizona colleague, Senator Mark Kelly. By continuing to block President Biden's agenda and rob Democrats of big successes they can run on, Sinema makes it crystal clear that she doesn't care about Sen. Kelly's re-election. But we do. We're focusing on maintaining and expanding the Senate majority in the midterms — because what good is a Senate without Kyrsten Sinema if everyone else in it won't support things like reforming the filibuster, protecting abortion access, and drug pricing reform? Plus, if we can flip a few seats in addition to re-electing every Democratic senator, we could actually render Kyrsten Sinema's obstructionism completely irrelevant this cycle. Right now, the Senate is split 50-50. So we need to re-elect every single Democratic senator on the ballot this year if we're going to make any progress on key issues like climate change, voting rights, or abortion. Unfortunately, Sinema is making it harder by the day for Democrats to win. But if we come out strong for Mark Kelly, we'll help him build his campaign, spread the word, and show the people of Arizona why he actually deserves to be re-elected. Nearly every issue we care about is on the line — and they all hinge on Democrats keeping our majority. Join us and let's do our part to make that happen by supporting Mark Kelly today. More soon, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: Josh Harder
subject: our new HQ!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIZWx1KMlgKwAFNQIQhqP66yBkxSjVaHTxmEeLIqnag=/8Oq0aOA8BE2l1dbH1q8Vq8PWrrCirsqaapZYGMzIhEI=?refcode=E14659-20220321-Office-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter -- Some decisions I have to make are tough and hard. This time, it was an easy call. **My campaign team came to me and said we needed to invest in an office.** We want a dedicated space our volunteers and organizers can use as a new "hub" of activity to meet and hold events, run our volunteer programs, and be a part of the broader community. It was an easy green light from me, and happy to say our team moved in this week! We intentionally placed our HQ right in the middle of Stockton, our largest city, and one of the most important communities for us to do early community organizing in. There are tens of thousands of persuadable voters in Stockton, and it's vital our grassroots organization is a part of the community. **However, with our first end of quarter fundraising deadline coming up at the end of this month, I 'm hoping this grassroots team can help us make up the hole this has caused in our budget. **We're currently about $10,000 short for the big deadline. I need your help to make sure this doesn't detract from our fundraising progress, because if we look weak in our first end-of-quarter report, Kevin McCarthy will rush millions more of his corporate PAC money to try and flip our seat. If you believe in grassroots organizing, this is the time we need your help! I'm dropping a custom ActBlue link below so I can track all our supporters who help us meet this goal. [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-March2022-FR-March?refcode=Peter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jIZWx1KMlgKwAFNQIQhqP66yBkxSjVaHTxmEeLIqnag=/8Oq0aOA8BE2l1dbH1q8Vq8PWrrCirsqaapZYGMzIhEI=?refcode=E14659-20220321-Office-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Thanks for everything,
-- Josh

body:
Do you support protecting the unborn? | | | Friend,

_Life is winning again in America._

Last month, South Carolina [enacted common-sense legislation](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=a422c18758&e=edf8a4d16d) to protect unborn lives after a fetal heartbeat is detected.

_**The abortion lobby was outraged**_ \- and a Planned Parenthood lawsuit allowed a Federal Circuit Court to stop South Carolina Attorney General Alan Wilson from enforcing their state's pro-life law.

**Republican Attorneys General are standing their ground.**

Alabama Attorney General [Steve Marshall is leading a 21-state amicus brief](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=5ecd21bc6f&e=edf8a4d16d) supporting South Carolina's pro-life legislation. As pro-abortion Democrats and liberal activists try to thwart any conservative effort to defend life, _Rule of Law Attorneys General haven't stopped fighting for the unborn._

In states across the nation, Republican Attorneys General are the last line of defense against the progressive assault on our fundamental values.
[_**> >PITCH IN TO SUPPORT PRO-LIFE LEADERS TODAY<<**_](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=accef8c359&e=edf8a4d16d)

_This event is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to transform these students' lives and set them on the path to SAVE our country and WIN the American Culture War._ **You see, the radical Left has proclaimed a particularly vicious WAR on American women.** They're letting biological boys into locker rooms. name: Letitia
subject: The last two years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215328/336215163/265476937?code=jtk374-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIxNDkwOS00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wt5YqfGVx2zpB-Uum9xJr4Ym2-9PKQbMbarYQYCIzN0=)
---
Peter, two years ago, the earth seemed to shift beneath our feet.

Suddenly, entire families found themselves stuck at home, having to navigate a full house at all hours of the day. Those lucky enough to have jobs that could be done remotely turned their living rooms and kitchens into makeshift offices. And many who could not work remotely watched their paychecks come to a terrifying halt.

**It almost seems impossible that, two years later, we are still fighting the disastrous impacts of COVID-19. But know this: New York WILL get through this trying time.

Peter, the last two years have been long and exhausting for us all, but as we work to rebuild, I need to know how the pandemic has impacted your life and shifted your priorities. [My team set a goal to collect 5,000 responses before midnight tomorrow, so please take 60 seconds now to take my survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215329/336215164/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk374-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIxNDkwOS00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wt5YqfGVx2zpB-Uum9xJr4Ym2-9PKQbMbarYQYCIzN0=&emci=8b4d2701-3ba5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=94214909-40a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215330/336215165/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk374-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIxNDkwOS00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wt5YqfGVx2zpB-Uum9xJr4Ym2-9PKQbMbarYQYCIzN0=&emci=8b4d2701-3ba5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=94214909-40a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)
---
COVID-19 has devastated far too many. Nearly _**600,000 New York househol**_ _**ds**_ are still behind on rent. **_T_**** _ens of thousands _****_of New Yorke_** _**rs**_ — including too many of our most vulnerable nursing home residents — have lost their lives. And communities of color, who have long suffered under an unequal system, have been hit the **_hardest_**.

**I have spent every moment of the last two years fighting to defend New Yorkers from the worst impacts of COVID-19, but this pandemic continues to change every day. And while we may _finally_ ****be approaching the end of the disease, the consequences continue to devastate. That’s why my team set a goal to hear from 5,000 fearless fighters, but I’m still missing your voice. **

**[Peter, I urgently need to hear your story. Will you take one moment to share your thoughts, concerns, and priorities with me in this quick survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215331/336215166/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk374-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIxNDkwOS00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wt5YqfGVx2zpB-Uum9xJr4Ym2-9PKQbMbarYQYCIzN0=&emci=8b4d2701-3ba5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=94214909-40a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43215332/336215167/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk374-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDIxNDkwOS00MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wt5YqfGVx2zpB-Uum9xJr4Ym2-9PKQbMbarYQYCIzN0=&emci=8b4d2701-3ba5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=94214909-40a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for joining this fight.

Letitia

name: Steve Daines
subject: Half of Americans doubt this is going to happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| _“[**A new Wall Street Journal poll found**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9e152b1d75c74cd8b15b5a4679007b09&_e=XL5Rs_BPr0V4iPAGSg3txJhtbJcWWF2JZgg4Q6sPcHPAsH7XrswDQSIQHPxnmPFc1ZLjo1mRMO-rR-7V3QsbctUH2-1GPTp6AIH01YHKCnbxCyhWCSesS6N0sC-u3Q2JETt_491bxYGGsCiK2WJ0ovrbuLu70wjkjFEVlxf10eTiUKWz6y6ZIK8UjAYDv7IxQ_ozzvaaVDKQ_YrOgAHmIbqNB0tEEMUJISUpEHcxmRyZxNOxGsm-n2Plh3UgdafJgyNc4yJ2XfPXgIYygEG-7YkB7qIm8Rv_VJgz6TfCSdkE9TdEl5JqrLwNxmCLw-tX-3o8R945OV6ZwFrtfXD_St-JlzizxCHvktZkKABgvJ0%3D) that 52% of Americans don’t think Mr. Biden will run for re-election in two years, while 29% do expect him to pursue a second term.”_
---
While it’s a couple of years away, it’s important to start thinking about who Republicans’ competition will be in the 2024 Presidential race. As a Republican Senator deeply vested in our party’s success both in ’22 and ’24, I’m very curious to know where donors like you stand on the question of whether President Biden should seek another term in the White House.

Do you have 30 seconds to answer a few survey questions for me and my friends at the National Republican Senatorial Committee? As always, your participation is most valuable.
**Should Biden seek a 2nd term?**

name: Ed Humphreys
subject: There's A Big Train Coming Down The Track
disclaimer_text: paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
## March 21, 2022
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# There's A Big Train Coming Down The Track

---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YhIUaL9PaHb_Byj39Z8H6x10W34BB2TQnA2pWS63DqKifVwuIk2JhV45jy5amEFajp7jhYUQWuGzaC9C9Je5VD22BocGXaE9ExiX5RwCIJFeygdpPknOuxEDoz2kXb8f3c4_zWHikvRTeKJODGPGg==&c=lxhhl7rCY07F1U8xi3yVM5oOluaaBq2XV9XXwQ9PATMxpvuovtmndA==&ch=ymLADCBqD2aVN2HWlJHGnCo59LSrQZ5VLfjO5uKnHeZuX-RmEjoEqQ==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| | |
### A Message From Ed

We have come a long way in the last 10 months. There are only 56 days left until Election Day. Hundreds of people have devoted themselves to take the campaign to this point. When it comes to elections, all scoring will happen in the last 2 minutes of the 4th quarter. We are in the 4th quarter now.
So much has been sacrificed for this country. Now we are at risk of being a part of the first generation to pass America off in WORSE shape than we inherited it. Thankfully, there is a movement unfolding across America. It's our time to act. Here's what I'm asking; spend the next 56 days with us and make history.
Not only do we need more engaged volunteers but we need more money to pay for our advertising budget during this last and most intense sprint. I promise you that I will work 16-18 hours a day, 6 days a week. We have the right plan, a compelling message and the best content. Please help us pay to advertise it so every Idahoan can see what you see.

---
| |
---
# If you want to abolish the income tax, cap property taxes, and implement school choice in Idaho then donate RIGHT NOW!
---
| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YhIUaL9PaHb_Byj39Z8H6x10W34BB2TQnA2pWS63DqKifVwuIk2JnorT0QqSU16bXUm8wCzJFGs7GF6QMw3qqM4e3PZZ3LAZEOVH1xqn1BmN6Hm7grqF8P1nAAaskOCV3cZKJBioJj3i3mFxVW7S_Jgd4cDwSrT5vXqQABpzBbDMY2HQj-R51CawPR8laGQ&c=lxhhl7rCY07F1U8xi3yVM5oOluaaBq2XV9XXwQ9PATMxpvuovtmndA==&ch=ymLADCBqD2aVN2HWlJHGnCo59LSrQZ5VLfjO5uKnHeZuX-RmEjoEqQ==)
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
## A Peek at the Past Week
---
| | |
---
|
### March 20 - Rigby, ID

Our youth are suffering immensely under the specter of insanity plaguing our nation. Rigby has dealt with tragedies that we can only pray to avoid. We need a Governor who will champion change in our education system. We need school choice. Thank you Jefferson County GOP for hosting me last night.
---
| | |
---
|
### March 18 - Pocatello, ID

It is no longer acceptable to funnel our hard-earned money into the coffers of political operatives and activists. It's time for change!
---
| | |
---
|
### March 18 - Shelley, ID

The Governor determines direction. Folks in Shelley are looking for someone to contend for their values and they're joining the Humphreys for Governor team!
---
| | |
---
|
### March 17 - Idaho Falls,

My sole aim is to secure the American Dream in Idaho, and allow our state to rise to its noble position as a land that celebrates freedom and rewards hard work.
---
| | |
---
|
### March 16 - Gooding, ID

Thank you Magic Valley Republican Women's Club for hosting me. Then on to an event in Gooding to finish the day.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---
| [The Plan](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YhIUaL9PaHb_Byj39Z8H6x10W34BB2TQnA2pWS63DqKifVwuIk2Jm4d-E8qqSQJCqrsMVUOPhjmUANOdrvXUeayVe84_Tbkg0L7SpvvFfbzzUqCNVDBt4JNEz5fvHFdkrDZ1-_u3d-U-1cvtfh5u2o52Y8bA1up&c=lxhhl7rCY07F1U8xi3yVM5oOluaaBq2XV9XXwQ9PATMxpvuovtmndA==&ch=ymLADCBqD2aVN2HWlJHGnCo59LSrQZ5VLfjO5uKnHeZuX-RmEjoEqQ==)

### Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful.
---
| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_YhIUaL9PaHb_Byj39Z8H6x10W34BB2TQnA2pWS63DqKifVwuIk2Jm4d-E8qqSQJFojtLlXwaeN5IA7qIFNE3nxk11wEGMuWiciemSeyqD2nnVAdWGf5Aq7DDMHmyNYaY-ozrplbmJyV6uJWtSgw98Lr5B31p0WzfdUBiA8EsYOuWwqKMjxmHLnUnnHQypA24yWYqaqv_xniDpOX7eH6Zh1l0MoHv6qL-P04Q7iOqOyv8ztU1EIeeho7i9OAb3nwrWIgvk8TsrKn3OVUxj71dhZ2EdluNRYdqOphm2iUgz_TRg-vGaLOH4dRQxV1AwFQ&c=lxhhl7rCY07F1U8xi3yVM5oOluaaBq2XV9XXwQ9PATMxpvuovtmndA==&ch=ymLADCBqD2aVN2HWlJHGnCo59LSrQZ5VLfjO5uKnHeZuX-RmEjoEqQ==)

### JOIN THE MOVEMENT

If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | | == == | | == | | | | Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful. | | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | == | | == | | | | == | Ed Humphreys == P.O. Box 1667 Eagle, ID 83616 | == Stay Social! == == == | | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | PO box 1667, Eagle, ID 83616 | | Sent by mailto:info@edforidaho.com in collaboration with |

[Friend, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are _still_ pushing the Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen. **But now, recent court documents reveal that some top Trump fans, like Tucker Carlson, may not even believe all of the lies that have been spread to inflame Trump’s base and threaten our democracy.**

Peter,

We just made it back to Oregon after spending a week in DC with future Speaker Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise and other Republican dignitaries. We flew across the country because I was recently named a NRCC “Young Gun” candidate.

We wouldn’t have made it into this esteemed program without your help. You see, the NRCC only names candidates who meet certain criteria – i.e., candidates who have a robust fundraising operation, proven communications strategy and a compelling message that resonates with voters in the district.

Young Gun candidates, the NRCC’s website reads, “represent the most competitive congressional seats in the 2022 election cycle.”

After announcing the latest slate of “Young Gun” candidates, Leader McCarthy had this to say:

_**"The newest candidates to the list show how we plan to take back the House by holding their Democrat opponents accountable for the disastrous policies we have seen from the One-Party Democrat Rule of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi."**_

After having been awarded this honor and all that comes along with it, we cannot fall short.

**[Are you able to make a gift of $1 or more right now to help us make headway in reaching this lofty goal? subject: Putin’s favorite TV network

body:
A few days ago, Russia’s Minister of Foreign Affairs praised Fox News as the only American network giving an alternative version about his country’s invasion of Ukraine.
#
Derek —
A few days ago, Russia’s Minister of Foreign Affairs praised Fox News as the only American network giving an alternative version about his country’s invasion of Ukraine.
Here is the truth:
Fox News profits from promoting disinformation to divide the American people. They’ve done it for years. Now they’re doing it to help Vladimir Putin continue a war that is causing horrific human suffering.
And oftentimes, their targets are veterans. Specifically older veterans. We saw it before and after the insurrection at the Capitol — trying to convince veterans that a violent assault on our democracy was a service to the country.
Now they’re doing it to sell a war and hope to divide us from our NATO allies. Again, using veterans as targets.
One of VoteVets’ MOST IMPORTANT missions this cycle is to combat disinformation targeting veterans. Every day. But we cannot run a program of that size without your help. So we’re asking:

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Survival Item of 2022
body:
This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zohdgp9i7vmrjmth9cpsp6psa1ml48ipo60bkh6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg60o33c5h2bs)
# #1 Survival Item of 2022
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zi4jk4uqniekcgf0gsetum1pjs109nigginbdifo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg60o33c5h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ziu6scqtgbobfiotl1grb65nvl21tmuqb7pmk7v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg60o33c5h2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7f1n77bsm221kcn2vjqdqbb3me83ango8u1fs60_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg60o33c5h2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0u97cd0nok3k9h2cjiig5ts11jt8lhp4b1a4vt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg60o33c5h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z89atrcoq7b52o11hm2n7qducn35c9ndcvae6e6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg60o33c5h2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0v625nhqo6q7q61163bu3pq4tp671msfeffrj18_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg60o33c5h2bs)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb0kbcbmo6vdbpptf5edh6ej1f8g194ahn7olh18_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg60o33c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: Just Received My Fifth Sheriff Endorsement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
🔥 Endorsed by Valencia County Sheriff Denise Vigil | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-6890037?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=295c5a2348&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Our Conservative movement is on fire with American patriots who have endorsed our campaign because we uphold the Rule of Law as devastation from empowered lawlessness by Radical Left socialists continues to ravage our country.

Today I am honored to announce the endorsement of Valencia County Sheriff Denise Vigil. Sheriff Vigil is a passionate public servant with twenty years of law enforcement experience and has served four years as Sheriff of Valencia County.
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=b163fba7fa&e=102b599530)
---
| I am continuing to receive the support from the law enforcement community across New Mexico because they know I am the most pro-law enforcement and first responder candidate in the race for Governor. I am honored to be the sole gubernatorial candidate embraced by sheriffs across the state _from both sides of the political aisle!_ **Sheriff Vigil is my fifth Sheriff endorsement to date,** far exceeding any other candidate.

**I thank Sheriff Vigil for her support and will continue to fight for her, her deputies, and the heroes across the state who keep us safe.** At a time when our law enforcement community is continually under attack, New Mexico needs strong leaders who will back the blue.

As this campaign continues to bring the heat and Conservative Americans fight to reclaim power in New Mexico, _it is more important than ever_ to stand up for the battle-tested values our country was founded on. **Your support today in a donation of any amount will show Michelle Lujan Grisham that this era of lawlessness and government tyranny has an expiration date looming in November!**

subject: OMG. WOW! GREAT NEWS!

body:
GREAT NEWS: We are 10 days away from one of the last official FEC fundraising deadlines of the campaign and we’re getting closer and closer to hitting our goals.
#

Friends —
**GREAT NEWS:** We are 10 days away from one of the last official FEC fundraising deadlines of the campaign and we’re getting closer and closer to hitting our goals.
**BETTER NEWS:** We’re doing it on the strength of lots and lots of individual donations, which is exactly how we fund this campaign because Mark is rejecting corporate PAC money.
**THE BEST NEWS:** When you fund a campaign this way, we elect people who aren’t beholden to corporate special interest groups or individual donors funding super PACs.
Right now our average donation is down considerably from previous months. So, if we’re going to hit this goal and win, we have two choices:
Normally we ask people who we’re hoping will make their first donation to chip in just $3. But today, we need to ask you to dig a little deeper — just one time. For Mark. For America.
[**Can you please make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford? Our FEC filing deadline ends in just 10 days and we need lots and lots of donations to reach our goals.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220321-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2401_6688874_CsUQLs&akid=2401%2E6688874%2ECsUQLs)

clean_body: It’ll all come down to Wisconsin. | Friend – Wisconsin is poised to be the #1 battleground state of 2024... Which is all the more reason we can’t afford to let Tony Evers and the radical Left continue to control the Badger State. I know it may seem daunting to go up against Evers’ $10.5 million war chest, but let me assure you – in this TOSS-UP governor’s race, every last dollar makes a difference. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Sat, March 19, 2022 Subject: Numbers don’t lie To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I hate to say it, but this 50-50 toss-up governor’s race is going to come down to fundraising. Reports have shown that in roughly 9 out of every 10 elections across the country, the better-funded candidate wins. And with radical liberal Tony Evers sitting on more than $10.5 MILLION in cash on hand, we can’t afford to come up short at the end of this first quarter. Every month, we set benchmarks to ensure we’re keeping pace with our quarterly goals... ...Because falling behind even one month could allow Tony Evers to take the upper hand and recover from his disastrous poll numbers. That’s why I’m reaching out to every one of our supporters and every grassroots patriot across the country to help ensure we hit our first quarterly goal of the election year. With your help, we will marshal the resources we need to FIRE Evers and take back the battleground state of Wisconsin in 2022. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

If Donna Shalala unseats me, it would be a devastating setback for South Florida.

clean_body: That’s who we’re up against. | Peter, If Donna Shalala unseats me, it would be a devastating setback for South Florida. During my time in office, I’ve fought relentlessly to defend liberty and individual rights. While Shalala was in Congress, she served as a rubber stamp for Nancy Pelosi and the socialist Left. Here’s how she described herself in an interview back in 2020: “I’m a pragmatic socialist” November is our last chance to save America from the perils of socialism. We MUST defend this seat and take back the House, or Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden will have at least another two years to wreak havoc on our economy and trample on our freedoms. If you think inflation, gas prices, and supply-chain issues are bad now, just imagine what they’ll look like after another two years of failed socialist policies. If you’re concerned about censorship, cancel culture, and tyrannical government overreach, just think about how much worse it will get after two more years of liberal control. We’ve made real progress in Florida over the last two years. Now, it’s time to ensure the rest of America follows our lead. We can’t afford to backslide towards socialism and tyranny in November.
