clean_body: | Hey Peter, It's finally spring and, although it might always be spring here in sunny California, our campaign really is in full bloom. The sun is shining, birds are chirping, volunteers are knocking on doors, and Christy is a busy bee on the campaign trail to make sure she hears from voters all across the district. With more sunshine, and even moreBlue Wave energy, we know that Christy's got the momentum she needs to flip CA-27 red to blue. Here's the latest: Young people have the most on the line in this upcoming election. That's why Christy was excited to speak with Trojan Democrats at the University of California and why she's committed to fighting for policies that will invest in the future of our youth: tackling climate change, finally passing meaningful gun legislation, and affordable college and higher education available to all. | After a frenzy of exciting endorsements from labor organizations all over California (including SEIUCalifornia, LA Labor Federation, and more), it was thrilling to launch our canvass over the weekend spearheaded by labor leaders and grassroots organizers in the community. Christy is beyond grateful to the organizers, labor activists, and of course, the workers who make our state and country strong. Christy was honored to receive one of the biggest endorsements of the campaign – the official endorsement of the California Democratic Party. She is a proud Democrat and will always fight for those highest ideals – uplifting the rights of workers, creating an equitable system, for racial justice, gender justice, and a democracy and economy that works for all of us. You can tell a lot about a candidate by who they're endorsed by, and Christy is thrilled and grateful for the recent endorsement from these amazing progressive grassroots organizations: Thank you so much for your continued support heading into this critical election season. –Team Christy = = =

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Our region’s great promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Last week, I was proud to introduce the Great Lakes Authority Act.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43223994/336255858/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220321GLAA_N_MK_ACTIVE_8_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTM4NmE3Ni02NmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ViqWkZIoBttMAKwObZIEjxGpitGHywco6wn56UDnrhU=) Last week, I was proud to introduce the Great Lakes Authority Act. If it passes, it will finally establish the Great Lakes Authority, which would serve as a federal entity dedicated to advancing solutions to the challenges faced by the eight states of the Great Lakes region.

The Great Lakes region represents major economic, security, recreation, and environmental interests not only for its residents **_but for the entire country._** It encompasses the largest accessible freshwater system on our planet.

[**_I am working to deliver for the Great Lakes, but Republicans are working hard to defeat me. Can you donate $5 right now to send me back to Congress so I can continue fighting for our Great Lakes?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224002/336255864/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220321GLAA_N_MK_ACTIVE_8_NG_TESTB_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTM4NmE3Ni02NmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ViqWkZIoBttMAKwObZIEjxGpitGHywco6wn56UDnrhU=) [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224009/336255872/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220321GLAA_N_MK_ACTIVE_8_NG_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTM4NmE3Ni02NmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ViqWkZIoBttMAKwObZIEjxGpitGHywco6wn56UDnrhU=) The Great Lakes region is the industrial workhorse that powers America, but after decades of bad trade deals that outsourced living-wage jobs and fomented deindustrialization – the need for a robust new partnership that catalyzes regional revitalization is abundantly clear. By investing in workforce development, innovative energy technologies and manufacturing processes, and responsible stewardship of our precious Great Lakes ecosystem – the Great Lakes Authority will help unleash Ohio’s full potential for this 21st century.

The Great Lakes Authority Act provides for the Great Lakes Authority to receive _$30 million in funding_ beginning in 2023, **and $50 million each year after.

Fully funding this project and revitalizing North America’s Great Lakes region is my top legislative priority.** [**_Projects like this are the reason I continue to fight in Congress. This bill is a long time coming, and I am proud of the collaborative effort it required. We need to keep pushing for this region, but I need your help in our fight for this seat in Congress. Will you donate just $5 today to my campaign so our work to drive meaningful federal investment to our district can continue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224011/336255878/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220321GLAA_N_MK_ACTIVE_8_NG_TESTB_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTM4NmE3Ni02NmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ViqWkZIoBttMAKwObZIEjxGpitGHywco6wn56UDnrhU=) [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224012/336255879/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220321GLAA_N_MK_ACTIVE_8_NG_TESTB_b2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTM4NmE3Ni02NmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ViqWkZIoBttMAKwObZIEjxGpitGHywco6wn56UDnrhU=) With thanks always,

Marcy Kaptur [**_PS - My team just reminded me that we are only 10 days from our FEC end-of-quarter deadline. Will you contribute $5 to my campaign right now to help?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224013/336255880/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220321GLAA_N_MK_ACTIVE_8_NG_TESTB_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTM4NmE3Ni02NmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ViqWkZIoBttMAKwObZIEjxGpitGHywco6wn56UDnrhU=) | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. **Can you help Marcy by giving weekly?**
---

name: Rev. Robert A. Sirico
subject: Exposing the truth about China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Acton Institute
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899859:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)

Dear Peter,

My friend was recently put in jail. His crimes? He is a believer (a practicing Catholic). He advocates for free speech and religious freedom. And he fearlessly exposed the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) for its many human rights violations.

Tragically, Jimmy Lai, world-renowned entrepreneur and pro-democracy advocate, is locked in prison.

Beijing is using its immense power and overreach to try to silence him. But we refuse to let this happen.

Peter, let me give a brief introduction. I am Rev. Robert Sirico, president emeritus of the Acton Institute, a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization that produces podcasts, journals, research, and documentaries that make the moral case for religious liberty and free markets.

[_**Please click here or below to watch and support this brand-new documentary >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899859:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899859:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)

In 2014, the Acton Institute produced the hit documentary, Poverty, Inc. The film exposed the corruption and BIG business behind international poverty aid. Poverty, Inc. was an official selection at 50 film festivals, earning 15 major awards in the process.

Now we are exposing what the CCP and Xi Jinping are desperately trying to hide.

This spring, we will proudly release our brand-new documentary film--The Hong Konger. **It 's a story about the fight for freedom in Hong Kong, led by the inspiring Jimmy Lai. **

Jimmy grew up in rural communist China. His family was suffering in dire poverty, and so when he was only 12, Jimmy traveled to Hong Kong. Thanks to his newfound freedom, his entrepreneurial spirit, and years of hard work, Jimmy started the Giordano clothing company, which rapidly grew to a globally recognized brand.

Eventually, Jimmy would turn his attention to media, where he built several successful companies. Before he turned 60, he was a billionaire. And as Jimmy thrived, so did Hong Kong.

But then the Chinese Communist Party showed up ...

**The CCP aggressively suppressed the freedom and civil liberties enjoyed for so long by the citizens of Hong Kong. And so Jimmy took to the streets. He deliberately placed himself on the frontlines of the Hong Kong protests so government officials would see his face. **

His newspaper, _Apple Daily_ , became the biggest critic of the CCP, and so it had Jimmy and key members of his staff arrested--and his company shut down.

Jimmy risked everything. He gave up the life of a billionaire entrepreneur in Hong Kong to become a dissident fighting for basic human freedoms threatened by a Beijing-inspired clampdown. Now he is locked in prison and his future is uncertain.

[_**Please click here or below to watch and support this brand-new documentary >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899859:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899859:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)

The Chinese government wants him silenced, but Jimmy Lai's fight for freedom in Hong Kong is far from done.

**I am hoping to raise $50,000 to crowdsource our marketing efforts behind this incredible documentary. **

Sadly, you won't hear Jimmy Lai's story from Hollywood or the corporate media. It's why I'm asking you to help us reach our goal. More than 80% of our funding comes from the generous contributions of individual Acton supporters.

**If you 're inspired by Jimmy's story and the fight for freedom in Hong Kong, then please support this incredible documentary today. **

Use any of the links below to send your urgent support.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899860:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899861:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899862:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899863:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899864:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899865:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899866:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59899859:Jrcc38oNB:m:1:3253819041:3E74D2ECFA6B7F87F074E98C70C54845:r)

Together we can ensure that Jimmy's voice will not be silenced.

Sincerely,

Rev. Robert A. Sirico
President Emeritus
Acton Institute

P.S. By supporting _The Hong Konger_ , you will automatically be subscribed to our updates on the project and will get access to the full video upon its release.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: How to help in Ukraine right now:
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsfKXY_HaN

M1 Ukraine Outbound

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osfKXY_HaN

Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes
more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and
within moments, terror and despair took over our television
screens.

Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine,
where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people
are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand
with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian
aid and medical care on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching
out with an urgent request for your help.

As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as
large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.

DONATE NOW

Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised
over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from
Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted
Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of
such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that,
it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be
even more effective in the future.

And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine.
These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our
direct support.

So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the
crisis in Ukraine.

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck

Founder, Mercury One

DONATE NOW

Irving, TX 75014

clean_body: M1 Ukraine Outbound Friend, When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do. We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens. Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine, where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid. Fortunately, we are not powerless. Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help. As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now. DONATE NOW Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians. To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future. And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support. So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine. Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act. Laus Deo, Glenn Beck Founder, Mercury One DONATE NOW Copyright © 2022 Mercury One, Inc., All rights reserved. Mercury One, Inc. P.O. | **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**CONTACT** : PRESS@NICKFORNJ.COM
---
| |
# De Gregorio Announces Key Endorsements from Paramus and Waldwick Leaders
---
| **FAIR LAWN –** Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, proudly announced the overwhelming support of Paramus and Waldwick Republican leaders.
---
| "Nick is our choice to take on Josh Gottheimer this fall because he has demonstrated an unparalleled ability to attract resources and national attention to this important race, all while standing up for the values that matter to us. Our kids and grandkids deserve to grow up in safe neighborhoods that they can afford to stay in when they grow up with families of their own."
---
| **Nick Iometti**
Paramus Municipal Chair

**Robert Kaiser **
Paramus Councilman

**Ace Antonio**
Paramus Councilman

**Joe Vartolone**
Paramus Councilman

**Chris DiPiazza**
Paramus Councilman

**Fran Goggin**
Paramus County Committee

**Brian Goggin**
Paramus County Committee

**Mark Ramundo **
Waldwick Municipal Chair

**Katie Cericola **
Waldwick Councilwoman

**Mike Ritchie **
Waldwick Councilman
---
| De Gregorio has received the recommendation of the Bergen County Republican Organization ("BCRO") Policy Committee ahead of this week's County Convention, as well as the support of the Frontline Patriots PAC. He was also recently named to the National Republican Congressional Committee’s Young Gun: “On the Radar” recruitment and support program.
---

I am very excited about this!
#
The bill I spearheaded to give Virginia a new license plate will hit Governor Youngkin’s desk soon... And when he signs it, active-duty sailors and Navy Veterans will have a new way to celebrate their service.
#
Virginia has over 300 vanity license plates including sports teams, colleges, and other branches of the military.. A NAVY license plate is long overdue!
#
Additionally, $15 from the plate’s annual fee will benefit the Navy and Marine Corps Relief Society!
#
**Even if it’s a small thing... I will always prioritize recognizing, honoring, and caring for our veterans. I’m doing it on the state level, and I look forward to doing it in Washington! **
---

clean_body: I am very excited about this! | | I am very excited about this! The bill I spearheaded to give Virginia a new license plate will hit Governor Youngkin’s desk soon... And when he signs it, active-duty sailors and Navy Veterans will have a new way to celebrate their service. Virginia has over 300 vanity license plates including sports teams, colleges, and other branches of the military.. A NAVY license plate is long overdue! Additionally, $15 from the plate’s annual fee will benefit the Navy and Marine Corps Relief Society! Even if it’s a small thing... I will always prioritize recognizing, honoring, and caring for our veterans. I’m doing it on the state level, and I look forward to doing it in Washington! | With gratitude, Jen | | | | PAID FOR BY KIGGANS FOR CONGRESS Kiggans for Congress, P.O. Box 5042, Virginia Beach, VA 23471

name: Val Demings
subject: Sharing my story with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Back when I was a social worker
| | |
---
Friend: It's important for me to share my story with you and why I'm running and why this campaign means _so_ much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
**Back when I was a social worker, I met a young boy who was being seriously neglected at home.** He needed immediate support – but I was told it would be weeks before he could be evaluated. I didn't think he would make it until then, so I went around the red tape and got him the help he needed. I was reprimanded, but that's what it took to save his life.

I remember being so angry that the system designed to help children like him had totally failed him. **That's when I heard that the Orlando Police Department was recruiting, and I took a call to protect and serve my community, to help people like that young boy.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224146/336256392/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2704-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYzNDgyOS02N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qvf1eaPDBS1IsXgmeIpVi5bjyXwG-S5SIUikbenon7Q=)
Fast-forward 27 years: I was Orlando's first woman chief of police and worked tirelessly so children like that young boy I'd met as a social worker didn't have to live in fear of playing in the streets. In my last days as chief, Mayor Buddy Dyer sat me down for a chat:
**"You have to run for Congress," he told me.**

Me? A politician? I never thought of myself that way. I even laughed.
But, as I let the idea sink in, I thought about that young boy I helped as a social worker – we were still in touch three decades later. I knew he wasn’t the only one who had to overcome hardship in his childhood: 1 in 7 kids in the U.S. lives in poverty. If I could do something to help kids like him, wouldn’t it be wrong to pass up the opportunity?

That’s when I realized that I needed to run for office to help as many children and working families as I could – so that in the next generation, more children from Florida could grow up with an incredible story of opportunity like mine. Ever since then, I’ve never stopped fighting toward that goal.
**[I'll never tire of an opportunity to do good and to serve the most vulnerable members of my community, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help send me to the Senate and continue my work of building a better future for our children.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224147/336256393/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2704-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYzNDgyOS02N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qvf1eaPDBS1IsXgmeIpVi5bjyXwG-S5SIUikbenon7Q=)**
Not a day goes by that I don't think about that child – or all of the working families who are counting on leaders like me to help them get through dark times. To thrive and not just survive.
**For me, that's what this is all about – and it's why I believe the Senate is where I can do the most good. If I win this race, Democrats can expand our Senate majority. We'll be able to extend the enhanced Child Tax Credit that's cut child poverty by more than 40%. We'll protect children from gun violence. And we'll help families keep food on the table by making groceries and gas more affordable.**
[**That's the long and short of why I'm in this race, friend. If you're ready to help me build a better future, will you donate to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224148/336256394/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2704-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYzNDgyOS02N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qvf1eaPDBS1IsXgmeIpVi5bjyXwG-S5SIUikbenon7Q=)

Thanks for reading my story,

Val Demings
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224149/336256395/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2704-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGYzNDgyOS02N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qvf1eaPDBS1IsXgmeIpVi5bjyXwG-S5SIUikbenon7Q=)

body:
Shontel’s fighting for Northeast Ohio
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224228/336256733/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220321Funding_N_SB4C_90DO_3_G_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjE2ZGU4ZS02OGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vFPLhDZyl3RvQt4kEkaXYv-xKl4Iug7JPjYbKlsbVM=) Peter, did you see this? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224229/336256734/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220321Funding_N_SB4C_90DO_3_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjE2ZGU4ZS02OGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vFPLhDZyl3RvQt4kEkaXYv-xKl4Iug7JPjYbKlsbVM=) Congresswoman Shontel Brown has been busy in Washington fighting for Northeast Ohio in Washington! In her short time in Congress, Shontel’s secured more than **$7 million** in funding for Northeast Ohio.

From critical infrastructure like our _sewers and utilities to mental health and health care,_ **Northeast Ohio is seeing more investment than in decades.**

[**_Peter, we need leaders like Shontel Brown in Congress. We’re in a tough primary, and our final FEC fundraising deadline of the election is quickly approaching on March 31. name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Happy Birthday to the Republican Party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
The party of individual liberty just had a birthday!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=1)
---
Friend -- **Happy Birthday to the Republican Party!** On March 20, 1854, the Republican Party was founded in a little white schoolhouse in Ripon, Wisconsin by independent thinkers who sought to oppose the spread of slavery in the western territories. Today, Republicans remain independent thinkers, lovers of liberty, and defenders of individual rights. From Abraham Lincoln to Donald Trump, the Republican Party has continued to fight for the Constitution, individual liberty, and the values the American people represent. [**Are you willing to contribute just $18.54 now to celebrate 168 years of the Republican Party?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVFijpBk4LUv-OubfngxWr3HNg2WSa2sHQBNnQ-OT5g2U&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=2) Your donation will help support crucial efforts to elect Republicans and fight back against the liberal takeover of our communities, including our Get Out the Vote efforts for the April 5 spring election and ground game efforts ahead of November. We hope to do our founders proud this election cycle by putting all hands on deck to defend liberty and secure freedom for every American. We must re-elect Senator Ron Johnson, defeat Tony Evers, elect Republicans to Congress, and defend our Republican majorities in the Legislature – but we can’t do it without your help.

[**Can you chip in just $18.54 now?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVFijpBk4LUv-OubfngxWr3HNg2WSa2sHQBNnQ-OT5g2U&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=3) If you cannot contribute financially, you can sign up to volunteer on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0bfZhAig058TAIOJhSOZVp8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=4). I hope you’ll join us, Friend. Forward, Republican Party of Wisconsin

Republican Party of Wisconsin
[http://act.wisgop.org/](http://act.wisgop.org/?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=5)
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=6) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=7) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=8) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1854_republican_party_birthday&n=9)

name: Team Roe
subject: It's been a BIG month for Team Roe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217611/336224482/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTMzZDQ4Yi00N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCbhI7aMACY9klXYMxzf748jS0lyyPj4UiG3ikS5dQ0=&emci=464b66f2-13a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=d133d48b-47a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15639879)

Hi team,

We are back with our monthly newsletter!

We've had a busy month, but it was truly special because it was also **Women's History Month**. This month, Ann spent some time celebrating the strong female role models in her life, including her mom, her godmother, and many more. They inspire her candidacy for Congress and are a constant reminder that we are fighting for something bigger than us - we are fighting for women's equality and rights. We should never stop honoring the women who came before us, the women who chipped the glass ceiling bit by bit over the decades.

**[Now, before you read up on the latest from Team Roe: It's almost the End of the Quarter and we've got a HUGE goal we need to hit. Chip in $5 to help us get there>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217612/336224484/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220321_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTMzZDQ4Yi00N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCbhI7aMACY9klXYMxzf748jS0lyyPj4UiG3ikS5dQ0=)**

* * *

**Events Roundup:**

**February 26th, Flannel Fest**

The sun came out for this Saturday celebration, and Ann and her husband, Jon, were enthusiastic volunteers at **Flannelfest.**

Flannelfest is a winter tradition in Janesville. It was quite an eventful day! And even though it was cold, it was great to see a fantastic turnout for this event.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217613/336224485/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220321_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTMzZDQ4Yi00N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCbhI7aMACY9klXYMxzf748jS0lyyPj4UiG3ikS5dQ0=)
---

**February 27th, Janesville Event**

We hosted an event in Janesville that was kicked off by Deb Kolste, who gave the most amazing introduction for Ann, describing her campaign and work ethic. It was a fantastic turnout, and Ann connected personally with supporters and shared her recent wins on the campaign trail, including our endorsements, dedication to robust fundraising, and our commitment to running a grassroots campaign. Ann and the whole of Team Roe are excited to work with this group and others in Wisconsin to build a coalition across this district and **flip WI-01 blue this November!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217614/336224487/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220321_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTMzZDQ4Yi00N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCbhI7aMACY9klXYMxzf748jS0lyyPj4UiG3ikS5dQ0=)
---

**March 3rd, We Got New Maps!**

Our campaign and State Democrats in Wisconsin scored a **_major victory_** this month when the Wisconsin Supreme Court issued its decision on our new congressional maps. The court sided with the voters of this state and enacted Gov. Tony Evers' redistricting proposal. This decision is an absolute game changer and means that **we are now one of the most competitive districts in the entire country.** This is a huge boost for our campaign, and this victory is a sign that our fight for change is making a real difference. We cannot stop.

Take a look at the new map for Wisconsin below:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217615/336224489/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220321_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTMzZDQ4Yi00N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCbhI7aMACY9klXYMxzf748jS0lyyPj4UiG3ikS5dQ0=)
---

**March 10th, DCCC adds WI-01 to "District in Play" list!**

We got the amazing news that the DCCC is adding our district, WI-01, to its **"Districts in Play"** list. This is fantastic news for our campaign and it means that WI-01 is OFFICIALLY on the 2022 battlefield. We are excited to continue to smash expectations for our campaign as we get closer to the primaries!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217616/336224491/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220321_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTMzZDQ4Yi00N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCbhI7aMACY9klXYMxzf748jS0lyyPj4UiG3ikS5dQ0=)
---

* * *

**COMING UP:**

**March 23rd, 'State of the Race'**

If you've been wondering what you can do to help Team Roe, we've got just the event for you! On Wednesday, March 23rd, Ann and guest speakers will be talking about our new maps, what we're planning in the next few weeks, and what you can do to help. It'll be a fun and informative time and is FREE to join!
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217617/336224492/-973349547?refcode=em22_220321_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTMzZDQ4Yi00N2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MCbhI7aMACY9klXYMxzf748jS0lyyPj4UiG3ikS5dQ0=)**
---
** **

clean_body: | Hi team, We are back with our monthly newsletter! We've had a busy month, but it was truly special because it was also Women's History Month. This month, Ann spent some time celebrating the strong female role models in her life, including her mom, her godmother, and many more. They inspire her candidacy for Congress and are a constant reminder that we are fighting for something bigger than us - we are fighting for women's equality and rights. We should never stop honoring the women who came before us, the women who chipped the glass ceiling bit by bit over the decades. = Events Roundup: February 26th, Flannel Fest The sun came out for this Saturday celebration, and Ann and her husband, Jon, were enthusiastic volunteers at Flannelfest. Flannelfest is a winter tradition in Janesville. It was quite an eventful day! And even though it was cold, it was great to see a fantastic turnout for this event. | = February 27th, Janesville Event We hosted an event in Janesville that was kicked off by Deb Kolste, who gave the most amazing introduction for Ann, describing her campaign and work ethic. It was a fantastic turnout, and Ann connected personally with supporters and shared her recent wins on the campaign trail, including our endorsements, dedication to robust fundraising, and our commitment to running a grassroots campaign. Ann and the whole of Team Roe are excited to work with this group and others in Wisconsin to build a coalition across this district and flip WI-01 blue this November! = March 3rd, We Got New Maps! Our campaign and State Democrats in Wisconsin scored a major victory this month when the Wisconsin Supreme Court issued its decision on our new congressional maps. The court sided with the voters of this state and enacted Gov. Tony Evers' redistricting proposal. This decision is an absolute game changer and means that we are now one of the most competitive districts in the entire country. This is a huge boost for our campaign, and this victory is a sign that our fight for change is making a real difference. We cannot stop. Take a look at the new map for Wisconsin below: = March 10th, DCCC adds WI-01 to "District in Play" list! We got the amazing news that the DCCC is adding our district, WI-01, to its "Districts in Play" list. This is fantastic news for our campaign and it means that WI-01 is OFFICIALLY on the 2022 battlefield. We are excited to continue to smash expectations for our campaign as we get closer to the primaries! = COMING UP: March 23rd, 'State of the Race' If you've been wondering what you can do to help Team Roe, we've got just the event for you! On Wednesday, March 23rd, Ann and guest speakers will be talking about our new maps, what we're planning in the next few weeks, and what you can do to help. It'll be a fun and informative time and is FREE to join! = = March 24th, Kenosha Meet and Greet with Tod Ohnstad Representative Tod Ohnstad is hosting a meet and greet for Ann in Kenosha on Thursday, March 24th. = We hope to see you there! = **= Things are heating up and we're not slowing down. = Thank you for being a part of the movement we are building here. \-- Team Roe = =

name: Karoline Leavitt
subject: How GOP primary voters passed Biden’s agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karoline for Congress
body:
This is why we keep losing in Washington no matter who has the majority
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl8u4libue5hsutg33h8hv683fh0dj25sc92gjgg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn5cr1mirbao72ehr63dj4msrr4tpgsloj6s3j6ep39p736krj2cjim3hn6dbn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj35dpjc3jreoj662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jm9o34c3h68oh5u)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztoj0613raj7ikig01s9lb5s7ps7rmlf9ldfvk9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg68o72chh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
I’m writing to you today because of how disappointed I was when **13 House ‘Republicans’ voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous infrastructure bill**. What’s the point of electing Republicans if they’re going to vote with Democrats to pass a $1.2 TRILLION bill that:
Spends a trillion dollars on **Green New Deal provisions**...
Empowers **“woke” regulators**...
...And advances the Far-Left’s radical social justice mission, using the word **_“equity” 64 times_**.
It’s insane, and **[a betrayal of the Republican voters and Conservative grassroots donors who sent them to Congress.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zup5dhir8ib0d6u7aputu1hgt5pjnhi3t8hh8sk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg68o72chh2bs)** | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zftottcn96b0jpg0arcs09rkmthutr4cfueedvf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg68o72chh2bs)
---
When I worked in the Trump White House, those same Republicans denied President Trump’s request for _just $25 Billion to build the border wall_. Then they cave in a matter of days for Biden’s $1.2 Trillion.

**_Shameful._**

This is why Republican Primaries matter so much, it’s the grassroots’ chance to send true conservatives to Washington, not Establishment Hacks.
[DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcmobo6uekif2chn7sibgkpm35v2bb66bcf5028g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg68o72chh2bs)
---
**

I promise you, if we keep electing the same spineless RINOs we have been for decades, we’ll never see conservative victories from Washington again.**

Now that I’ve made my case to you, I’d like to share a bit about myself. My name is Karoline Leavitt, I’m a 24 year old America First Patriot from a small business family in New Hampshire.

I **_served President Trump in the White House_** under Kayleigh McEnany and then served as Elise Stefanik’s communications director during her **successful effort to kick Liz Cheney out of House Leadership**. After seeing the disastrous effects of the Biden Administration’s first 6 months, I felt a calling to serve my home district in Congress.
[DONATE $25!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4l3ii2tna3df6imrnlgbfg8753r96h8m9iautt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg68o72chh2bs)
---
I’m running in a primary election against **the 2020 Republican nominee who lost to a Far-Left Democrat** and an **‘all talk, no action’ Establishment Republican**. The moment the media attacks either one of them they’ll crumble.

For the conservative movement to be successful, **we need to nominate America First candidates in our primaries** , **_or else it’s the same betrayal every 2 years._**

_I fought the corrupt media alongside Kayleigh and President Trump_ , I helped _remove Liz Cheney from GOP Leadership_ , and **_I’ve earned the endorsement of true, steadfast conservatives like Senator Ted Cruz, Chairwoman Elise Stefanik, and Congressman Madison Cawthorn._**

I know you want an America First Red Wave in 2022, but before we can achieve that, we must have an America First Red Wave in the primaries. **[I’m humbly asking you to join my campaign by contributing whatever you can today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhkuek0bcq7fclfadm0um6kujbid8go6n2re52do_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg68o72chh2bs)**

America First is more than a saying, it’s a movement to take our country back from people who hate it and from people who hate us. **[If you want our movement to succeed and live on for decades, please contribute to my campaign, I won’t let you down.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcpp64bog4udfepmm843pju6pvmag6sov4sqdero_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjg68o72chh2bs)**

Thanks!

Karoline Leavitt
Candidate for Congress

Paid for by Karoline for Congress

---

name: Peter Welch
subject: re: Supreme Court hearings
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s Supreme Court confirmation hearings have just begun

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=140%2E61531%2Ea-fhQT)
Hello,
America is taking a big step forward today.
Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s Supreme Court confirmation hearings have just begun, and she’s ready to make history as the first Black woman and first former public defender to serve on our nation’s highest court.
But Senate Republicans have already started slinging mud. The vast majority of them are unlikely to vote for her despite the American Bar Association unanimously giving her their highest qualification rating. And if they controlled the chamber, Mitch McConnell has already promised to block President Biden from filling any seats on the Supreme Court.
[**That’s one reason why I’m running for Senate in Vermont: to defend our Senate majority and make sure we can confirm nominees like Judge Jackson, who will uphold the rule of law and protect equal rights. But we’ll need all-hands-on-deck to win this race—can you chip in to our campaign right away?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1650?t=3&akid=140%2E61531%2Ea-fhQT)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1650?t=14&amount=3&akid=140%2E61531%2Ea-fhQT)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1650?t=16&amount=15&akid=140%2E61531%2Ea-fhQT)
---

---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1650?t=20&amount=50&akid=140%2E61531%2Ea-fhQT)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1650?t=10&amount=100&akid=140%2E61531%2Ea-fhQT)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1650?t=12&akid=140%2E61531%2Ea-fhQT)
---

---
Judge Jackson has served our country honorably as a brilliant, thoughtful jurist and she deserves bipartisan support—but Mitch McConnell is only focused on scoring political points and making the Supreme Court even more conservative.
So much is on the line before the Court: abortion, voting rights, immigration, our ability to tackle climate change—you name it. We must do everything we can to defend our Democratic Senate majority and stop national Republicans from bullying their way into filling another seat to reshape the Court.
[If you can help power this team to victory right now, chip in $5.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1650?t=7&akid=140%2E61531%2Ea-fhQT)
Thank you,
Peter

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Let me be real with you for a second, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Peter,

Before it comes to a close, I wanted to take a moment and be real with you about what Women's History Month means to me.

Like so many of you, I know what it’s like to be underestimated.

My entire life, I’ve stood up and fought for change. And for my entire life, I’ve faced doubt, skepticism, and straight up misogyny. From my tenure as the first Jewish woman student body president at the University of Florida to my service as a public defender and the Commissioner of Agriculture, I’ve been told that I shouldn’t bother — that I couldn’t do it.

But this month is the perfect reminder that, for centuries, women have never given up in their fight for change. Instead, we keep pushing forward — overcoming obstacles and proving the skeptics wrong. Women who don't give up are the reason we are where we are today.

Remembering these women and their stories has only strengthened my resolve to stand up for Florida women, win this race, and give Floridians their first ever woman Governor — no matter how many people say it can’t be done.

I’ve never been afraid to ruffle feathers, team. And I’m ready to ruffle as many feathers as it takes to bring something new to our state — to deliver real, meaningful change for Floridians. If you’re with me, click here to chip in $5 and help elect Florida’s first woman Governor. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=321womangov]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=321womangov]

There’s no denying that women are under attack in our state.

But no matter how hard DeSantis tries to drag us back to a time when women were expected to be seen and not heard, I’ll never stop fighting to amplify women’s voices and make sure we have a say on the issues that impact us most.

Florida women deserve a champion — someone who has never and will never waver in the fight for women’s rights. I’m ready to be that champion. Stand with me in my fight to end DeSantis’ dictatorship and give women a powerful voice in the Governor’s office. Click here to make a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=321womangov]

Thank you for standing with me.

— Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

Stand with me in my fight to end DeSantis’ dictatorship and give women a powerful voice in the Governor’s office. Click here to make a donation today. [] Thank you for standing with me. — Nikki Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Joe Jaworski is ready to be Texas Attorney General on Day One — and here is exactly what he will do. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13607326?e=5d8d80652b)

| | , **Joe Jaworski is Day One Ready.**

That's why the [**Houston Chronicle**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2632ee0d82&e=5d8d80652b), the [**Dallas Morning News**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=f514d5ddfc&e=5d8d80652b), and [**so many of our elected leaders in Texas**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=aa78a3be8b&e=5d8d80652b) have endorsed Joe: they know he has what it takes to win and they trust him to do what's right for Texas.

[**So as we head toward the May 24th runoff, will you chip in once again to help us win this election?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=9dde18a2d9&e=5d8d80652b)

Joe wanted to show you exactly what we'd do on Day One. Here are his plans: **8am** Assemble Leadership Team for first weekly meeting; **9am** Release first 100 days Agenda; **10am** Take Oath of Office; **10:30am** File Notices of Dismissal of all litigation opposing the Affordable Care Act; **11am** File Amended pleadings in SCOTUS informing Court of Texas AG’s position that SB 8 is unconstitutional; **11:30am** Blast release memo to all High School Principals reminding them of Tx.Elec.Code section 13.046(d)’s strict requirement that each principal or his designee shall be a “high school deputy registrar” and shall offer voter registration at least twice a year to each student who is or will be 18 years or older during that school year; **1pm** Conference via Zoom with Mayors and County Judges to discuss the unnecessary burdens of state government unfunded mandates upon local jurisdictions, and how the Texas AG office can support local decision-making authority; **3pm** Dismiss two Texas AG-led prosecutions that are facially race-motivated - Sherriff Zena Stephens and Hervis Rogers; **4pm** News Conference to release all documents in Texas AG Office’s possession pertaining to Nate Paul and documents pertaining to all allegations involving the Whistleblower action filed against the Texas AG’s office; **5pm** Call randomly-selected Texas AG’s office employee to check in to see how his/her day went.
[**Will you donate to Joe's campaign to help make this a reality?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=9c23fb8819&e=5d8d80652b)
**[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=187564b100&e=5d8d80652b)**We must elect our best candidate to defeat Ken Paxton in November. That candidate is Joe Jaworski.

[**Contribute today so that we can beat Ken Paxton in November.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=df50826ced&e=5d8d80652b)
— Team Jaworski

name: SarahForWisconsin.com
subject: We just released our second TV ad! Watch it now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Today, we are officially releasing our second TV ad of the campaign and wanted you to be one of the first to see it. For decades, Democrats and Republicans have promised to lower prescription drug costs. But every time Washington gets close, Big Pharma steps in and politicians cave — allowing drug companies to rake in record profits while regular people have to choose between groceries and life-saving medicine.

It’s time to change that — which is why our campaign just released a brand-new TV ad calling out Republicans like Ron Johnson, and even some Democrats, for failing to take on the big pharmaceutical companies and bring down costs.

**[Watch our latest ad before it goes live, and then, please consider chipping in to put our campaign in an even stronger position to defeat Ron Johnson:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217727/336225094/-1734674204?refcode=em22_220321_decades_fndd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220321_decades_fndd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk5ZmIyYS00OGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-5PaPiLiv8AwQWWGKyex34Hr-BkoRxQj6BTsdzQlSc=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217728/336225095/-1734674204?refcode=em22_220321_decades_fndd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220321_decades_fndd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk5ZmIyYS00OGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-5PaPiLiv8AwQWWGKyex34Hr-BkoRxQj6BTsdzQlSc=) | [Watch now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217729/336225096/-1734674204?refcode=em22_220321_decades_fndd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220321_decades_fndd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk5ZmIyYS00OGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-5PaPiLiv8AwQWWGKyex34Hr-BkoRxQj6BTsdzQlSc=)
---

Sarah is focused on building an agenda for all Wisconsinites so that we can get this U.S. Senate seat working for everyone again. That’s why she’s been out on the road having important conversations to help shape what we’re fighting for in this campaign.

Just a few weeks ago, Sarah hosted a roundtable discussion in Green Bay to hear directly from Wisconsinites about how Washington inaction has failed them for too long. Today, she’s in Milwaukee to discuss her plan to rein in skyrocketing drug costs and take on Big Pharma.

Here’s what Sarah believes we need to do:
* Allow Medicare to negotiate for lower drug prices
* Push for an out-of-pocket cap on prescription drug costs for seniors
* Cap the price of insulin and other widely-used drugs
* Stop Big Pharma from hiking up prices beyond the rate of inflation
* Eliminate the tax giveaway for Big Pharma and hold them accountable
* End patent thicket maneuvering so low-cost generic drugs can be produced
* Create an international price index to prevent drug companies from price gouging Americans

The system is broken, and Ron Johnson isn’t doing anything to fix it. We need to replace him with someone who actually gives a damn about working families — and is willing to get out there and fight for them.

That’s why Sarah is running for U.S. Senate, and unlike Ron Johnson, she’ll never stop showing up, listening, and working as hard as possible to get results. But flipping any seat from red to blue is a challenge. It’s an effort that requires a LOT of resources.

While we’re creating an agenda that works for everyone and getting our message out on the ground and on the airwaves, we’re hoping we can count on you to help us replace Ron Johnson with a U.S. Senator who will actually deliver results.

**[Please consider making a small contribution to our campaign so we can keep having these important conversations with Wisconsin voters and reaching them on TV. Every dollar helps us build the kind of campaign that can compete *everywhere* and talk to *everyone* — that’s how we’re going to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43217730/336225098/-1734674204?refcode=em22_220321_decades_fndd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220321_decades_fndd_gq_act___sfw_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk5ZmIyYS00OGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-5PaPiLiv8AwQWWGKyex34Hr-BkoRxQj6BTsdzQlSc=)**

clean_body: Today, we are officially releasing our second TV ad of the campaign and wanted you to be one of the first to see it. For decades, Democrats and Republicans have promised to lower prescription drug costs. But every time Washington gets close, Big Pharma steps in and politicians cave — allowing drug companies to rake in record profits while regular people have to choose between groceries and life-saving medicine. It’s time to change that — which is why our campaign just released a brand-new TV ad calling out Republicans like Ron Johnson, and even some Democrats, for failing to take on the big pharmaceutical companies and bring down costs. = = | = Sarah is focused on building an agenda for all Wisconsinites so that we can get this U.S. Senate seat working for everyone again. That’s why she’s been out on the road having important conversations to help shape what we’re fighting for in this campaign. Just a few weeks ago, Sarah hosted a roundtable discussion in Green Bay to hear directly from Wisconsinites about how Washington inaction has failed them for too long. Today, she’s in Milwaukee to discuss her plan to rein in skyrocketing drug costs and take on Big Pharma. Here’s what Sarah believes we need to do: Allow Medicare to negotiate for lower drug prices Push for an out-of-pocket cap on prescription drug costs for seniors Cap the price of insulin and other widely-used drugs Stop Big Pharma from hiking up prices beyond the rate of inflation Eliminate the tax giveaway for Big Pharma and hold them accountable End patent thicket maneuvering so low-cost generic drugs can be produced Create an international price index to prevent drug companies from price gouging Americans The system is broken, and Ron Johnson isn’t doing anything to fix it. But flipping any seat from red to blue is a challenge. It’s an effort that requires a LOT of resources. name: Vernon Jones for Congress
subject: President Trump hosts fundraiser with Vernon Jones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
Record amount raised!
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
Joined by President Trump, Vernon Jones raises nearly $300,000 at Mar-a-Lago Fundraiser to benefit campaign for Congress
---
| |
---
|
---
| Madison County, Georgia (March 21, 2022) \- This past week, the campaign of former State Representative and the next Congressman for Georgia's 10th Congressional District Vernon Jones reported raising more than $255,000 at a Thursday fundraiser hosted by President Trump at his Mar-a-Lago estate.
Attendees included the 45th President, who delivered remarks, former 9/11 NYPD Commissioner Bernard Kerik, and America's Mayor Rudy Giuliani. All of whom have endorsed Rep. Jones' bid for Congress.
"I couldn't be more humbled by the outpour of support this campaign has received in so little time. This is a campaign funded by America First patriots, not the Establishment," said Rep. Vernon Jones.
"From now until Election Day, our campaign is focused on earning our seat in Congress, not inheriting it. I'm honored to be the only Trump Endorsed candidate in this race and I look forward to fighting for the people of Georgia's 10th Congressional District as their next Congressman," Jones continued.

The press may email vernonjonespress@jonesforgeorgia.com to confirm press time for an interview on the event.
---
| |
---
About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.
---

body:
We're making progress, but we're not there just yet. We're making progress, but we're not there just yet. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f5bdd6a4c1d9485a872db1631de5b4f3&_e=H9jq3PIdkMS0hKLFZ1Esx0yy5Vj42sM7P2UVDdLxT51M8CgJNVW8GKd-GYRdpuErPa2YZETVJghbaaB9UUrEth3nWZbuPvQIFcGerkboNujV90Ab907kb38xQc_lgze6egGOmqt7kNYPvDd8_GpK0BTHEIT31u--hHqRWdEff1BR3MeGXAIEsmv3CCBDu97SnFe-YQLPtf1-3Xq_-GEa7BobFxxM61t7PTCQprcEHxVsRKsI_lf7N61beOGIS5g4r8b_OKRUqf1wX_pUXwLNYri0ku-SoVWZq2tumcpel_6uao_M5tjX6Z3UE2PDUKWvx6vNTjl9N8NgDKUQiWDAlg2YBXfNcEl-gySP9aLOsIJLCjLMn57D2uYlS1i_R9CAbQh_O_ILDfeW_T0u5DgSOLfIAj_96Y99R5hTujlvtyhqLnRNJPFGLL-GEh5nnJHjH_paOPtPr4uN1_XMOjmIVTrmenzRRdEMigJM8AxVrSU%3D)

---
Peter,

We've got a little under two weeks now to hit our goal of getting 5,527 conservatives to donate to our campaign. [**We're making progress, but we're not there just yet.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f5bdd6a4c1d9485a872db1631de5b4f3&_e=H9jq3PIdkMS0hKLFZ1Esx0yy5Vj42sM7P2UVDdLxT51M8CgJNVW8GKd-GYRdpuErPa2YZETVJghbaaB9UUrEth3nWZbuPvQIFcGerkboNujV90Ab907kb38xQc_lgze6egGOmqt7kNYPvDd8_GpK0BTHEIT31u--hHqRWdEff1BR3MeGXAIEsmv3CCBDu97SnFe-YQLPtf1-3Xq_-GEa7BobFxxM61t7PTCQprcEHxVsRKsI_lf7N61beOGIS5g4r8b_OKRUqf1wX_pUXwLNYlOoaprThSBv-_k78e9-6BgH_OXEIAgauoqfmkZig5bP673ZMsMojEIta52UkCJUyt-9_WN_l9LZajmiOd_Zp0wAVYf2snpbSnPrSUo3wqTTeNdj_Dnyk3jvkyrsBJXFpT07Ni8xyUFWtmFioDnaOKV6FscPgkIGuxHrsGXrUl-SEfPycBqo22k7YVFgRFHfX5zKAMkOpRFxSe9kdVKIGXg%3D)

We know that with everything going on in the world right now, political donations are not the highest of your priorities. **However, events in our country and around the world are proof that IT TRULY MATTERS WHO IS IN OFFICE.**

_Why?_

**Because by flipping just ONE DEMOCRAT held Senate seat, Republicans will retake the majority and begin to clean up the messes President Biden has created.**

We've seen the emails DEMS are sending out, and we know they're scared. They're taking fundraising seriously, as one incumbent correctly put it, "because losing even one seat means losing the Senate."

When we wake up on April 1st, we ALL want to breathe a sigh of relief knowing we crushed our quarterly fundraising goal. clean_body: We're making progress, but we're not there just yet. We're making progress, but we're not there just yet. | Peter, We've got a little under two weeks now to hit our goal of getting 5,527 conservatives to donate to our campaign. We know that with everything going on in the world right now, political donations are not the highest of your priorities. However, events in our country and around the world are proof that IT TRULY MATTERS WHO IS IN OFFICE. Why? Because by flipping just ONE DEMOCRAT held Senate seat, Republicans will retake the majority and begin to clean up the messes President Biden has created. We've seen the emails DEMS are sending out, and we know they're scared. They're taking fundraising seriously, as one incumbent correctly put it, "because losing even one seat means losing the Senate." When we wake up on April 1st, we ALL want to breathe a sigh of relief knowing we crushed our quarterly fundraising goal. Please consider send this email to a friend and helping us recruit more supporters. Help us get the job done. We're counting on you! | We'll update you in a couple of days as to where things stand. If you want to ensure we hit our goal, Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: Why I care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leora Levy for U
body:
People often ask me the question of why? Why I’m running for U.S. Senate? Why I care so much about America? Why would I do anything to defend freedom | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=bef1864383e346409027536839015a54&_t=xxmPXM1ClN1cEN0HSg6U-SZfUPaKf_WOjeGwufx8M7g10L1OPKhFX8VXEOHDWNONqxT0vaq9SB8m0UGTxVhkR2_82hDiH9hda4qsmC-gB8_1Q5aukE36bHUps0RvOfKFhJrb0AjsbxTRRuzmIFmjo4rBgTwiU7AjGn5-85dwYys%3D).

[
](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bef1864383e346409027536839015a54&_e=onS656lDpO4ogpM3Fex-FJJlJvQAC1dAXLS-Tj1HWbLXyMrTMwVTPP-NmQAcnXFpC-XzziqO-4lUg2yhzs2_6AuJlSjAGuS7HFE2qApOOKklL_t1duZzEH3OCpyRawr3nkZDtYHWYI1DfbcyJv3hTU1Hcoi6G3YN7aqV0d7DJh8MHd_lCSIh-CrTjGEs2ybkdCdhkd8g8xomyqLzoeCdpRxL7_ZI67_tNcP9_EPi8Z4HnP9bNfAHL309JWBjfZTgj35x_UhjCl9b7Dw9FSpMZbd6GlfPEht6S5hFjOF7gCQhcG-rN55U7_2CfAsjEJJEC7qRsw0W3PMz7_7xKdME4AHcrc43W63-GyEdUFBTCOUEvWEX4dsmW8d86cA6nqw4JfZJRhVfEHwbir7bzeYezWgQGBOkygKaQmA5k1jmldCcRtFfgdTI6FoWbQFDXq7k)
---
Peter,

People often ask me the question of _**why?**_

_Why I’m running for U.S. Senate?_

_Why I care so much about America?_

_Why would I do _anything_ to defend freedom and protect liberty?_

I’ll tell you why, Peter - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. **I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960.** In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust.

I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. **And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago.**

[**If you want to hear more about why I’m running, and why this race is so imperative to restoring our Nation, tap the link to watch below:**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bef1864383e346409027536839015a54&_e=onS656lDpO4ogpM3Fex-FJJlJvQAC1dAXLS-Tj1HWbLXyMrTMwVTPP-NmQAcnXFpC-XzziqO-4lUg2yhzs2_6AuJlSjAGuS7HFE2qApOOKklL_t1duZzEH3OCpyRawr3nkZDtYHWYI1DfbcyJv3hTU1Hcoi6G3YN7aqV0d7DJh8MHd_lCSIh-CrTjGEs2ybkdCdhkd8g8xomyqLzoeCdpRxL7_ZI67_tNcP9_EPi8Z53cNwZZG57uzBiOw-8z1tIKv1h53MQXwqziyp9qZFLWPZLpBMJS8tr04MRLezeIrqTGKKLK4xlp8EvWRrW4u0eOzGQuxFalVuLZGIvod4rThdPyp2QLRafyUFkFHIKbCrykaafa0PScyq5Q3VX3rA2VEkjocA1b68MDvJRTIop80wxVmnPHQM2I10JQcF_c9-QjFyI8-v4VlFLoTXtEh1c)

[
](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bef1864383e346409027536839015a54&_e=onS656lDpO4ogpM3Fex-FJJlJvQAC1dAXLS-Tj1HWbLXyMrTMwVTPP-NmQAcnXFpC-XzziqO-4lUg2yhzs2_6AuJlSjAGuS7HFE2qApOOKklL_t1duZzEH3OCpyRawr3nkZDtYHWYI1DfbcyJv3hTU1Hcoi6G3YN7aqV0d7DJh8MHd_lCSIh-CrTjGEs2ybkdCdhkd8g8xomyqLzoeCdpRxL7_ZI67_tNcP9_EPi8Z55EoaLh9lEWdswDm3Afchmzl6JDBy9XiAvRFFcEvnXDY5ZrSg2Y7bYfBTVCImC5bmahH9WpcTMg4smZQynZgoNn4WbYU050gxYpBhDa_8s_utnOngnz3P1m2okJkEq7Kjz3RMecVpwRu8phXeaEOWiyF09ycVqMECznp21UEMVDGSviRMjH_Vs-uC-ih_o3y_dpCt-3k7Fn2eD2bzWgbTy)

I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. _There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already._

What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great.

[**I have always felt a calling to give back and serve my country.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bef1864383e346409027536839015a54&_e=onS656lDpO4ogpM3Fex-FJJlJvQAC1dAXLS-Tj1HWbLXyMrTMwVTPP-NmQAcnXFpC-XzziqO-4lUg2yhzs2_6AuJlSjAGuS7HFE2qApOOKklL_t1duZzEH3OCpyRawr3nkZDtYHWYI1DfbcyJv3hTU1Hcoi6G3YN7aqV0d7DJh8MHd_lCSIh-CrTjGEs2ybkdCdhkd8g8xomyqLzoeCdpRxL7_ZI67_tNcP9_EPi8Z6mCY1rT_OmyiQ0885Z1jKYYnXcwG4PROX1AxvW9KH5xgr-vizyI6pOUz4OA5-SqmOx4kJmzFiAMpklhu_3Qb6OivNAAKr7hDXmeXwFErXe-F4elu8Xj66CuTFe5vipjSdmLk0KaS72LJDpnu1UI59485HT9cv4PaPTjAazd9MUGvaCJATwMnVMdZRIIjQzIWOwlq_NH9TuqYypyQBz6xcE)

If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, [**then I need you to join my team. Every single dollar my campaign raises is a dollar put towards a better future for this country.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bef1864383e346409027536839015a54&_e=onS656lDpO4ogpM3Fex-FJJlJvQAC1dAXLS-Tj1HWbLXyMrTMwVTPP-NmQAcnXFpC-XzziqO-4lUg2yhzs2_6AuJlSjAGuS7HFE2qApOOKklL_t1duZzEH3OCpyRawr3nkZDtYHWYI1DfbcyJv3hTU1Hcoi6G3YN7aqV0d7DJh8MHd_lCSIh-CrTjGEs2ybkdCdhkd8g8xomyqLzoeCdpRxL7_ZI67_tNcP9_EPi8Z4qT-QUgSfdZUje_-7iKQecoDpGZaQuC0T8cQkscvyWAVOCtpnme1x3mz6pxpXoA9fCGjGsK4wESmoFVq0jOz4AAIRKD9cXcox9ziaK2ii9HRgxnv_oRL5Vl0J0kc9VRMoesXk3jBC5zKFwQPP8XcQW2D27IbQZqmetA8O3dSivZXy5K3o5Vf4dHiHtZ6UHUALEzLb0ac_xEYJuludwIrnz)

So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --_a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of_ -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America.

I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains.

I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. [**I hope I can count on your support.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bef1864383e346409027536839015a54&_e=onS656lDpO4ogpM3Fex-FJJlJvQAC1dAXLS-Tj1HWbLXyMrTMwVTPP-NmQAcnXFpC-XzziqO-4lUg2yhzs2_6AuJlSjAGuS7HFE2qApOOKklL_t1duZzEH3OCpyRawr3nkZDtYHWYI1DfbcyJv3hTU1Hcoi6G3YN7aqV0d7DJh8MHd_lCSIh-CrTjGEs2ybkdCdhkd8g8xomyqLzoeCdpRxL7_ZI67_tNcP9_EPi8Z4ohqrY25MGwfqiqV1HrPUU38d5FRlFMa65DZScuyVyJoUXPvpytKrM5gL-0kdY59T4EvC-qQboeK-IDnsFNkwcXQnM02BRj5_faY8DUaEpPLBQQ3UYaqa6mENdAAjWjE4mCyd3Gx7ndNXIif_G7dhjMQ0TKXM6SqsvTxOY0Yyz-8xs6UnoerwAi14qHBGB6cVLP_vg5WnyJUNQUokRW_bw)

For Freedom,
Leora Levy

P.S. If you want to learn more about my story or why I’m running for Senate, [**tap the secure link to watch now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=bef1864383e346409027536839015a54&_e=onS656lDpO4ogpM3Fex-FJJlJvQAC1dAXLS-Tj1HWbLXyMrTMwVTPP-NmQAcnXFpC-XzziqO-4lUg2yhzs2_6AuJlSjAGuS7HFE2qApOOKklL_t1duZzEH3OCpyRawr3nkZDtYHWYI1DfbcyJv3hTU1Hcoi6G3YN7aqV0d7DJh8MHd_lCSIh-CrTjGEs2ybkdCdhkd8g8xomyqLzoeCdpRxL7_ZI67_tNcP9_EPi8Z52_II9TdHJtoLtO2eVHFDFyVXdgzjN5CiVb3lXUXoUl28ERjueg5AhPwQsjbNY414sCds1JqQhvCd23x8aYx7mzwYDDh5lVAlevsYoLndrWyq6zdCow4kPhNoYUZvTQ2tEIslLeWufdlOPhXNyvF2bQvjMWnTAVDdXTkHi-BR-iu56hTmXd6Nu4x_ZMZxznroa0pcBzn61VamIZX_mDN6K)

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

clean_body: People often ask me the question of why? Why I’m running for U.S. Senate? Why I care so much about America? Why would I do anything to defend freedom | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may . Peter, People often ask me the question of why? Why I’m running for U.S. Senate? Why I care so much about America? Why would I do anything to defend freedom and protect liberty? I’ll tell you why, Peter - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960. In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust. I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago. I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already. What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great. If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America. I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains. I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. For Freedom, Leora Levy P.S. If you want to learn more about my story or why I’m running for Senate, | | About Leora I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done. | Paid for by Leora Levy for U.S. Senate, Inc. | | _**I support the 2nd Amendment and recognize the need to address gun violence as a public health issue.**_ "A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State, the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed." This law is part of our Constitution, and it shall not be infringed. Gun-rights advocates view firearm ownership as a fundamental American civil liberty. **I support the 2nd Amendment.** _At the same time_ , it's critical to recognize that gun-related deaths and violence in the US claimed nearly 21,000 lives, and suicide by gun claimed 25,000 lives last year. We have a problem in this country. **Gun violence like cancer has no single cure or cause. There are probably many 'types' of gun violence with different risk factors and different prevention strategies** :
* Suicide
* Urban gun violence primarily affecting minority young men
* Family violence
* Mass shootings
* Police/law enforcement
* Accidental shooting (children at homes with guns)

Federal gun violence research restarted after nearly 25 years of absence in 2019. Federal money for gun research essentially stopped in 1996 with the Dickey Amendment, which barred the CDC from spending money to "advocate or promote gun control." Unfortunately, there is scant rigorous evidence to prove or disprove policies to decrease gun violence. Limited research continued at the state or local levels. Other branches in the federal government like the National Institute of Health (NIH) are starting to give us support moving forward. Solutions shouldn't be an either/or – Keep guns or prevent gun violence. Instead, we should discuss how to protect the rights of law-abiding gun owners _and_ reduce gun violence. We need a win-win, not a win-loss. Gun violence is a public health problem and deserves attention and research commensurate with its impact on our Nation.
* Possible strategies supported by the current research:
* Expanding background checks to reduce violent crime.
* Waiting times for gun purchases to reduce suicide and violent crime.
* Safety storage to reduce firearm injuries and deaths, especially among children.

We must move forward together addressing gun violence with the support of science in our decision-making. This is an [**interesting article**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43218455/336228628/-456030901?unlocked_article_code=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAACEIPuomT1JKd6J17Vw1cRCfTTMQmqxCdw_PIxftm3iWna3DODmwdiPkORJCH_0bRZKF4INQu2XGFRdhFPbkkSblow_RSNlZmS0yjrpDCmIgAJ299j7OPaV4M_sCHW6Eko3itZ3OlKex7yfqx70PbYTK8Ubje03YqOApnopV6fVqr32hckqaVF7RxjdJ9jvoxF9stE2d7ESqAvvnjAxt8P8zXLU2Pr1lrBJwKHG3bjtWe6LkfcQ9NCVygT3t34Go06tw0K8pAde-kbEZmIJyi9O1XXm94L46pBIkzQpzXkNhqsb3PrR-Nz6mm1tB5NXTQ-GnRl3klxGaF4yY&smid=url-share&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWZlNGY2OS00YWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HldLHdw1IRPmJH5nu86yWiIOWCi-JcrOVJr8x_8gfoo=&emci=9a053273-47a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=35fe4f69-4aa9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) for your reading. We can and will work together to address gun violence and its tragic impact on our communities.

My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities.
