name: Laurie Teper
subject: We Need You!!
body:
Hi Team!
If you or someone you know has an interest in being the Orange or Granville County Coordinator, we NEED you! The role includes the following:
1. Scope out neighborhoods in your county to canvass in
2. Pick a meeting location for volunteers to meet at
3. Be the point person for volunteers who are canvassing on the day of the event
4. _Optional_ \- Purchase a small amount of food/water/coffee/plates/cups/napkins for volunteers for that day. Keep receipts. Reimbursed. Hopefully a volunteer will fill this role on signup genius
5. Search for community events that Courtney can attend and/or set up a "vendor" table in your county

Please let me know ASAP.

**This Saturday, March 26 we are Door Knocking in Alamance County from 8:00-12:00. Meet at Daily Donut, 1067 S. Main Street in Graham. (See attached flyer)**

Sign up HERE: <https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>

We want everyone to be prepared so please arrive on time, wear comfortable shoes, look over the attached canvassing guidelines, bring car phone chargers, your enthusiasm and smiles! Light refreshments will be provided, instructions given including a review of using the app and we will head out about 8:30.

** _Don 't forget to download the free Campaign Sidekick App._** **_When you do, send me a text or email with your first/last name, address, phone number and email. We need this information to activate the App._** To familiarize yourself with it, here is a link to a 6 minute video on how to use the Campaign Sidekick App for Door Knocking <https://vimeo.com/438191866>. We will also go over instructions the morning of the event.

Bring a friend to help! We encourage 2 people to stay together. Only one of you needs the App.

Print and bring the attached word document on issues that Courtney stands for. Familiarize yourself with it. If a voter has a question regarding a particular issue, you can refer to it.

WEAR YOUR COURTNEY GEELS T-SHIRT! If you don't have one, we will have them on Saturday (free). If you want to purchase a sweatshirt, the cost is $50, available as well.

Take photos while you are canvassing so we can get it out on social media. If you have a voter who is excited to vote for Courtney, ask their permission to take a photo while they hold a palm card or flyer and if we can post it on social media.

Brad Kirby is our Social Media Director. Please send him photos at _[m](mailto:bkirby7@gmail.com)[edia@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:edia@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)_

If you cannot door knock, phone banking is an option but it is secondary to our needs right now. **_You still need the Campaign Sidekick App, I still need your information, and you need to sign up at the SignUp Genius link listed above_**. Here is a link to a 2 minute video on how to use the app for phone banking _<https://vimeo.com/496983629>._ I can also meet with you on a Zoom call to watch the video together and answer any questions you might have.You just need to let me know prior to Friday.

Please spread the word for volunteers and send them my way!

Follow us on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/courtneygeels), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/courtneygeels/), and give us a like on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CourtneyGeelsForCongress) to keep up with Courtney.

Be sure to like and share!

I look forward to seeing some awesome volunteers this Saturday!

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

name: Giffords.org
subject: What if you knew?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What if you knew your $3 could make our communities safer from gun violence for generations to come?
#

$3.
What if you knew your $3 could spearhead life-saving gun safety reforms—like the 465 bills we’ve already helped pass nationwide?
What if you knew your $3 would help us elect a Congress that will take action on gun violence prevention legislation and send federal legislation to President Biden’s desk?
What if you knew your $3 could make our communities safer from gun violence for generations to come?
$3 might not seem the amount that can accomplish this but by the time you read this, someone has chipped in their $3 and is hoping you do the same. It ALL adds up when everyone is chipping in.
Our FEC filing deadline is just 10 days away! We need your help to finish strong and show the power of our movement.
So we’re asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC to help us save lives? Please contribute before our FEC deadline ends in 10 days.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220321-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1720_3935704_30kjK9&akid=1720%2E3935704%2E30kjK9)

It ALL adds up when everyone is chipping in. Our FEC filing deadline is just 10 days away! We need your help to finish strong and show the power of our movement. So we’re asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for standing with us. The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

subject: More unhinged. More desperate.
body:
While working families are struggling, he's hellbent on punishing Democrats who crossed him and paving the way for a Trump comeback. It’s sickening. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. Friend

I'm reaching out to ask you for a **[$3 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43226460/336290110/-217444029?refcode=em-3.21.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWU5OTVlYS03ZWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UagJWO2wiZ8UEiuBdwJs9jSnzv7gaRhUNJiOaXt1Ygc=)** to my campaign to unseat GOP leader Kevin McCarthy. Next week marks our very first FEC fundraising deadline of 2022, and after the deadline hits our fundraising numbers will go public for all to see.

As the year goes on, McCarthy has only become more unhinged and desperate in his quest for the Speaker's gavel.

**He began the month by pointing the finger at Biden for not supplying Ukraine with weapons. That's despite supporting Trump's decision to withhold $391 million in aid to Ukraine unless they investigated Joe Biden. Then last week, he repeated his threats to boot Democrats like Adam Schiff from their committee roles if Republicans retake the House.**

Central Valley voters know that McCarthy is only out for himself. While working families are struggling, he's hellbent on punishing Democrats who crossed him and paving the way for a Trump comeback. It’s sickening.

I refuse to believe that McCarthy is untouchable. But if we’re going to stop him from getting the gavel, we need widespread grassroots support.

**[Before our FEC deadline hits, we need to raise $50,000 from across California and the country to put McCarthy on notice that we are going to give him the fight of his political career. Will you chip in $3 right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43226461/336290111/-217444029?refcode=em-3.21.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWU5OTVlYS03ZWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UagJWO2wiZ8UEiuBdwJs9jSnzv7gaRhUNJiOaXt1Ygc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43226462/336290112/-217444029?refcode=em-3.21.22-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWU5OTVlYS03ZWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UagJWO2wiZ8UEiuBdwJs9jSnzv7gaRhUNJiOaXt1Ygc=)

subject: ALL ABOARD! Last Call for Dinner at DiMillo's with a Navy SEAL!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Make reservations today to celebrate with Ed Thelander and friends, enjoy the beauty of DiMillo's On The Water and the Scrumptious Admiral's Menu. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/eb8873df7acd/a-strong-finish-to-8865906?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=dfcf24b921&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=15192c80c4&e=f8a0a76a2b "Ed Thelander For Congress Maine First District 2022 Election DiMillo's")
---
"Usually, if you find yourself having dinner on a boat with a Navy SEAL, you'd suspect something BIG was about to happen."
| |
> _**Don’t Miss the Boat!**
>
> Get onboard the ship to victory with Ed Thelander, candidate for Maine's 1st Congressional District, at DiMillo’s on the Water in Portland.
> Saturday, March 26th ~ 5:00-6:00 ~ Sponsors Hour
> 6:00-8:00 ~ Ticket holders
>
> Special Guests include Yasin Ahmady, a.k.a. General Joe Gomez, Afghan Freedom Fighter during the Russian invasion of his homeland, and interpreter for SEAL Teams and Special Forces during Operation Enduring Freedom Afghanistan.
>
> **\- ALSO - **
>
> Hear remarks by 8th generation Maine lobsterman Jason Joyce. Jason brought the struggles of the Maine lobster industry to the national spotlight when he addressed the Republican National Convention in 2020. Jason will provide an update on state and federal regulations that threaten the lobstering way of life, and the ongoing clash with the offshore industrial wind industry. Jason will also show a preview of his son Andrew's excellent documentary, "The Maine Reset", a beautiful yet alarming look at the many threats facing this industry which is so integral to Maine._
---
| [RESERVE YOUR SEAT NOW - CLICK HERE](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=789cb54880&e=f8a0a76a2b "RESERVE YOUR SEAT NOW - CLICK HERE")
---
| _**Here's a sneak peak at the evening's menu, the famed Admiral's Buffet**_

Sicilian Citrus Scallops
Pineland Farms Prime Grade Tri Tip (Carved at Table)
Roma Chicken with Havarti & roasted tomato cheese sauce
Truffled Lobster & Corn Mascarpone Rigatoni
Shrimp & Grits Mashed Potato Bar with all the fixings
Commercial Street Salad
Chef’s Vegetable Italian Bread
Assorted Desserts
Coffee, Tea or Soda
Cash Bar
$250.00 per person

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m uncomfortable just thinking about it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us

Peter,
---
Today, I am proud to announce Walton County Commissioner Bo Warren has endorsed my campaign. Commissioner Bo Warren has been a strong advocate for Georgia’s agricultural industry and those who dedicate their lives to providing families across our state and nation with a steady supply of American grown produce.

_“I’m excited to endorse Marc McMain for Congress. With Marc, what you see is what you get. Marc will do what is best for Walton County and the people of Georgia. He is committed to protecting our agricultural industry and making sure we sustain those jobs.” - Bo Warren, Walton County Commissioner_
---
As Conservative patriots unite to reverse the destructive direction of our country, it is more important than ever to assert sound policy decisions in the staple issues of agriculture for the people of Georgia and our nation.
I thank Commissioner Warren for his support and look forward to working with America First leaders such as him so that Georgia’s hard-working farmers and ranchers are empowered to thrive.
Our farmers should be empowered to maintain their production levels with the capacity to attain prosperity as they feed countless families. **Conservative values in leadership nurture the power of industries to thrive, while the government overreach of the Radical Left agenda threatens the American Dream of individuals** _**and**_**the national sovereignty of our nation.**
For too long, hard-working Americans have labored to provide sustenance while barely managing to survive. As your next Congressman, I will fight against the stranglehold that the Radical Democrats have placed on the hardworking taxpayers of Georgia. Together we can enter an era of prosperity, and protect the legacy of the American Dream for generations to come.
---
Please join Commissioner Warren in supporting our campaign. Your support in a donation of any amount today will show the Radical Left Democrats that the fruits of hardworking Georgians _do not belong in the hands of elitist overlords_ who serve themselves above the interests of the people. Please consider making your own endorsement today...

clean_body: | | | | Our movement grows stronger every day Peter, Today, I am proud to announce Walton County Commissioner Bo Warren has endorsed my campaign. Commissioner Bo Warren has been a strong advocate for Georgia’s agricultural industry and those who dedicate their lives to providing families across our state and nation with a steady supply of American grown produce. “I’m excited to endorse Marc McMain for Congress. With Marc, what you see is what you get. Marc will do what is best for Walton County and the people of Georgia. He is committed to protecting our agricultural industry and making sure we sustain those jobs.” - Bo Warren, Walton County Commissioner As Conservative patriots unite to reverse the destructive direction of our country, it is more important than ever to assert sound policy decisions in the staple issues of agriculture for the people of Georgia and our nation. I thank Commissioner Warren for his support and look forward to working with America First leaders such as him so that Georgia’s hard-working farmers and ranchers are empowered to thrive. Our farmers should be empowered to maintain their production levels with the capacity to attain prosperity as they feed countless families. Conservative values in leadership nurture the power of industries to thrive, while the government overreach of the Radical Left agenda threatens the American Dream of individuals andthe national sovereignty of our nation. For too long, hard-working Americans have labored to provide sustenance while barely managing to survive. As your next Congressman, I will fight against the stranglehold that the Radical Democrats have placed on the hardworking taxpayers of Georgia. Together we can enter an era of prosperity, and protect the legacy of the American Dream for generations to come. Please join Commissioner Warren in supporting our campaign. Your support in a donation of any amount today will show the Radical Left Democrats that the fruits of hardworking Georgians do not belong in the hands of elitist overlords who serve themselves above the interests of the people. Please consider making your own endorsement today... | | | | | | In Liberty, Marc McMain Congressional Candidate for GA-10_ | | [Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc.]() Our mailing address: Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. P.O. Box 191 Loganville, GA 30052

name: Glenn Beck
subject: [URGENT] A personal request for Ukraine
body:
| | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b5e6f3be90d249b5979d105eefb1f45a&_e=Se1OPH9bd0wHipuynAlrUs0pxp1Na8Z-dXuCTBbEXLgkmVVlk5i-rb4XSLJ8MoYxzrI4ZRBXPRk6Z_BfpifaFw1bE9DNeYQUi0aXiJvuetVLi5koyDqRv7Xoz0IjgnlrHKWxwfNdTIVys_nACZCA2PshNxhIc40N1G0Bg6pVTXs84Mt6BJAsiUJN-HuGmKp4QXpEDJyr-C9zyNwOVlk4FcSr_I1lqIID4RBYS7MHCgSXknqmVnZQdwJgI-BnovEOIbuBk94Wq6hs5rxnSW8a3Pv2Hs7RhrGWX5Pe_eZNFxDBBu0dlaU-YZMhqoR9yWqUGdb4ukKQsFhQGr_4sXydDi9iveNBWb8IqgApB9sA8JNBSZG6tTA84js9nuZBWundps-nCwuMaBs2CMqlPOiGXQ%3D%3D)

|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b5e6f3be90d249b5979d105eefb1f45a&_e=Se1OPH9bd0wHipuynAlrUs0pxp1Na8Z-dXuCTBbEXLgkmVVlk5i-rb4XSLJ8MoYxzrI4ZRBXPRk6Z_BfpifaFw1bE9DNeYQUi0aXiJvuetVLi5koyDqRv7Xoz0IjgnlrHKWxwfNdTIVys_nACZCA2PshNxhIc40N1G0Bg6pVTXv8zD5ntX6_0Jblpt4mrLN7OY_tOhx2BtsLdHCXD8GJkSLgZCSECxfDwf3und9aUH3Ix0Qv3N3AwTJgpjwEnvXwWQJbOXnseONQCSI6Y3y5iZzr451HBhJi4xBnr3Vw117dAILW06kuv1X8uDOt6GBKUxT6Cl5sD1eHD-BjhaQ_X-5DkaVSGGN90i6WrDa8ENRXpw4l-39rhvAgqDV-NmJxG6d9Ebl4JFPAMABuTbevNQ%3D%3D)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b5e6f3be90d249b5979d105eefb1f45a&_e=Se1OPH9bd0wHipuynAlrUs0pxp1Na8Z-dXuCTBbEXLgkmVVlk5i-rb4XSLJ8MoYxzrI4ZRBXPRk6Z_BfpifaFw1bE9DNeYQUi0aXiJvuetVLi5koyDqRv7Xoz0IjgnlrHKWxwfNdTIVys_nACZCA2PshNxhIc40N1G0Bg6pVTXtF1_qM1UH07v2Gu2yBFZmV97LPJJ_eM9oPjIaaVYoDbP8DMtzQOyb5i5IKpbrV2pFpa1Ef3i_cnSOYWPqmwu1ixm9IJzQIRwr9K32NGTI7sEKfaBJ-9JBTSaLz3FxwMouGw3Y4LCbuP2M-aezVMyQhbMYczySVqDNndTXkrUJEuPwHwP1P05PBLfIGh0iXha4M1VlP4KMztxwzqdJ-acCCk5vk2WkMRwDTQP9sc0F0yA%3D%3D)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=b5e6f3be90d249b5979d105eefb1f45a&_e=Se1OPH9bd0wHipuynAlrUs0pxp1Na8Z-dXuCTBbEXLgkmVVlk5i-rb4XSLJ8MoYxzrI4ZRBXPRk6Z_BfpifaFw1bE9DNeYQUi0aXiJvuetVLi5koyDqRv7Xoz0IjgnlrHKWxwfNdTIVys_nACZCA2PshNxhIc40N1G0Bg6pVTXvkAVUm1yLC5k5HYYVnxq6JIQDob81RbxDaH6Yib0fe6zWGBoayXTgFZGkUVI0kiJ91wR3dkdStNJEzXSyUtt8YMntGTdUxHkUCoedwRLl8eN5jIq05gl519_7pvgTG5bUH1cvEzfmZqxSB4jGpqrEMdfR_x-haJ95qxLuIO4bf6z9smEnJ144BrwphI5XeePliKQEK_7zZi2EU8Av8g2DzeX8RfwUlbEZzPJ7LI9JWOg%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One

body:
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=8f7832fadabb439cbb10c23c702545b9&_e=wk2CA6L5wegpKCBauXSnWahJOzY387PrrhT9ZRMdCy_bzUgDb-MbYEgAqn0ZSGi4YzjOY5IZSIdD5VdExOJ5YOra-qT6KqDZeR1paK9WZzTYua5vPV8mEAPyU5v6QCb_1bCOTxQvARL44LE28jJuJ7z_057DcKBX8WPAN5AwxXrj5nW95E6oeKh0GPzYYqkgy7EzcJNtnQd8la2XxvrG8LthrrfoNgFcRBAMagTxgu_jsdh4DaXdYOPdVXQ8qTsBjvK_uaNLHpYz46NYxm-ifD4x7NZgv_nYAnJiLt6QW1-c3nJTFCXv8jj2ECHMkpDONQZe7YwnH8Z-G-D_cyaXizOnMhaJ7EwZ86uNuJhRuho%3D) Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From discussing Russia and Ukraine to Biden's leadership, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. | |
---
**In the News**
**WALTZ ON AIDING UKRAINE**

Last Monday, Mike Waltz joined [Fox News' Hannity ](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=8f7832fadabb439cbb10c23c702545b9&_e=wk2CA6L5wegpKCBauXSnWUu6IyeoFLIN-kmI--JAZUcNHfHjLEZUmy1IZNYpt3L0qMEeGsAXP7B8jWE1lDar7ZZNIgJqFKN2l22xaP8bKE7c_pJDwG5klD3FUczi1I3NbHyww7JkHzW1dmfg_xVkTT1PyqX8B5HTvboNiZqVgot3HMsnYi6d3zyhx-Fc0lLTEW7sbaDQvG3G8LAZw9d8EKfQVAHyptBBb3kJ_89N-lKh9kXf0WeLBJ_-qbrUmx0oJHDQFw8-V1sQmh8DWF1VZ6dC9FKhjbXabuP6fulI6IxcW1X7SZ0gJ30Iv5zBf7u3C6MDa_dBY6Y2mi_TRYYa1NWeQVcKfZA31oXcKD9X4p5fqBHHgk2-E9HzoZdfHhaS)to discuss President Biden not sending fighter jets to Ukraine, saying:

clean_body: Hello Waltz Warriors! We hope this email finds you and your families healthy and safe! From discussing Russia and Ukraine to Biden's leadership, here’s just some of what Mike has been up to this past week. | | In the News WALTZ ON AIDING UKRAINE Last Monday, Mike Waltz joined discuss President Biden not sending fighter jets to Ukraine, saying: "Congress continues to PUSH the White House on more support for Ukraine. GOP and Dems have come together to increase lethal aid, increase the US defense budget, ban Russian oil, AND now, we're demanding Biden provide MIGs and S-300 air defense systems." //www.youtube.com/watch?v=BOJpMDjN-sY Watch the entire interview WALTZ ON PUTIN Then on Wednesday, Mike Waltz joined to talk about the importance of standing up to Putin and being proactive in backing Ukraine. From the interview: "We have so many creative options to support Ukraine, weaken Russia, keep American boots out of WWIII AND keep Putin from using chemical weapons. But first, Biden needs to stop telling Putin what we won't do and start telling him what we will do if he dares to use WMDs." Watch the interview . WALTZ ON NATIONAL SECURITY Also on Wednesday, Mike joined podcast to discuss the Biden administration's ongoing negotiations with Iran, Putin's aggression, and the many threats facing our country today. Listen to the full podcast . WALTZ ON SENDING MIGS TO UKRAINE On Thursday, Mike was on where he discussed the need for the U.S. to send fighter MiG jets to Ukraine and why he does not support a no-fly-zone. " The frustration is he continues to draw these false distinctions between this type of weapon systems is okay, but this type of weapon system is not okay. Give Zelensky the damn MiGs, give him the air superiority that he needs to protect his cities that are literally being levelled as we speak." Watch the entire segment . WALTZ ON THE IRAN DEAL To end the week, Mike joined on Friday to discuss China’s involvement with Russia and his opposition to the Iran Deal, saying: “It is a slap in the face to every veteran who died at the hands of the IRGC in Iraq. Over 600 US soldiers, not to mention the atrocities across the region.” Watch the entire segment . Essential Mission Brief Reading (And Listening) Store Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, yard signs, and now...koozies! | Social Media Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Mike remember to use #WaltzWarriors That's it for this week. Thanks for all of you support and stay tuned for more! Be sure to follow Mike on social media! | | ---|--- Paid for by Michael Waltz For Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues DOJ for Records of Communication Between Special Counsel John Durham and Attorney General Merrick Garland
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records of communication between Special Counsel John Durham and Attorney General Merrick Garland.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 21, 2022

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58356&L=26943&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLWFnZW5jeS1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0ZXMtbm9uLW1hc2tlZC1wYXNzZW5nZXJzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[DHS Agency Created after 9/11 to Protect Transport Investigates 3,800 “Non-Masked Passengers”](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58356&L=26943&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLWFnZW5jeS1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0ZXMtbm9uLW1hc2tlZC1wYXNzZW5nZXJzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** The Homeland Security agency created after the 2001 terrorist attacks to protect the nation’s transportation system has been quite busy investigating and fining travelers who do not wear masks to supposedly slow the spread of COVID-19. Since February 2021 when the face mask security directive was implemented to March 2022, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) has investigated more than 3,800 cases involving “non-masked passengers,” according to a federal audit. The agency charged with preventing another 9/11 issued more than 2,700 warning notices and over 900 civil penalties against passengers who violated the mask mandate, the probe found. The average fine was $699. | | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58356&L=26932&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm91cnRoLWRlcG9ydGF0aW9uLWZvci1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVuLXdhbnRlZC1mb3ItbXVyZGVyLWluLW1leGljby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[Fourth Deportation for Illegal Alien Wanted for Murder in Mexico, Arrested Thrice by U.S. Police](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58356&L=26932&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm91cnRoLWRlcG9ydGF0aW9uLWZvci1pbGxlZ2FsLWFsaWVuLXdhbnRlZC1mb3ItbXVyZGVyLWluLW1leGljby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** How porous is the southern border? An illegal immigrant arrested three times by local police in the U.S. and wanted for murder in Mexico just got deported for the fourth time. Immigration and Customs Enforcements (ICE) classifies the Mexican national, Rafael Silverio Rojas, as a “noncitizen foreign fugitive.” This month the agency’s Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) handed Rojas to Mexican authorities at the international boundary of the Lincoln/Juarez Bridge in Laredo, Texas. Rojas, who is 26 years old, had been removed from the U.S. on three previous occasions before the most recent encounter. Somehow the fugitive managed to enter the country through the southern border again and again. ### [Maryland’s highest court moves state primary to July 19 – The Washington Post ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58356&L=26933&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFyeWxhbmRzLWhpZ2hlc3QtY291cnQtbW92ZXMtc3RhdGUtcHJpbWFyeS10by1qdWx5LTE5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) The Washington Post Maryland’s highest court on Tuesday moved the state’s primary from June 28 to July 19, as courts weigh challenges to the state’s new legislative map as well as Maryland’s congressional map.

The trial involves two lawsuits. One was brought by a group of Republican state lawmakers backed by Fair Maps Maryland. The other was brought by the national conservative activist group Judicial Watch. ### [Md. Congressional redistricting trial continues as experts for plaintiffs wrap up testimony ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58356&L=26954&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93dG9wLmNvbS9tYXJ5bGFuZC8yMDIyLzAzL21kLWNvbmdyZXNzaW9uYWwtcmVkaXN0cmljdGluZy10cmlhbC1jb250aW51ZXMtYXMtZXhwZXJ0cy1mb3ItcGxhaW50aWZmcy13cmFwLXVwLXRlc3RpbW9ueS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) WTOP Two challenges against Maryland’s new congressional map have been consolidated for the trial in the Anne Arundel County Circuit Court. One lawsuit, Szeliga v. Lamone, is brought by Republican voters from all eight of Maryland’s congressional districts and contends that the new map violates the state constitution by intentionally diluting Republican votes. The other lawsuit, brought by Del. Neil C. Parrott (R-Washington) and the national conservative group Judicial Watch, also contends that the new map violates Article III, Section 4 of the Maryland Constitution. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records of communication between Special Counsel John Durham and Attorney General Merrick Garland. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 21, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records of communication between Special Counsel John Durham and Attorney General Merrick Garland. ---|--- | | | | = | = The Homeland Security agency created after the 2001 terrorist attacks to protect the nation’s transportation system has been quite busy investigating and fining travelers who do not wear masks to supposedly slow the spread of COVID-19. Since February 2021 when the face mask security directive was implemented to March 2022, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) has investigated more than 3,800 cases involving “non-masked passengers,” according to a federal audit. The agency charged with preventing another 9/11 issued more than 2,700 warning notices and over 900 civil penalties against passengers who violated the mask mandate, the probe found. The average fine was $699. = ---|--- | | | | == | == “Courts sanctioning lawyers pursuing election law claims in the heat of an election is a dangerous game that could allow election corruption to go unchecked,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The partisan retaliation and harassment of lawyers involved in litigating the 2020 election dispute is unprecedented and undermines the rule of law – and courts should not take part in it.” == ---|--- | | | | | How porous is the southern border? An illegal immigrant arrested three times by local police in the U.S. and wanted for murder in Mexico just got deported for the fourth time. Immigration and Customs Enforcements (ICE) classifies the Mexican national, Rafael Silverio Rojas, as a “noncitizen foreign fugitive.” This month the agency’s Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) handed Rojas to Mexican authorities at the international boundary of the Lincoln/Juarez Bridge in Laredo, Texas. Rojas, who is 26 years old, had been removed from the U.S. on three previous occasions before the most recent encounter. Somehow the fugitive managed to enter the country through the southern border again and again. ---|--- | | | = The Washington Post Maryland’s highest court on Tuesday moved the state’s primary from June 28 to July 19, as courts weigh challenges to the state’s new legislative map as well as Maryland’s congressional map. The trial involves two lawsuits. One was brought by a group of Republican state lawmakers backed by Fair Maps Maryland. The other was brought by the national conservative activist group Judicial Watch. = WTOP Two challenges against Maryland’s new congressional map have been consolidated for the trial in the Anne Arundel County Circuit Court. One lawsuit, Szeliga v. Lamone, is brought by Republican voters from all eight of Maryland’s congressional districts and contends that the new map violates the state constitution by intentionally diluting Republican votes. The other lawsuit, brought by Del. Neil C. Parrott (R-Washington) and the national conservative group Judicial Watch, also contends that the new map violates Article III, Section 4 of the Maryland Constitution. == Fox News “U.S.-China collaboration on the Global Virome Project is an opportunity to lead innovation in science, collaborate with China, and potentially contribute to scientific breakthroughs,” said the summary of the Global Virome Project in the email that was part of 92 pages obtained by the conservative group Judicial Watch in a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit with the National Institutes of Health. == = = = = = = | CLIPS = == | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Nan Whaley
subject: Corruption isn’t a bug for the Ohio GOP. It’s a feature.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Team,

For too long, corruption has been the norm in our capital here in Ohio, which is why **[I'm asking for your support to help end it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43226577/336291576/-401280179?refcode=nw_em_220321_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA5YmNjYi04M2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AA7SfgcCWgUMepx_lhqjvUeIMuTN9PvPCOnzLCaCfrE=)**

There were the predatory payday lenders who bought support for their bad business practices by funneling campaign donations.

The charter school that received hundreds of millions of dollars in public education funding through vouchers – by falsifying attendance records and inflating the number of students enrolled.

The FirstEnergy bribery scandal – the biggest in Ohio history, and one in which Mike DeWine was complicit – that resulted in taxpayer-funded bailouts of Ohio’s largest energy company, while Republicans took in over $60 million in bribes in exchange.

These are just the most recent three examples of Republican politicians in Ohio, and their wealthy friends, profiting while Ohio families pay the price – literally. **It's become clear: for the Ohio GOP, corruption isn't a bug. It's a feature.**

**[Ohio deserves better. If you agree, chip in $5 to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43226578/336291577/-401280179?refcode=nw_em_220321_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA5YmNjYi04M2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AA7SfgcCWgUMepx_lhqjvUeIMuTN9PvPCOnzLCaCfrE=)**

The kind of pay-to-play politics that too many in the Ohio Republican Party have participated in isn't just unethical. It also actively leaves behind Ohioans who should have a voice in our government. It's unacceptable, and it needs to end.

We need a governor who is ready to put a stop to the corruption and put Ohio families first. I'm running to be that governor.

**[It's time we clean up the corruption in Columbus and elect a governor who will prioritize working families – not padding politicians' bank accounts. Will you chip in $5 to help me win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43226579/336291578/-401280179?refcode=nw_em_220321_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA5YmNjYi04M2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AA7SfgcCWgUMepx_lhqjvUeIMuTN9PvPCOnzLCaCfrE=)**

Onward,

Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43226580/336291579/-401280179?refcode=nw_em_220321_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA5YmNjYi04M2E5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AA7SfgcCWgUMepx_lhqjvUeIMuTN9PvPCOnzLCaCfrE=)****

body:

I know it feels like the midterm elections are a long way off — but this is the first FEC deadline of the election year, so all eyes will be on us. = | = | = Republicans are eager to get me out of Congress because they know I am a strong progressive advocate on issues like making the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, passing the Green New Deal, and lowering prescription drug prices. They want to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for their extremist agenda — but I won’t let them. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for having my back, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress 660 Pennsylvania Ave SE Suite 202 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
People often ask me the question of why? Why I’m running for U.S. Senate? Why I care so much about America? Why would I do anything to defend freedom | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=42174ddb869d4278a5b5e4623f07f052&_t=csqdHO1Ece9oOAMTOR9tSaSlRV2cZchVKSEWHaSLPXHNO75RPE9zcAMkcmg9O3BwcfWFc0gLKUKqRHZbSbzN6LgRFNN7aRUh2wE67wWM5cUnZe-CmAl0Cuw1EY-jLpKmmCbEBL6eVboym025qxYM8XA8mMBItF6UryJ3QKPzZks%3D).

[
](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=42174ddb869d4278a5b5e4623f07f052&_e=x1MAcoVBDH6Qdp1p17cvHtg0fFv3y7ZFTOAaPMDBH-k_5LfzhGj9wc07dSb_qdxxuRcWW3HgdVOSlIPbTrvtlGEAyFrbS-acJfXZch4GS5qFFTCw_t3-EyxSX_igDMQIjO4FkcqDISRCLp1R40AvQj50gsWBvbc_wsNvX48bm0eqPzJFy50tdHJ4KTgW7zv8IVEdyXEzmTlRmyEvsYY7MrPKRAb8bWsvrah07wxhl13_u3XWbSuqhUWLtmrVTnnBb2p7DSQr2KiAYYTA29k8w2xQCP9bi4Z54cpbYXTrzSdOVCDSewT9udIckrm2YC2vYfg45qLJ7rGiS_vF3TtV1qPZDXD-vhXSWGvUhrTINdF2gj5y6wxlR8WweIIl4LzMr922FniA79L3JlOOGBayxDStn5WzujSL5S7yCtzA-xY3C-UOZtdOIEAbE6unLMnfV3EhxFvEw4I7mQFti_VNSQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

People often ask me the question of _**why?**_

_Why I’m running for U.S. Senate?_

_Why I care so much about America?_

_Why would I do _anything_ to defend freedom and protect liberty?_

I’ll tell you why, Fellow Conservative - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. **I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960.** In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust.

I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. **And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago.**

[**If you want to hear more about why I’m running, and why this race is so imperative to restoring our Nation, tap the link to watch below:**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=42174ddb869d4278a5b5e4623f07f052&_e=x1MAcoVBDH6Qdp1p17cvHtg0fFv3y7ZFTOAaPMDBH-k_5LfzhGj9wc07dSb_qdxxuRcWW3HgdVOSlIPbTrvtlGEAyFrbS-acJfXZch4GS5qFFTCw_t3-EyxSX_igDMQIjO4FkcqDISRCLp1R40AvQj50gsWBvbc_wsNvX48bm0eqPzJFy50tdHJ4KTgW7zv8IVEdyXEzmTlRmyEvsYY7MrPKRAb8bWsvrah07wxhl13_u3XWbSuqhUWLtmrVTnnBp0dgyD3D-hbJeBLCVFg26JmOU-k7FcOCynyuIABzggDduj4JEIMlHMphpmJnACYHzJVpgCT2ngddQIwD9tYt0J2CXklScae3EhjP2c4CgkxFV2Ud9U1kzwdhSAAIcbk_lSwULW0VREqlJHGwruXVEEGQ5kj4GQqLIhLesKuqSsH83NSZUU0MgSWOwtuQT8zR70IHMtyZjeMp7nKWopCZSw%3D%3D)

[
](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=42174ddb869d4278a5b5e4623f07f052&_e=x1MAcoVBDH6Qdp1p17cvHtg0fFv3y7ZFTOAaPMDBH-k_5LfzhGj9wc07dSb_qdxxuRcWW3HgdVOSlIPbTrvtlGEAyFrbS-acJfXZch4GS5qFFTCw_t3-EyxSX_igDMQIjO4FkcqDISRCLp1R40AvQj50gsWBvbc_wsNvX48bm0eqPzJFy50tdHJ4KTgW7zv8IVEdyXEzmTlRmyEvsYY7MrPKRAb8bWsvrah07wxhl13_u3XWbSuqhUWLtmrVTnnBhGZDgfNGh7V_hDBOYfY3RDMr_jXSR6XIErHb2IQHNTl9z9nSKoqxzUNHXdk8ZkruK8n-GLjoi74QRiVw9CXARBZhxBbWKMdrv--eZwF3W6FYN8jHcIEcgoSroKYD7lkwfzQmujxu7d-uo8hFDijnk31c5L69HXXEMmlcAAIVtQxL93ZphJLUBicbcMzgGsP-YOYEE84YLBkj2GXIe2NjUA%3D%3D)

I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. _There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already._

What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great.

[**I have always felt a calling to give back and serve my country.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=42174ddb869d4278a5b5e4623f07f052&_e=x1MAcoVBDH6Qdp1p17cvHtg0fFv3y7ZFTOAaPMDBH-k_5LfzhGj9wc07dSb_qdxxuRcWW3HgdVOSlIPbTrvtlGEAyFrbS-acJfXZch4GS5qFFTCw_t3-EyxSX_igDMQIjO4FkcqDISRCLp1R40AvQj50gsWBvbc_wsNvX48bm0eqPzJFy50tdHJ4KTgW7zv8IVEdyXEzmTlRmyEvsYY7MrPKRAb8bWsvrah07wxhl13_u3XWbSuqhUWLtmrVTnnBRHc124kZvM193cmUhpWcDaSoMyDGznEFS5qGw3FIBfw3OYTiWShzPHni-RTc1zRL6i6R9L4NCmdaTaDHz5RaWHoVWOlWnkLus55_m3l_9fQmMqHE40AFDDOrwBlXHrnmN4_RwupQb8MhuQsnXxV2VOKWCX6X2p2rAbk0Ky4ZM83qzT60wW63xXzJd2M07fs77WiofzgnTtjfEdbIxH-xBg%3D%3D)

If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, [**then I need you to join my team. Every single dollar my campaign raises is a dollar put towards a better future for this country.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=42174ddb869d4278a5b5e4623f07f052&_e=x1MAcoVBDH6Qdp1p17cvHtg0fFv3y7ZFTOAaPMDBH-k_5LfzhGj9wc07dSb_qdxxuRcWW3HgdVOSlIPbTrvtlGEAyFrbS-acJfXZch4GS5qFFTCw_t3-EyxSX_igDMQIjO4FkcqDISRCLp1R40AvQj50gsWBvbc_wsNvX48bm0eqPzJFy50tdHJ4KTgW7zv8IVEdyXEzmTlRmyEvsYY7MrPKRAb8bWsvrah07wxhl13_u3XWbSuqhUWLtmrVTnnBodCwKO96BA9KNBcEVYeG80ONxyIilQyttcXAQozgK-qCNkerD1Dq-8c8rHN_jd4tPS7xkchjzETY3YmrfzQsuBRYX1Jx_iv-v5v-M7YhBEf50pAdE6dBC3a_9Ugu5H4iMZlmDXersVj7cJ1NJojzLN1O-p_IolJgU16EqOpHWMjgxyeKUHb3Q4ZCtuxH0SixchGysZjIL9rc-UyWV6hM9w%3D%3D)

So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --_a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of_ -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America.

I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains.

I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. [**I hope I can count on your support.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=42174ddb869d4278a5b5e4623f07f052&_e=x1MAcoVBDH6Qdp1p17cvHtg0fFv3y7ZFTOAaPMDBH-k_5LfzhGj9wc07dSb_qdxxuRcWW3HgdVOSlIPbTrvtlGEAyFrbS-acJfXZch4GS5qFFTCw_t3-EyxSX_igDMQIjO4FkcqDISRCLp1R40AvQj50gsWBvbc_wsNvX48bm0eqPzJFy50tdHJ4KTgW7zv8IVEdyXEzmTlRmyEvsYY7MrPKRAb8bWsvrah07wxhl13_u3XWbSuqhUWLtmrVTnnBFXAIFy77B8cYQfpRu2Abx3q2gJM5CMbYyn7rEXYhqBqj-AMh-nuTMlyDCsEM7hTm08gUeYog2W3vS2mlxs8_ZC3JHerqjhUHHUJg_OTcO1-IUNiAMmwiphT2DaX-e16oKeugkyeLcQ7dyj-htZYjE1tayLE-rjZROYZX2mqfvXMQ1gG6qW4DkPbhrM6d41zQ_I96taj44kclhlGQJLY5rA%3D%3D)

For Freedom,
Leora Levy

P.S. If you want to learn more about my story or why I’m running for Senate, [**tap the secure link to watch now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=42174ddb869d4278a5b5e4623f07f052&_e=x1MAcoVBDH6Qdp1p17cvHtg0fFv3y7ZFTOAaPMDBH-k_5LfzhGj9wc07dSb_qdxxuRcWW3HgdVOSlIPbTrvtlGEAyFrbS-acJfXZch4GS5qFFTCw_t3-EyxSX_igDMQIjO4FkcqDISRCLp1R40AvQj50gsWBvbc_wsNvX48bm0eqPzJFy50tdHJ4KTgW7zv8IVEdyXEzmTlRmyEvsYY7MrPKRAb8bWsvrah07wxhl13_u3XWbSuqhUWLtmrVTnnB-mmTWtNYEeen4k0HoEVxj-cCMYgbiwObCy1U3fVTtq1rFn-rl35Q0UniTjjDrkruGDWKNxTiIZIuRmOFatchjcM39t4SIQGXIPlaudEUvyfty1hZJPumtCniUJ23z6WrP0IxVmBV6QVdapBhMZrnc6iuZSse7vMGKK9oMVNdEiUtm5vA5qrdTWrfsH7q7HGNkxWIBXQ8ZFHOC_4vhwJMqw%3D%3D)

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

---
| Paid for by Leora Levy for U.S. Senate, Inc.

This is not good, friend —
Governor Mike DeWine just signed a bill allowing people to carry their guns **_without a permit._**
Never mind that 88% of Americans think you should have a permit to carry a concealed weapon or that **handgun homicides increase by about 11% in states with permitless carry** — our governor and the Ohio GOP are hell-bent on delivering for their gun lobby friends first, and Ohioans last.
**In John’s own words, signing the bill “is a stain on Mike DeWine’s soul.”** This is a slap in the face to Ohio’s law enforcement, local communities, and everyone who believed DeWine’s promise to work for gun control after the 2019 Dayton shooting.
Enough is enough, friend. We need smart leadership in Ohio, and we’re not getting it with our gun-lobby governor and the GOP extremists in Columbus.
**[Sign on to our petition RIGHT NOW and tell the GOP that we don’t want permitless gun carry in Ohio>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43223695/336254263/402577306?refcode=ea.4266347e-64a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.4266347e-64a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjY2MzQ3ZS02NGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n90zv-ByYrDQBoCK066OBLP4_9xq-q4UwkaVt2E0jsQ=&emci=b9b6c30a-5ca9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4266347e-64a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=22604289)**

subject: Lining his Pockets with Oil Money, Emptying Yours
body:
Does he think we're stupid? | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=f60a296d3f&e=4712f71bea)
---
| **Friends,**

Ronny Jackson blames Joe Biden for the high gas prices hitting every American's pocket book right now. Ridiculous. Anyone elected to Congress ought to know that any single politician's ability to change gas prices is extremely limited.

The thing is, Ronny knows that! **He's just defending his dark money donors and hoping you won't notice. **

This cycle alone, Jackson's campaign **collected more than $62,000 from Big Oil**. Ronny's re-election campaign depends on Big Oil Corporate donors and they depend on him to spread their lies.

[_**Ronny Jackson is lining his campaign's pockets while his friends empty yours. **_](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=4b2d38c59d&e=4712f71bea)

I'm running to replace him and to defend hardworking Texans from Corporate Greed Enthusiasts like Ronny Jackson.

_**[Will you chip in $5 today to give working class people a fighter in Congress? ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=cc115710e5&e=4712f71bea)**_

Thank you for anything you can give,

Kathleen Brown

name: Josh Riley
subject: Working families deserve a vote in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
I’ll never forget my first big case as a lawyer.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43223745/336254570/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220321-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWViN2UwYi02NWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORlTk9Sga-m74r6iG2QLm7P4PcRI04gafLmOPK3cXIQ=)
---
| Peter,

I’ll never forget my first big case as a lawyer.

After I graduated from law school, I had job offers to work with the big banks on Wall Street.

I turned them down. Instead, I moved down to Florida to work for several years with the American Academy of Pediatrics on a landmark civil rights lawsuit representing children from low-income families who were unable to access the healthcare services they needed.

I argued in federal court then, and believe in my heart and soul today, that health care should be a civil right in America, not a source of corporate profits and shareholder dividends.

In Florida, our efforts set important legal precedent and made a real difference for working families — and our team was honored to receive the Thaddeus Stevens Award from the Public Interest Law Center in recognition of our work.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43223746/336254571/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220321-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWViN2UwYi02NWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORlTk9Sga-m74r6iG2QLm7P4PcRI04gafLmOPK3cXIQ=)
Today, the big banks on Wall Street still have a front-row seat at the table in Congress, but working families don’t.

I’m running for Congress to fix that – and put working people’s voices front and center in every conversation in Washington.

That’s why I’m not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money in our campaign for Congress and instead relying on grassroots support to fuel this effort.

But, it also means we need a _lot more_ individual donors to step up to make sure we have what it takes to share our message with every voter.

[_**So, Peter, if you’re in this fight with us all the way, I hope you’ll pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to help us win this thing!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43223747/336254572/550119472?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220321-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWViN2UwYi02NWE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORlTk9Sga-m74r6iG2QLm7P4PcRI04gafLmOPK3cXIQ=)

clean_body: I’ll never forget my first big case as a lawyer. | = | Peter, I’ll never forget my first big case as a lawyer. After I graduated from law school, I had job offers to work with the big banks on Wall Street. I turned them down. Instead, I moved down to Florida to work for several years with the American Academy of Pediatrics on a landmark civil rights lawsuit representing children from low-income families who were unable to access the healthcare services they needed. I argued in federal court then, and believe in my heart and soul today, that health care should be a civil right in America, not a source of corporate profits and shareholder dividends. In Florida, our efforts set important legal precedent and made a real difference for working families — and our team was honored to receive the Thaddeus Stevens Award from the Public Interest Law Center in recognition of our work. = Today, the big banks on Wall Street still have a front-row seat at the table in Congress, but working families don’t. I’m running for Congress to fix that – and put working people’s voices front and center in every conversation in Washington. That’s why I’m not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money in our campaign for Congress and instead relying on grassroots support to fuel this effort. But, it also means we need a lot more individual donors to step up to make sure we have what it takes to share our message with every voter. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m so humbled by all of your support and grateful to have you on the team. | | I've been in your shoes before – you receive a fundraising email, you donate what you can, and you have no idea how your money is spent. That's why at Team Salinas, [**I've made it a priority to****let our grassroots donors know what we're doing with the funds you've so generously donated.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43224075/336256006/1963792741?refcode=2022-03-21-moneygoes&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=115f38d6-66a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTVmMzhkNi02NmE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KpQrLgKRfGeB8P_ebofb3qh_-A56dLGE147KABuD7mY=) **First of all, we use your donations to hire staff.** It takes people to run a campaign, fundraise, and implement a strategic field plan, and ensure our message gets out to voters. **Second, we use your donations to communicate our message to Oregon voters.** We do this through advertising, campaign literature, organizing, and more. It's critical that we get the message out to Oregon voters about what's at stake in this race. **My campaign is run by people, not by billionaires or millionaires plastering your TV with campaign ads.** I am so proud to have thousands of grassroots donors behind me. subject: Beijing Biden is doing nothing as China threatens Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
While Americans suffer! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/doingnothing?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b2255708f7&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

The CCP is threatening us and Joe Biden is doing nothing to keep our country safe. The reason for this is obvious.

**[_It’s because Biden is sympathetic to the country that his son, Hunter, has very deep ties with_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d562551652&e=645b3b1338)!**

As Russia continues to invade Ukraine, China is aiming to take over Taiwan. The Chinese sent an intimidating message to the U.S. and NATO, threatening us with war as they become more and more powerful!

Biden and the Democrats are silent as China threatens us because they are **WEAK**! Our country is laughed at by the world because of our president!

_Under Biden’s failed leadership and the Democrat-controlled Congress, our economy has crumbled, gas prices have exploded and our borders have remained unsecured_.

[**_This never would have happened under Trump_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7a7c8c8309&e=645b3b1338).

To protect this country, we **need** to regain a majority in Congress and I need to be reelected.

The Left is doing all they can to get rid of me because I refuse to bow down to China and any other country that threatens my nation. I will always put America **FIRST**!

The Democrats are working with the mainstream media **_nonstop_** to attack and lie about me.

I need your help to fend off their dirty campaign tactics and continue advocating for true Conservatism in Congress!

Chip in $10, $20, $50, or $100 to my reelection campaign so your voice can be heard by the radical Left. [**We can stop the Democrats from destroying this country but only if we rally together in support of strong Republicans like myself**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b18e248181&e=645b3b1338).

Donate [**TODAY**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b6b5d235d6&e=645b3b1338) to join me in strengthening America!

Thank you in advance for your generosity.

_**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=82486c27d3&e=645b3b1338)**_

name: Imani Oakley
subject: We’re officially on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

I have HUGE news.

As of this weekend, we officially gathered enough signatures to qualify for the ballot in the June 7th primary!

And — what’s more — we did it BEFORE Rep. Donald Payne Jr.

Now, we need to take this energy and this momentum and turn it into a victory for everyone who’s been left behind by a corrupt system. If you’re with me, click here to chip in $27, or whatever you can, and help us do it! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=321ballot]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=321ballot] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=321ballot] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=321ballot] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=321ballot] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=321ballot] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=321ballot]

This is a major victory, but we can’t rest easy just yet. New Jersey’s corrupt political machine is well known for their schemes to challenge and invalidate petition signatures for progressive campaigns like ours.

That’s why we need all hands on deck to push back against the machine’s tricks and mobilize progressive voters who’ve been silenced for far too long. We need to take our people-powered movement across the finish line, and we need your help to do it.

Help us make these next three months count. Click here to chip in $27 and support our progressive movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=321ballot]

This is your campaign, Peter. You’re the reason we were one of the FIRST candidates to qualify for the ballot. And you’re the reason we’re well on our way to winning a historic victory for marginalized communities.

Thank you for being a part of our movement.

— Imani

---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
Another busy week in the books for Team Tanya. From the LD25 forum to doorknocking and more doorknocking, we were on the move all week.

We would love to have you join our movement or stop by your organization next time. If you're interested, hit reply and we'll tell you how you can get involved!

**8 More Days to Get Tanya on the Ballot!! We need your help!!**

We need to get as many petition signatures as possible to get Tanya on the ballot, as well as to show the Democrats that we mean business in AZ-04 by blowing past our signature total goal.

If you haven't signed Tanya's petition yet, reply and our team will bring you a petition to sign.

Do you have a little time to help get your neighbors and friends on board? Whether you have 30 min, two hours or all day, any time you have would be so helpful. If you have a little spare time, hit reply or text or call us at 480-420-7822 and our team will get you everything you need.
---
| **Don't Forget!**
* Sign Tanya's Petition [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=e445fa2006&e=bd2b55b0e3)

* Get news and updates on [Twitter](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=96ff57c018&e=bd2b55b0e3) and [Facebook](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=f1220fea5b&e=bd2b55b0e3).

name: Charlie Crist (via RonBeGone.com)
subject: I’m disgusted and furious at the Florida GOP’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
it’s vile and abhorrent
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/6226?t=6&akid=973%2E564421%2E6cX77X) Team, I’m disgusted and furious.

This month, Florida Republicans passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill – a proposed law that would _**ban**_ all discussion of LGBTQ+ issues, history, people, and more in the classroom.

Let’s be clear: This a direct attack on our LGBTQ+ youth, who _already face higher risks of bullying and suicide._ This bill is anti-history and jeopardizes the safe learning environments that are so essential in our schools.

[**I’ve pledged to build a Florida for All, and all includes everyone. That’s why I’m working with Ron Be Gone to beat DeSantis and end this crusade against LGBTQ+ students once and for all. If you’re ready to make Florida a more inclusive place, please chip in $3 towards our $10,000 campaign goal now »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/6228?t=8&akid=973%2E564421%2E6cX77X) | [SPLIT $3 BETWEEN MY CAMPAIGN AND RON BE GONE TO RETIRE RON DESANTIS »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/6228?t=10&akid=973%2E564421%2E6cX77X)
---
Unfortunately, this isn’t the first time Gov. DeSantis and his allies in the Florida Legislature have attacked the LGBTQ+ community.

On the _first_ day of Pride Month 2021, the governor signed an anti-transgender bill. _**It was abhorrent then, and it’s abhorrent now.**_

[**Friend, please chip in any amount as soon as you possibly can. Floridians deserve better than this vile, hateful bill. Ron Be Gone is doing everything they can to make sure Gov. DeSantis doesn’t have another term in office, but we'll need your help. Chip in now if you can! »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/6228?t=12&akid=973%2E564421%2E6cX77X)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/6234?t=18&akid=973%2E564421%2E6cX77X)

[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/6235?t=19&akid=973%2E564421%2E6cX77X)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/6236?t=20&akid=973%2E564421%2E6cX77X)
Thank you for fighting for what’s right.

\-- Charlie Crist
_Democratic Candidate for Governor of Florida_
[**P.S. The work Ron Be Gone is doing is critical -- they're solely focused on defeating Ron DeSantis with powerful ads, billboards, and voter registration. I’m standing with them and I hope you will too. Rush $3 if you can! »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/6228?t=22&akid=973%2E564421%2E6cX77X)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: tl;dr we need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We can’t let anyone buy their way into the Senate.
#
Hey Derek, did you see our email from earlier today?
**The tl;dr is this:** One of our opponents' dark money super PACs released a nine-page memo directly attacking John + our campaign.
**Our grassroots power can only keep up with a super PAC of this size if every one of us chips in when we can.**
**[Will you step up and be one of the supporters we need today to help our campaign defend itself? With enough support from people like you, we’ll be able to focus on our 67 County Plan instead of having to playing defense.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45694?refcode=em20220321-5073&t=1&akid=5073%2E434096%2EWQRNJ0)**
Thank you for stepping up during this critical moment.
—Team Fetterman HQ 💛
P.S. Read below to learn more about the attack on our campaign + **[how your grassroots donations can help.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45694?refcode=em20220321-5073&t=2&akid=5073%2E434096%2EWQRNJ0)**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
Date: Mon, Mar 21, 2022
Subject: re: Conor Lamb
To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
🚨 Derek, we just got bad news. **🚨**
**A dark money super PAC backing our opponent Conor Lamb’s campaign just released a nine-page memo directly attacking John.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45694?refcode=em20220321-5073&t=3&akid=5073%2E434096%2EWQRNJ0)
**The memo is bad news and chock-full of false Republican talking points.**
In their own polls, the Lamb campaign is 30 points behind John. Now, his super PAC is relying on lies and Fox News talking points to smear us.
**[Will you be a proud supporter of John Fetterman today and help our campaign defend itself? We need a surge of support from everyday people today to show that we will NOT allow anyone to buy this election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45694?refcode=em20220321-5073&t=4&akid=5073%2E434096%2EWQRNJ0)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45694?refcode=em20220321-5073&amounts=5&t=5&akid=5073%2E434096%2EWQRNJ0)**
Their super PAC’s plan is to drown out the power of our team, and buy their way in PA. It’s completely screwed up.
But with less than two months until the Democratic primary election, we can’t hesitate to fight back with everything we’ve got. **We can’t let anyone buy their way into the Senate, and we can’t let our momentum fall short.**
**[We’re counting on every single person who believes in the power of our campaign to take a stand against these new attacks from Lamb’s super PAC. Please donate $5 or anything you can to our campaign today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45694?refcode=em20220321-5073&t=6&akid=5073%2E434096%2EWQRNJ0)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45694?refcode=em20220321-5073&amounts=5&t=25&akid=5073%2E434096%2EWQRNJ0)**
We’re a campaign supported by people. John, Gisele, and our whole team think that’s the right way to do it, Derek. And it’s showing in the polls — we’re consistently the _only_ Democrat beating our GOP opponents.
It’s not an exaggeration to say our campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. We’re running this race the right way, and we know we can win with your continued support.
More soon,
Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220321-5073-footer&t=26&refcode2=5073_434096_WQRNJ0&akid=5073%2E434096%2EWQRNJ0)**

clean_body: We can’t let anyone buy their way into the Senate. Hey Derek, did you see our email from earlier today? The tl;dr is this: One of our opponents' dark money super PACs released a nine-page memo directly attacking John + our campaign. Our grassroots power can only keep up with a super PAC of this size if every one of us chips in when we can. Thank you for stepping up during this critical moment. —Team Fetterman HQ 💛 P.S. Read below to learn more about the attack on our campaign + \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Fetterman for U.S. Senate Date: Mon, Mar 21, 2022 Subject: re: Conor Lamb To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com] 🚨 Derek, we just got bad news. 🚨 A dark money super PAC backing our opponent Conor Lamb’s campaign just released a nine-page memo directly attacking John. The memo is bad news and chock-full of false Republican talking points. In their own polls, the Lamb campaign is 30 points behind John. Now, his super PAC is relying on lies and Fox News talking points to smear us. Their super PAC’s plan is to drown out the power of our team, and buy their way in PA. It’s completely screwed up. body:
The Dems need to get their priorities in check

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=f6cec900c2ba4b2384f6bc15b0b54b5a&_e=FMYSkZx-YHaN42M3QM0E7wdPZqcLRJ0XaeZqSTBFBvnZVBuCaWc-2yL6u-zU-TeHvfGEh-OWbmt-TKFcD_7N_qcdMuYXhqilF-FrFkf4zWY5F7SSvVSLe8PqL-q7eberADJQ6kSr50r1Oiz3nDVHnLXiq4Z0lB02ehp8f6vWlVHx6q6JmOYXja3Ll4TQJvE8dZsSGqSwachlh_1KTpXVF1LpmHWWuBYZfkvWfX3D7rZxo1swXiSdNfoBkO6vWtSC9-bq2I2H2mgiP38QxYqKvfocWn6_BtSY2N2AsICpAcUOW4C9hmoNLLIx8p8h0FSkaQ91V1aF6NC3uXs7P7i0PcSgpd1D3fWhwy42uayaDD6uRZMZ4BsPNvFpX7DS6rcBVtcY_kBfYqfvsvjzFB6KL3wR0eyfU9ovTZy4aPw-UAAoDTvW684_X-rOha8MQnNOetsVfBHoMaR-_MpFpfWRu_Oh3r4ho6RcDVF0KvzItanfykxGdrrp2bZOaNnYxzKTae6ooEn0lMhjX_beA0waiLqPPJbHRly96Gv_74yvm74%3D)
---
Friends,
_**WE MUST PRESERVE CONSERVATIVE VALUES IN AMERICA!**_

That's why, on behalf of business owner, entrepreneur, veteran, and family man Kelly Cooper, we're reaching out directly to get YOUR feedback!
Since Kelly values your opinion, and is ready to bring a fresh perspective to Congress, he wants to know exactly what's on the minds of everyday Arizonans and Americans.
So get back to him with your input - complete the short, two-minute poll below and share your thoughts about what you think the top issues are facing the state of Arizona:

Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: A surprising American tradition
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, [**I am the only candidate in this race who supports expanding the Supreme Court, so we can protect our freedoms from being snatched away by an extremist rightwing minority. Please chip in a couple bucks now to help me fight for legislation in the House to expand the Court.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43226692/336292234/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTE1NDg1Ni05MGE5LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=huc5un2wRB3PXTErIpnJeOaCUSeUYn2ThMx1Vixrtt0=) The size of the Supreme Court has changed seven times before in US history. In fact, changing the Court’s size is a 200+ year-old American tradition. If Democrats want to protect civil, gender, racial, and reproductive rights, they should expand the Court NOW. That’s why I support legislation to do so. Additionally, let’s consider the history. In the 19th century, there were nine justices because each one oversaw one of nine judicial regions (“circuits”) in the country. Now there are 13 circuits, but we still only have nine justices. 13 justices for 13 circuits would be a sensible change to make. We need 13 justices. We need to stop letting rightwing extremists run roughshod over our rights. We need to protect civil rights, voting rights, same-sex marriage rights, reproductive freedom, and more. [**What do you think? Can you chip in a couple bucks to help me fight for that in the clean_body: | | | Hi there, = The size of the Supreme Court has changed seven times before in US history. In fact, changing the Court’s size is a 200+ year-old American tradition. If Democrats want to protect civil, gender, racial, and reproductive rights, they should expand the Court NOW. That’s why I support legislation to do so. Additionally, let’s consider the history. In the 19th century, there were nine justices because each one oversaw one of nine judicial regions (“circuits”) in the country. Now there are 13 circuits, but we still only have nine justices. 13 justices for 13 circuits would be a sensible change to make. We need 13 justices. We need to stop letting rightwing extremists run roughshod over our rights. We need to protect civil rights, voting rights, same-sex marriage rights, reproductive freedom, and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Glenn Beck
subject: [URGENT] A personal request for Ukraine
body:
| | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb184ff6ebe2449b9a0029bcea5944bb&_e=BIeS82gNcZG4in1mKuPVoDYdb7flhFlo9Sg5AAjsmZdrDlGM72pCNBv94EMeO_90SoXF8yCvZLkofK7OJSrOndhk7cYTXl0_YN4ok3Fdp2iQnHW-5b-liTfZnqvsPhlSOJJHnqDteQ60INJY1Ng_BxrPTF00OuCTUHKNMkR0YSnrYwc4NdOc35qaFubBaKbtWXumOa_LQh8XFRDhDZHhaZ0bN3K2406rH9C96PXiAWk3dpRnK3VqWF3G1xVpPoFAwWO0AH5BhdnMAhNZ1dhsYo682vg8G1azvskRGb6DjaVIgVNt0VsaREyx3Bc79pAf2pjsdOnkIKSRq3fkjHcZ22Xt-6RDFZ32iIeukquxfiWUHgCwBfsCIynJ9d3PS2hnA7KMolyuhVpwfrHXOD5qFQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb184ff6ebe2449b9a0029bcea5944bb&_e=BIeS82gNcZG4in1mKuPVoDYdb7flhFlo9Sg5AAjsmZdrDlGM72pCNBv94EMeO_90SoXF8yCvZLkofK7OJSrOndhk7cYTXl0_YN4ok3Fdp2iQnHW-5b-liTfZnqvsPhlSOJJHnqDteQ60INJY1Ng_BxrPTF00OuCTUHKNMkR0YSnNCFP-F3Dn_f8JvP7RQrJ-9FcNoE1aIByf9bi1GVLvj9x9zpDxFEQEjcLZJWIUw0Q1Hl0O8bll2oD_HuewUItLqYZYAbhst1pH9VgDOFyh3qfQZmzLJ9_Zap_nocaqpQ9mY1ZBhPW__wIwE1ZksqP-8PiUvadCvKfMN4-blNQoNL5zgu3mABxwmcZjhCcne0ABTnM0pE81jEmvkktadW2f2OAVbDoVHfpjR4DVbiVPnw%3D%3D)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb184ff6ebe2449b9a0029bcea5944bb&_e=BIeS82gNcZG4in1mKuPVoDYdb7flhFlo9Sg5AAjsmZdrDlGM72pCNBv94EMeO_90SoXF8yCvZLkofK7OJSrOndhk7cYTXl0_YN4ok3Fdp2iQnHW-5b-liTfZnqvsPhlSOJJHnqDteQ60INJY1Ng_BxrPTF00OuCTUHKNMkR0YSnkBxGjrMsrSBAOYnc7xzeNctocJePSlMppCT4OvJTnjp3QcwBARjto80cax9YHcDonDFF1mCzyzpjMy76SkOwfiQQ423vZcHxcA2HYwPH6MdF-Ry8nNAze0vwO7fn69xvHHdDMl8mB6hkTnB8e2251amEu5r5HUWOuVJC8bNj3qHEBykKp-HlvLRM79CnXHQTK7h7RlnC8hANDRZfH80JN2B8Ekl58qGwf7wrCy11FOw%3D%3D)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb184ff6ebe2449b9a0029bcea5944bb&_e=BIeS82gNcZG4in1mKuPVoDYdb7flhFlo9Sg5AAjsmZdrDlGM72pCNBv94EMeO_90SoXF8yCvZLkofK7OJSrOndhk7cYTXl0_YN4ok3Fdp2iQnHW-5b-liTfZnqvsPhlSOJJHnqDteQ60INJY1Ng_BxrPTF00OuCTUHKNMkR0YSkAK7sd81K4cN_nSZJ4rIJcIpblvnUvD1k23omUq4l-jNo2u00m3cJOejv1N2KbCN35aedDc3jTyd--y8loUDpcH8b1bdglqhe7W7_BuIUvqeVLRq3po_ZtJgIOGzI7DBvDPoYeno72YbWdljeimZd5fqEzmVcmxpdvjuAO87MqsVQI16dKekWni1UMJHywTeLW44ewbbJlNnnnjSwtKAj5apN8zwdzRw0dQ2ZymUA0Ig%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fb184ff6ebe2449b9a0029bcea5944bb&_e=BIeS82gNcZG4in1mKuPVoDYdb7flhFlo9Sg5AAjsmZdrDlGM72pCNBv94EMeO_90SoXF8yCvZLkofK7OJSrOndhk7cYTXl0_YN4ok3Fdp2iQnHW-5b-liTfZnqvsPhlSOJJHnqDteQ60INJY1Ng_BxrPTF00OuCTUHKNMkR0YSkoFuvp6payWJaXYAPF9KjVKdsOM9iQfzRjD_a-RYiepTIOSRKxpOCDovSp-EWN4xQi7MnFZy7XRvPfKPH82d1H7d4Tu0jgqZRbUlpq564NAbgr14rrqIzUgJgzAPaCrgNh-PrSOo55AMPT5C0IVHgL5o5tCE0bJI40zcmQFROFrHuEO1eWAyxrUzs1r7X4JztUyXH01rLV2hyOHCmaO2bSwxkvZ8_XPHZSSpEwCo2nrQ%3D%3D)

name: Erica Smith
subject: This has to stop →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
No member of Congress should be trading or owning stocks while in office.
#
I’m going to say something that shouldn’t be controversial:
**No member of Congress should be trading or owning stocks while in office.**
But right now, this is legal.
That means the same lawmakers whose job it is to pass and vote on legislation are also allowed to profit from the industries they are overseeing — a blatant conflict of interest that has helped block progress on priorities from climate change to health care to prescription drugs. **This has to stop.**
[**If you agree that it’s time to ban all members of Congress and their families from profiting through ownership of individual stocks, please click here to send a letter to your representative »**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45206?t=1&akid=1014%2E3698%2Ef5F219)
**[Send a message](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45206?t=2&akid=1014%2E3698%2Ef5F219)**
**I’m running for Congress to end corruption in Washington.** That’s why I support multiple bills under consideration that would ban members of Congress and their families from owning and trading stocks.
Without this kind of legislation, members of Congress will continue to have the financial incentive to advance policies that profit big corporations and themselves at the expense of everyday people.
**We elect representatives to fight for us, not enrich themselves and their families.** [**If you’re with me, will you take a moment to send a letter to your Congressperson and let them know you support a ban on individual stock trading for members of Congress and their families?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/45206?t=3&akid=1014%2E3698%2Ef5F219)
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Erica Smith
Candidate for Congress in North Carolina’s 1st District

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220321-1014-footer&t=4&refcode2=1014_3698_f5F219&akid=1014%2E3698%2Ef5F219)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=5&akid=1014%2E3698%2Ef5F219)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1014%2E3698%2Ef5F219)

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
