name: Ohio Senate Update (via Team Ryan)
subject: “unhinged clowns”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9567?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2913%2E3611125%2EIIgHP1 ]Mike Gibbons and Josh Mandel

“Unhinged clowns”

Those are words POLITICO used to describe Republican Senate candidates
Mike Gibbons and Josh Mandel after their faux-tough guy standoff at last
Friday’s GOP debate.

In case you missed it (and seriously, good for you if you did): Gibbons
and Mandel actually jumped up and got in each other’s faces, bumping
chests while lobbing insults back and forth.

REMINDER: Gibbons and Mandel are the two frontrunners in the Republican
primary ... because apparently this is the absolute BEST the GOP has to
offer?

It’s embarrassing, folks. Both for Ohio and for our country—and
it’s up to us to defeat these unhinged clowns and the far-right,
billionaire-funded super PACs propping them up.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/9567?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2913%2E3611125%2EIIgHP1 ]So please, if you’re ready for a Senator who is focused on delivering
real results for hardworking Ohioans (not getting in stupid fights), will
you chip in $25 to Tim Ryan’s campaign today?

name: Team Beasley
subject: A fair hearing for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Today, the Senate Judiciary Committee began hearings on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court.
#

Friends -
Today, the Senate Judiciary Committee began hearings on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court.
This is an important moment for the American people to hear directly from Judge Jackson on what she will bring to the Supreme Court, and she deserves a fair hearing that treats her and the process with the respect they deserve.
**[We must demand that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson receives a fair hearing. If you agree, add your name to tell the Senate to give her nomination the thoughtful and careful consideration she is owed.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-kbj-nomination-hearing/?source=em220321-1-MA&refcode2=572.357359.fPw0KO&akid=572%2E357359%2EfPw0KO)**
Judge Jackson is eminently qualified and would provide an important voice on the Court.
As the former Chief Justice of North Carolina's Supreme Court, Cheri firmly believes that our Supreme Court — like all institutions — must reflect the diversity of our nation.
It is clear that some Washington Republicans want to turn this into a divisive, partisan battle that has nothing to do with the merits of Judge Jackson’s nomination. But we must demand that Judge Jackson receive fair consideration from every U.S. Senator as the hearings begin.
**[Please add your name today to tell the Senate Judiciary Committee to give Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson a fair hearing.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-kbj-nomination-hearing/?source=em220321-1-MA&refcode2=572.357359.fPw0KO&akid=572%2E357359%2EfPw0KO)**
This historic moment is long overdue, and we know it will inspire so many across our country.
\- Team Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-kbj-nomination-hearing/?source=em220321-1-MA&refcode2=572.357359.fPw0KO&akid=572%2E357359%2EfPw0KO)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=572%2E357359%2EfPw0KO). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=572%2E357359%2EfPw0KO). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=572_357359_fPw0KO&akid=572%2E357359%2EfPw0KO) today to help us make history.
